announce_vault_teleporter_does_nothing.en: It must be an issue with the receiving end.

2.en: It ought to be more docile now.
2.trans: 现在它应该更温顺了。

3.en: The great Panthera auropunctata is tamed.

announce_elixir_player_speed.en: Strength is wasted on the young!
announce_elixir_player_speed.trans: 力量给年轻人纯碎是浪费！

announce_snared.en: You can't hold me for long, dear.
announce_snared.trans: 你不能长时间抱着我，亲爱的。

announce_lunar_rift_max.en: I suspect a powerful influx of energy is the source of that strange glow.
announce_lunar_rift_max.trans: 我怀疑强大能量的涌入是那束奇怪的光芒的来源。

describe_plantstressorhappiness.en: I should stimulate its growth with some conversation.
describe_plantstressorhappiness.trans: 我应该用谈话促进它的成长。

announce_elixir_ghostvision.en: My eyes have been adjusted to the darkness.
announce_elixir_ghostvision.trans: 我的眼睛已经适应了黑暗。

announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.en: I do believe I can fabricate a new bovine costume now.
announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.trans: 我可以织出一件放牛郎的衣服。

announce_firenettle_toxin_done.en: Thankfully, the toxin's effects seem to be temporary.
announce_firenettle_toxin_done.trans: 值得庆幸的是，这种毒素的影响似乎是暂时的。

1.en: I've gained a bit more insight into the workings of this species.
1.trans: 我对这个物种的机理有了更多的了解。

announce_cavein.en: The rocks above will soon give way.
announce_cavein.trans: 上面的岩石很快就会让路。

announce_nodaysleep_cave.en: These caves don't make it any easier to sleep.
announce_nodaysleep_cave.trans: 在这些洞穴里面睡觉可真不是一件容易的事。

announce_damp.en: The layer of water begins to build up.

announce_eyeofterror_arrive.en: Something from outside our dimension is trying to come in.
announce_eyeofterror_arrive.trans: 来自我们维度之外的东西正试图进来。

announce_despawn.en: I've never read anything describing this!
announce_despawn.trans: 我从没读过任何描述它的内容！

announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.en: It would be much more practical to build this closer to the competition.
announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.trans: 把它建的离比赛场地近点会更实用。

announce_plant_randomseed.en: Once it grows I'll be able to identify the species.
announce_plant_randomseed.trans: 等它长大了，我就可以辨认物种了。

announce_research.en: No information should go to waste, no matter how trivial.
announce_research.trans: 任何信息都不该被浪费，无论是多么微不足道。

2.en: Your Grace.
2.trans: 向陛下致敬。

announce_lightsout_shadowhand.en: That insufferable hand appears to be impeding the puzzle's resolution!
announce_lightsout_shadowhand.trans: 那只令人难以忍受的手似乎在妨碍解谜！

announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.en: This is obviously not the correct place for it.

announce_shadowthrall_stealth.en: I've been bitten by a camouflaged creature!

announce_is_feasting.en: I hope everyone remembered to wash their hands before eating.
announce_is_feasting.trans: 我希望每个人在饭前记得洗手。

announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.en: He believes we're near one of the kittens.
announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.trans: 他坚信其中一只小猫就在附近。

out_of_water.en: I'll have to replenish my water supply at the earliest opportunity.

inuse.en: It's obviously being carved by someone else.
inuse.trans: 显然已经有人在雕刻了。

targetincombat.en: It would be ill-advised to approach that scuffle.
targetincombat.trans: 靠近那场混战可不是个好主意。

notready.en: Perhaps when the ground is more stable...
notready.trans: 也许当地面更稳定时再说......

empty.en: I need something to build with first.
empty.trans: 首先我需要一些建造材料。

hermitcrab_relocate.en: A convenient way for the hermit crab to relocate her home.
hermitcrab_relocate.trans: 寄居蟹迁移居所的方法不可谓不便捷。

nothing_inside.trans: 正如我所猜测的那样，是空的。

inmood.en: Nothing will be accomplished in the state they're in.
inmood.trans: 它现在这个状态，什么也干不了。

needbeef.en: I will require a beefalo first.
needbeef.trans: 我首先需要一头皮弗娄牛。

needbeef_closer.en: My beefalo needs to be in closer proximity to the post.
needbeef_closer.trans: 我的皮弗娄牛需要离桩子近一点。

busy.en: I'll try again when they're free.

sleeping.en: They've entered REM sleep. No need to disturb them.
sleeping.trans: 它们进入了快速眼动睡眠。不要打扰它们。

full.trans: 它们已经载太多东西了。

unsuitable_for_plants.en: I'm afraid only freshwater will do.

oversizedveggies_too_small.en: I'm afraid this specimen simply doesn't have enough mass to compete.
oversizedveggies_too_small.trans: 我担心这个标本根本没有足够的质量来竞争。

fish_too_small.en: This specimen is far too insubstantial.
fish_too_small.trans: 这个标本远远达不到要求。

notamerm.en: I don't believe the locals would take kindly to that.
notamerm.trans: 我不相信本地人会喜欢这种行为。

restricted.en: It's not for me, I'm afraid.

inuse.en: Be sure to sort by color and weight, dear.
inuse.trans: 请务必按颜色和重量分类，亲爱的。

notmasterchef.en: It would be rude of me to tamper with it.

generic.en: I've other things on my mind currently.
generic.trans: 我现在脑子里还想着别的事情。

generic.en: I'd rather write in my own books.
generic.trans: 我宁愿在自己的书里写字。

no_racers.en: I can't gather any data with no subjects.
no_racers.trans: 没有对象，我收集不到任何数据。

notdish.en: That food is simply not suitable.

carnivalgame_invalid_item.en: That doesn't appear to be the correct form of payment.
carnivalgame_invalid_item.trans: 这似乎不是正确的支付形式。

mushroomfarm_needsshroom.en: Goodness no, it needs a fresh mushroom.
mushroomfarm_needsshroom.trans: 天哪，不，它需要一个新鲜的蘑菇。

slotfull.en: Let's finish what's on our plate first, shall we?
slotfull.trans: 让我们先吃掉餐盘上有的东西，好吗？

foodfull.en: I'll be around when you're ready for seconds, dear.
foodfull.trans: 等你准备好了就随时找我吧，亲爱的。

notamonkey.en: I believe they're trying to communicate.

mushroomfarm_needslog.en: It needs a log, imbued with magical properties.
mushroomfarm_needslog.trans: 它需要一个充满魔法属性的木头。

ghostheart.en: I'll not be meddling in that business.

busy.en: I'll try again when it's done.
busy.trans: 等它忙完了，我会再试试的。

pigkinggame_danger.en: This is no time for fun and games!

wronggem.en: This gemstone's properties are incorrect for my purposes.
wronggem.trans: 对于我而言，宝石的属性不对。

carnivalgame_already_playing.en: I'm afraid I'll have to wait.

terrarium_refuse.en: Perhaps I should make another attempt with something else.
terrarium_refuse.trans: 也许我应该用别的东西再做一次尝试。

terrarium_cooldown.en: Oh that won't do, the intended arborous recipient appears to be missing.
terrarium_cooldown.trans: 恐怕不行，预定的树状物接收者似乎不见了。

pigkinggame_toolate.en: No time for that now. It'll be dark soon.
pigkinggame_toolate.trans: 现在没时间了。天很快就要黑了。

queenbusy.en: She is occupied with other matters at the moment.
queenbusy.trans: 她此刻正忙于其他事务。

mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.en: This species seems to only grow in the wild.
mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.trans: 这个物种似乎只在野外生长。

duplicate.en: We've already taken note of this recipe.
duplicate.trans: 我们已经记下了这个配方。

pigkinggame_messy.en: I'll need to do some tidying up first.

generic.en: I don't think so, dear.
generic.trans: 我不这么认为，亲爱的。

spidernohat.en: There simply isn't enough room for that.

abigailheart.en: Her spirit is already bound to something in this world.
abigailheart.trans: 她的灵魂已经附在世上什么东西上。

notsculptable.en: No one ought to sculpt with that, dear.
notsculptable.trans: 没有人应该用那东西来雕刻，亲爱的。

notstaff.en: This is not the staff I seek.

nomoonincaves.en: The moon can't be affected from this subterranean location.
nomoonincaves.trans: 这个地下位置影响不到月亮。

toomanybees.en: That would be a rather excessive amount of bees, dear.
toomanybees.trans: 那样就太多蜜蜂了，亲爱的。

birdsblocked.en: Of course, the force field applies to the birds too.
birdsblocked.trans: 力场自然对鸟类同样有效。

notentacleground.en: The tentacles would be unable to break the surface here.
notentacleground.trans: 触手无法突破这里的地表。

generic.en: Other matters await.
generic.trans: 还有其他事在等着。

toomanybirds.en: It doesn't work as well with this many birds around.
toomanybirds.trans: 地上鸟太多了，魔法没那么有效。

nobirds.en: The birds are not keen on this weather.

nohorticulture.en: There are no crops to cultivate.

nosilviculture.en: There are no arboreal subjects to focus on.
nosilviculture.trans: 没有可聚焦的树栖主体。

nofires.en: Thankfully, there are no fires to put out.
nofires.trans: 所幸没有需要扑灭的明火。

nowaternearby.en: Fish may only be summoned in close proximity to a body of water.
nowaternearby.trans: 鱼类只能在水体附近被召唤出来。

alreadyfullmoon.en: I'm afraid that would be quite redundant.

nosleeptargets.en: I don't see anyone in need of a bedtime story.
nosleeptargets.trans: 我没看到谁需要睡前故事。

deadbirds.en: Oh, dear. I'm afraid the sky is not safe for birds right now.
deadbirds.trans: 噢，天啊。恐怕天空现在对鸟类来说已经不安全了。

waytoomanybirds.en: The sky is out of birds for now.
waytoomanybirds.trans: 现在天上一只鸟都没有了。

hashat.en: I can't put it on top of the hat.
hashat.trans: 我不能把它放在帽子上。

inuse.en: There's obviously someone decorating it now.
inuse.trans: 显然现在有人正在装饰它。

melting.en: There's no use decorating a snowman that's about to melt.
melting.trans: 装饰一个快融化的雪人就是做无用功。

stackedtoohigh.en: It's simply too tall for another.

nospace.en: There's clearly someone sitting there already.
nospace.trans: 显然已经有人坐在那儿了。

targetincombat.en: It would be ill-advised to approach that scuffle.
targetincombat.trans: 靠近那场混战可不是个好主意。

inuse.en: Patience is required. I can ride this beefalo later.
inuse.trans: 需要耐心。我可以等会儿再骑这头皮弗娄牛。

sleeping.en: Up now, I require your services.
sleeping.trans: 现在醒来吧，我需要你的服务。

alreadyknown.en: I've already familiarized myself with this particular pattern.
alreadyknown.trans: 我已经熟悉了这个样式了。

nohealth.en: I'm feeling too ill for that.
nohealth.trans: 对于那个，我感觉很不妙。

generic.en: only_used_by_walter
generic.trans: only_used_by_walter

burning.en: No more changes for me. It's gone up in flames.
burning.trans: 再没办法换衣服了。它已经着火了。

nooccupant.en: This station requires a beefalo to be securely hitched before I can proceed any further.
nooccupant.trans: 在我进行别的操作之前，这个美妆台需要牢牢的栓上一头皮弗娄牛。

inuse.en: If I could use that after you, dear.
inuse.trans: 但愿我可以在你之后使用那个，亲爱的。

notenoughhair.en: Perhaps once the hair has regrown.
notenoughhair.trans: 也许要等毛发重新长回来。

generic.en: I think I look pretty smart already.
generic.trans: 我觉得我看上去已经够聪明了。

too_late.en: Oh dear, I wasn't quite fast enough.

nocarnival.en: How disappointing, the corvids seem to have migrated elsewhere.
nocarnival.trans: 多么令人失望啊，这些鸟类似乎已经迁移到其他地方了。

mannequin_equipswapfailed.en: That does not belong on a mannequin.
mannequin_equipswapfailed.trans: 那个不适合放在假人上。

pillowfight_no_handpillow.en: I will require a pillow to participate.
pillowfight_no_handpillow.trans: 我需要有个枕头才能参加。

notmybernie.en: This monstrous animated teddy bear is loyal only to our dear Willow.
notmybernie.trans: 这头可怕的活泰迪熊只忠于我们亲爱的薇洛。

notmerm.en: It seems that piscean bipeds only heed the call of their own kind.
notmerm.trans: 看来那些双足动物只听令于他们的族人。

empty_catcoonden.en: Unfortunately, it appears the kittens are not present.
empty_catcoonden.trans: 不幸的是，小猫似乎并不在现场。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.en: I believe there are not enough locations for the kittens to hide.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.trans: 我测算过，没有足够的位置让小猫藏身。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.en: It would seem the seekers outnumber the kittens.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.trans: 找人的玩家超过了小猫的数量。

carnival_host_here.en: I believe I saw our host somewhere in this direction.
carnival_host_here.trans: 我很确定在这个方向上看到了主持人。

hostbusy.en: He seems to be attending to other matters at the moment.
hostbusy.trans: 他此刻似乎在处理其他事务。

kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.en: I believe I should take some time to rest.
kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.trans: 我应该花些时间来休息了。

noresponse.en: It appears he has gone for a constitutional.

alreadyactive.en: I imagine there must be a competition going on elsewhere.
alreadyactive.trans: 我猜想其他地方一定还有个比赛。

doesntwork.en: The contest will have to wait for the time being.

professionalchef.en: It would be rude of me to tamper with it.

shadowmagic.en: I'm not letting THAT in MY library!
shadowmagic.trans: 我不会让那个出现在我的图书馆！

toodeep.en: Those fish are far too deep.

wrongpiece.en: That is clearly the incorrect piece.
wrongpiece.trans: 那明显不是正确的棋子。

wronggear.en: I don't require this for some simple pond fishing.
wronggear.trans: 池塘垂钓这种小事用不着这个。

quagmire_wrongkey.en: I'll have to find the right key.
quagmire_wrongkey.trans: 我必须找到正确的钥匙。

klaus.en: The beast must first be defeated.
klaus.trans: 首先必须打败那头野兽。

wrongkey.en: That may have been the wrong implement.

empty.en: I have to know what to wrap, dear.
empty.trans: 我必须知道要打包什么，亲爱的。

generic.en: I'm already quite knowledgeable about this particular species.
generic.trans: 我对这个特殊的物种已经很了解了。

fertilizer.en: I've gleaned as much information as I can.
fertilizer.trans: 我已经收集了尽可能多的信息。

duplicate.en: We've already taken note of this recipe.
duplicate.trans: 我们已经记下了这个菜谱。

not_merm.en: This concoction is used by the merms for healing.
not_merm.trans: 鱼人使用这种混合物进行治疗。

busy.en: I'll try again when they're free.

sleeping.en: They've entered REM sleep. No need to disturb them.
sleeping.trans: 它们进入了快速眼动睡眠。不要打扰它们。

full.trans: 它们已经载太多东西了。

glassed.en: The surface of the spring has crystallized, unfortunately.
glassed.trans: 很不幸，泉水表面结晶了。

someoneelsesbeefalo.en: It's not my place to shave someone else's beefalo.
someoneelsesbeefalo.trans: 我去薅别人皮弗娄牛的毛不是很合适。

awakebeefalo.en: I think he might object to that.

generic.en: I would really rather not.
generic.trans: 我真的不想这么做。

out_of_water.en: Oh dear, I'll have to replenish my water supply.
out_of_water.trans: 哦，亲爱的，我必须补充我的水供应了。

webberonly.en: I'm afraid this isn't my area of expertise.
webberonly.trans: 恐怕这并非我的专业领域。

doer_isnt_module_owner.en: As I thought, I'm unable to glean any information from it.
doer_isnt_module_owner.trans: 如我所想，我无法从中收集到任何信息。

toofar.en: It is not within my reach.

generic.en: Perhaps later. Not all old ladies enjoy cooking, you know.
generic.trans: 恐怕得过会儿。要知道，不是所有老太太都喜欢烹饪的。

messagebottlemanager_not_found.en: It's much too dark to make any sense of this.
messagebottlemanager_not_found.trans: 太黑了，看不清写了些什么。

known.en: Please. That knowledge is child's play.
known.trans: 拜托，这些知识简直太小儿科了。

wrongworld.en: This map is for some other location.
wrongworld.trans: 这张地图是用在其他地点的。

stash_map_not_found.en: The apes seem to have neglected to mark any particular sites on this map.
stash_map_not_found.trans: 猿猴们忽略了应该在这张地图上做标记。

cantlearn.en: A piece of knowledge I cannot grasp... Intriguing!
cantlearn.trans: 一条我领悟不了的知识...有趣！

1.en: There must be a trick to this.

2.en: Oh, you finicky thing!
2.trans: 啊，真是个麻烦的事情啊！

3.en: Come along now, no need to be stubborn.
3.trans: 配合点吧，不需要这么固执吧。

1.en: Oh my, I seem to have gotten a bit mixed up.
1.trans: 哦，我的天啊，我好像弄混了。

2.en: My glasses need a good cleaning, that's clearly not my Daucus carota rattus!
2.trans: 我得好好擦擦眼镜了，那显然不是我的伞形胡萝卜属野胡萝卜！

full_of_curses.en: I think it would be best to leave it be.

restriction.en: That's not my area of expertise.

noimage.en: An example of what I should diagram would be helpful.
noimage.trans: 一个教我如何用图表示的例子会很有用。

restricted.en: It's not for me, I'm afraid.

inuse.en: I do hope you're keeping organized, my dear.
inuse.trans: 我真希望你保持有条理，亲爱的。

notmasterchef.en: It would be rude of me to tamper with it.

generic.en: It's full to the brim, I'm afraid.
generic.trans: 恐怕它已经装满了。

notempty.en: I'll have to remove its contents first.
notempty.trans: 我得先把里面的东西去掉。

cooking.en: I'm afraid I'll have to wait until it's finished cooking.
cooking.trans: 恐怕要等它煮好了才行。

haspet.en: One domestic creature is enough for me.
haspet.trans: 对我来说，一只家养动物就够了。

ticoon.en: Having two trackers at once could possibly confuse them.
ticoon.trans: 同时拥有两个追踪者可能会使它们感到困惑。

mounted.en: In this elevated position, I can't reach the ground.
mounted.trans: 我无法在上升位置碰到地面。

bad_timing1.trans: 我会坚韧不拔的试下去。

bad_timing2.en: Oh dear, I'll have to start over.
bad_timing2.trans: 哦，天啊，我得从头来过了。

beef_bell_has_beef_already.en: I don't require any more beefalo.
beef_bell_has_beef_already.trans: 我不需要更多的皮弗娄牛了。

not_mine.en: It does not belong to me.

beef_bell_already_used.en: It's already formed a bond with someone else, dear.
beef_bell_already_used.trans: 它已经和别人建立了联系，亲爱的。

already_marked.en: I'm fairly confident in my selection.
already_marked.trans: 我对自己的选择十分自信。

not_participant.en: I'll have to observe for now.

samedish.en: It's already on the proper dinnerware.
samedish.trans: 它已经装在合适的餐具中了。

mismatch.en: That's not the proper dinnerware for this food.
mismatch.trans: 它不是盛放这种食物的餐具。

announce_nohungersleep.en: I can barely sleep even when I'm not starving!
announce_nohungersleep.trans: 即使一点都不饿，我也几乎睡不着觉！

announce_nonightsiesta_cave.en: I couldn't possibly relax in these caves.
announce_nonightsiesta_cave.trans: 在这些洞穴中，我完全没法放松。

announce_snowball_too_big.en: It has reached its full size.
announce_snowball_too_big.trans: 它已经达到最大尺寸了。

announce_carrat_error_fell_asleep.en: The subject seems to be exhibiting low levels of stamina.
announce_carrat_error_fell_asleep.trans: 对象的耐力水平似乎偏低。

describe_plantstressorkilljoys.en: I'll have to remove some of those troublesome weeds.
describe_plantstressorkilljoys.trans: 我得清除一些麻烦的杂草。

announce_worms_boss.trans: 某种可怕的东西正在逼近。

announce_nonightsiesta.en: I can't sleep, no matter where I lie down.
announce_nonightsiesta.trans: 无论躺在哪儿，我就是睡不着。

announce_snared_ivy.en: Goodness, my garden seems to have quite an aggressive weed problem.
announce_snared_ivy.trans: 天啊，我的花园似乎有一个相当严重的杂草问题。

announce_fertilizer_researched.en: Even with my considerable gardening experience, there's always something new to learn.
announce_fertilizer_researched.trans: 即使我有相当丰富的园艺经验，也总有新的东西要学。

2.en: I do not appreciate the tardiness of these fish.
2.trans: 这些鱼拖拖拉拉，我不喜欢。

3.en: Perhaps if I tried a different lure...
3.trans: 我或许该换个鱼饵试试……

4.en: I wonder if I could get some reading done while I wait.
4.trans: 等待的时候是不是可以看看书。

announce_hunt_successful_fork.en: It seems I've managed to track the creature without alerting it.
announce_hunt_successful_fork.trans: 看来我成功跟踪了这生物，它并没有产生警觉。

anounce_mutated_bird_attack.trans: 变异禽类正在发动攻击。

announce_detach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: I can only work tirelessly for so long.
announce_detach_buff_workeffectiveness.trans: 我只能不知疲倦的工作一小段时间。

announce_cozy_sleep.en: I suppose it was worth a try.

announce_mega_flare_seen.en: Oh my. Someone is looking to initiate a conflict.
announce_mega_flare_seen.trans: 哦，天哪。有人想挑起冲突。

quagmire_announce_win.en: We best be on our way. Ta!
quagmire_announce_win.trans: 我们最好要继续前进。迈步！

announce_rabbitking_aggressive.en: Some form of creature is aggressively tunneling in the subterrain.
announce_rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 某种生物正在地下积极地挖隧道。

announce_weak_rat.en: I'm afraid it's in no condition to race.
announce_weak_rat.trans: 恐怕它的状态不适合赛跑。

announce_nosleeponfire.en: Even if I could sleep, these temperatures are highly unsafe.
announce_nosleeponfire.trans: 即使我能够睡着，这么高的温度也是极不安全的。

quagmire_announce_notrecipe.en: That was not a viable recipe.

describe_plantstressorovercrowding.en: The density of plants should be reduced to avoid competition for nutrients.
describe_plantstressorovercrowding.trans: 应降低植物的密度，避免争夺养分。

announce_lowresearch.en: Not a great resource, but there were useful bits.
announce_lowresearch.trans: 虽然不是什么很好的资源，但好歹是些有用的小东西。

yotb_post.en: This is where the beefalo are to be displayed for judging.
yotb_post.trans: 皮弗娄牛就在这里展示给评委们看。

deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.en: It should be a simple matter to construct it.

gnarwail_horn.en: A gnarwail's "horn" is actually a tooth, you know.
gnarwail_horn.trans: 一角鲸的"角"其实是它的牙齿，知道吧。

generic.en: A bit unconventional, but an effective irrigation tool nevertheless.
generic.trans: 虽然有点不寻常，但不失为一种有效的灌溉工具。

empty.en: I'll have to fill it with water before it's usable.
empty.trans: 我得把它装满水才能用。

quagmire_casseroledish.en: I do love a good casserole.
quagmire_casseroledish.trans: 我确实喜欢好吃的炖菜。

held.en: It is a cute widdle horned Lagomorph.
held.trans: 拥有可爱小角的兔类动物。

generic.en: It's some kind of Lagomorph. With horns.
generic.trans: 它是某种兔类动物。带角的那种。

cozy_bunnyman.trans: 他们看起来很舒服的样子。

quagmire_lamp_post.en: What is it powered by, I wonder?
quagmire_lamp_post.trans: 我想知道，它的能量来源是什么？

leif_idol.en: I believe it requires the application of a flame.
leif_idol.trans: 我相信这里需要用到火焰。

beetletaur.en: That lock must be heavy on its snout.
beetletaur.trans: 它鼻子上的那把锁肯定很重。

twinofterror2.en: How curious, I wonder who might have constructed such a thing?
twinofterror2.trans: 真奇怪，不知道是谁造出来的？

wortox_nabbag.en: I hope he won't take after that nasty Krampus.
wortox_nabbag.trans: 他可千万别跟那个讨厌的坎普斯学坏。

twinofterror1.en: How curious, I wonder who might have constructed such a thing?
twinofterror1.trans: 真奇怪，不知道是谁造出来的？

chesspiece_anchor.en: Artists tend to reference what they're familiar with.
chesspiece_anchor.trans: 艺术家就喜欢引用他们熟悉的事物。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.en: Its effect appears to be stronger at dusk.
oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.trans: 它在黄昏时能更好的发挥效用。

slurtle.trans: 吞食矿物的腹足类动物。

frognewton.en: It has quite a unique flavor.

moose.trans: 我称它为驼鹿属加拿大黑雁。

dragon_scales.en: Scales from an insect? Unheard of!
dragon_scales.trans: 昆虫身上的鳞片？真是前所未闻！

reviver.en: This provides a corporeal anchor for the ectoplasmic configuration.
reviver.trans: 这种设备可以为灵质结构提供一个物质锚点。

boat_magnet_kit.en: I will have to speak with him about the run-on sentences in his directions later.
boat_magnet_kit.trans: 我以后要和他谈谈他在说明书的写作中一逗到底的问题。

trinket_9.en: What a coincidence. My cardigan is missing a button!
trinket_9.trans: 好巧。我的羊毛衫正缺了个纽扣！

trinket_8.en: It reminds me of my bathtub. I could use a long soak.
trinket_8.trans: 它让我想起了我的浴缸。我可以在浴缸里想泡多久就泡多久。

trinket_7.en: I think I'll keep this. I know someone who might like it.
trinket_7.trans: 我会保留这个。我认识某个喜欢这个的人。

trinket_6.en: I do hope WX-78 is feeling alright.

ghost.en: If you cross your ghosteyes they'll get stuck like that, dear.
ghost.trans: 亲爱的，要是你和鬼魂的眼神相会，它们会像那样被困住。

firestarter.en: What have I said about lighting fires, dear?
firestarter.trans: 亲爱，我在点火这事说什么了吗？

murderer.en: You WILL respect your elders, %s!
murderer.trans: %s，你要尊重长者！

attacker.en: You like to test boundaries, don't you dear?
attacker.trans: 亲爱的，你喜欢试探底线，不是吗？

reviver.en: You're doing so well, %s.

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.en: This strengthens the wearer's restorative magicks.
lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.trans: 戴着它可以增强恢复力。

trinket_5.en: This spacecraft looks to have inadequate thermal controls.
trinket_5.trans: 这个迷你火箭飞船看起来没有足够的热控制。

trinket_4.en: What a positively, delightfully odd little fellow.
trinket_4.trans: 乐观快乐但又古里古怪的小家伙。

trinket_3.en: Oh, I just love the bard.
trinket_3.trans: 哦，我真是太喜欢莎士比亚了。

eating_corpse.en: This is how it spreads the... infection.
eating_corpse.trans: 这就是它传播……感染的方式。

generic.en: Though reanimated, the creature remains an eater of the dead.
generic.trans: 虽然被复活了，但它食腐的习性依然没变。

trinket_1.en: What a lovely set of bottle washers! Too bad they're all melted.
trinket_1.trans: 好可爱的饮料瓶封口玻璃珠！可惜全部熔化了。

calm.en: The levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be at their lowest.
calm.trans: 灵质残渣的能量水平似乎已经达到了最低。

warn.en: There are low, but increasing levels of vapors containing ectoplasmic residue.
warn.trans: 虽然灵质残渣的能量水平现在很低，但它正在不断升高。

waning.en: Levels of ectoplasmic residue are high but seem to be decreasing.
waning.trans: 灵质残渣的能量水平很高，但似乎在逐渐降低。

nomagic.en: There doesn't seem to be any ectoplasmic vapor around here.
nomagic.trans: 这附近似乎没有任何灵质的东西。

dawn.en: There is very little ectoplasmic residue vapor.
dawn.trans: 灵质残渣的能量水平微乎其微。

waxing.en: Levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be increasing.
waxing.trans: 灵质残渣的能量水平似乎越来越高了。

steady.en: The levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be at their peak.
steady.trans: 灵质残渣的能量水平似乎已经达到了峰值。

minisign_item.trans: 终于，一个合适的组织工具。

asparagus.en: A great source of dietary fiber.

fruitfly.en: Those pests are making quite the nuisance of themselves.

open.en: Maybe I should go back up for some fresh air.
open.trans: 也许我应该上去呼吸一点新鲜空气。

generic.en: Perhaps later.
generic.trans: 可能要过会儿。

full.en: With all those people? It's bound to be cacophony.
full.trans: 和所有那些人一起？这肯定不和谐。

tree_rock_seed.en: The seed of the great Boulderbough.

halloweenpotion_moon.en: It seems to catalyze a mutation.

beargervest.en: Whatever it was, its pelt makes for a fine garment.
beargervest.trans: 不管它以前是什么动物，它的毛皮倒是一件很不错的衣服。

wereitem_moose.en: Someone's going to trip on this, dear.
wereitem_moose.trans: 亲爱的，有人会不小心绊倒的。

rabbitkinghorn_chest.en: The rabbits will keep my things safe.
rabbitkinghorn_chest.trans: 兔子会保护我的物品的安全。

mandrake_active.en: Mandragora officinarum. But with a face.
mandrake_active.trans: 曼德拉草。但是长着一张脸。

ipecacsyrup.en: Ingesting it would be detrimental to one's health.
ipecacsyrup.trans: 摄入它对人体健康有害。

burnt.en: It's neither rotting nor fermenting now.
burnt.trans: 这下它既不会腐烂也不会发酵了。

generic.en: I'm uncertain whether it is rotting or fermenting.
generic.trans: 我不确定它是腐烂了还是发酵了。

boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.en: We must determine the best spot to start and finish the race.
boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.trans: 我们必须确定开始和结束比赛的最佳位置。

rat.en: The little dear is working so hard.
rat.trans: 小可爱正在全力以赴的训练。

generic.en: The repeated jumping should help build the creature's stamina.
generic.trans: 重复的跳跃应该能够提高生物的耐力。

burnt.en: I'm afraid it won't be of much use to anyone now.
burnt.trans: 恐怕它对任何人都没什么大用处了。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: I'd best make sure I have enough to reach the finish line.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.trans: 我要清点一下，要足够到终点线才行。

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.en: It passes the universal edibility test.
quagmire_spotspice_sprig.trans: 它通过了通用的可食用测试。

leif.trans: 我...甚至不知道有这种东西存在。

pigtorch.trans: 我很好奇它是靠什么提供燃料的。

boatrace_primemate.en: A shadowy opponent to keep things interesting.
boatrace_primemate.trans: 暗影对手的加入让事情变得有趣了起来。

book_research_station.en: It took some effort to distill everything down into a single volume.
book_research_station.trans: 书中的内容是对现实世界的高度提炼。

beef_bell.en: Something about its tone triggers an affectionate response in beefalo.
beef_bell.trans: 它的某种音色会引起皮弗娄牛的好感。

mask_ancient_handmaidhat.en: The visage of this mask denotes the elevated stature of its former bearer.
mask_ancient_handmaidhat.trans: 此面具的面容表明其前主人地位崇高。

haunted_ground.en: Does it expect something of me?
haunted_ground.trans: 它想从我这得到点什么吗？

medium.trans: 它发出一种奇怪的能量。

level1.trans: 它发出一种奇怪的能量。

level3.en: Its magic has reached maximum potency.
level3.trans: 它的魔法已经达到了最大的力量。

generic.en: Ah... I'm not familiar with this strain of flower.
generic.trans: 啊哈…… 我不熟悉这类花。

haunted_pocket.en: I feel I should set it down now.

soon.en: The flower's energy is growing powerful.

level2.en: That flower has perked up quite a bit.

foliage.en: These may have some nutritional value.
foliage.trans: 这些东西也许有点营养价值。

kitcoon_desert.en: They possess large ears to facilitate hunting small desert critters.
kitcoon_desert.trans: 它们演化出了大耳朵，便于猎取沙漠中的小动物。

ghost.en: I'll fetch you a nice colored bandage once you're revived.
ghost.trans: 你一复活，我就会拿颜色漂亮的绷带给你。

firestarter.en: Who gave you matches, %s?
firestarter.trans: 谁给了你火柴，%s！

murderer.en: Someone needs to teach you some manners, %s!
murderer.trans: 你需要有人好好教教你礼仪了，%s！

attacker.en: That's enough funny business, young arachnid.

reviver.en: You're a sweet boy, %s.

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

pitchfork.en: Its design is effective at loosening earth.
pitchfork.trans: 它的设计很适合用来松土。

chesspiece_catcoon.en: The resemblance to the Felis lybica is incredible.
chesspiece_catcoon.trans: 与亚非野猫的相似程度令人称奇。

yotd_steeringwheel_item.en: A necessity should we want to steer our boat.

wintersfeastfuel.en: It reminds me of reading holiday stories by the fire.
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 让我想起了坐在壁炉旁阅读假日故事的时间。

slingshotammo_gold.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_gold.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

active.en: The bezoar's magic has been activated.
active.trans: 牛黄的魔法已经被激活了。

generic.en: A bezoar formed in the gut of a large beast.
generic.trans: 在大型野兽内脏中形成的牛黄。

has_item.en: Perfect for enjoying a cup of tea and a good book.

generic.en: Perfect for enjoying a cup of tea and a good book.
generic.trans: 非常适合品茶读书。

quagmire_rubble_clocktower.en: The clockwork has seized as well.

sitting.en: Something devious is lurking in the shadows.
sitting.trans: 某些不光明的东西正在暗影中潜行。

oceanfishingbobber_oval.en: The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496.
oceanfishingbobber_oval.trans: 人类有记载的首次使用钓鱼浮漂是在1496年。

skeleton.en: An incredibly well preserved human skeleton.
skeleton.trans: 一具保存得相当好的骷髅。

hermitcrab.en: My, she is a bit rude, isn't she?
hermitcrab.trans: 天呀，她有点粗鲁，不是吗？

carnivalcannon_kit.en: Let's just put it somewhere far away from the encampment.
carnivalcannon_kit.trans: 我们就把它放在离营地很远的地方吧。

chesspiece_hornucopia.en: It is a commonly held belief that art imitates life.
chesspiece_hornucopia.trans: 目前普遍认为艺术是来源于生活的。

shroomcake.en: I don't believe that qualifies as a "cake" dear.
shroomcake.trans: 我不认为那东西可以当成是“蛋糕”，亲爱的。

potato_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
potato_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: Oh dear, it's empty. I'll try again later.
hermitcrab_relocation_kit.trans: 天啊，是空的。我晚点再试试。

battlesong_instant_taunt.en: Oh my, those are some rather colorful turns of phrase.
battlesong_instant_taunt.trans: 哦，我的天，这些都是一些相当丰富多彩的语汇。

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: It has a most curious light source.
carnivaldecor_lamp.trans: 它有一个最令人好奇的光源。

halloweencandy_12.en: The candy itself is quite pleasant, if unappealing in appearance.
halloweencandy_12.trans: 这块糖果虽然不好看，但味道是不错的。

halloweencandy_13.en: There will be some sore jaws in the morning, I imagine.
halloweencandy_13.trans: 我可以想象，明早下巴会很疼的。

halloweencandy_14.en: A delightful ten on the Scoville scale.
halloweencandy_14.trans: 辣度在斯科维尔指标中稳稳地拿到10级。

goldenshovel.en: The most malleable of metals, but let's see how this digs.
goldenshovel.trans: 黄金是最具可塑性的金属，不过我们还是先看看它挖掘的效果吧。

plantmeat_cooked.en: This looks much safer for consumption.
plantmeat_cooked.trans: 这看起来吃起来安全多了。

palmcone_scale.en: A segment of the tree's natural armor.
palmcone_scale.trans: 树木天然盔甲的一部分。

target_too_far_away.en: The kittens are far enough away to hide their smell.
target_too_far_away.trans: 小猫离得很远，足以隐藏它们的气味。

tracking_not_mine.en: He is guiding someone else to a kitten's hiding spot.
tracking_not_mine.trans: 他正在引导别人去小猫的藏身处。

success.en: He encountered one of the kittens.
success.trans: 他遇到了其中一只小猫。

lost_track.en: The kitten was found before we arrived.
lost_track.trans: 这只小猫在我们到达之前就被发现了。

nothing_to_track.en: There is no clear evidence left to point us towards the kitten.
nothing_to_track.trans: 没有任何明确的证据能让我们找到小猫。

abandoned.en: He has left me to procure the kittens alone.
abandoned.trans: 他丢下我一个人去寻找小猫。

nearby.trans: 我相信我们已经很接近了。

tracking.en: He is guiding me to a kitten's hiding spot.
tracking.trans: 他正在引导我去一只小猫的藏身处。

generic.en: Quite a wise feline.
generic.trans: 异常睿智的猫科动物。

feather_crow.trans: 乌鸦科还是海雀科的羽毛？

generic.en: A special representation of wildcats.
generic.trans: 野猫的特别代表。

burnt.en: The fire was overwhelming.
burnt.trans: 那场火太大了，没及时扑灭。

empty.en: A golden offering is necessary.
empty.trans: 献上金色的供品是必要的。

halloweencandy_11.en: I fear I've a terrible weakness for a spot of chocolate.
halloweencandy_11.trans: 只这巧克力就让我无法抵抗，可以说是我的短板了。

mask_dollrepairedhat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_dollrepairedhat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

redmooneye.en: The red lens will mark this position.
redmooneye.trans: 红色月眼会标记这个位置。

lordfruitfly.en: I have no patience for garden pests!
lordfruitfly.trans: 我对花园里的害虫可没有耐心!

wereitem_beaver.en: It appears to induce a Castorthropic state.

boat_rotator.en: It allows me to rotate the deck, while maintaining our heading.
boat_rotator.trans: 它让我能在旋转甲板的同时保持我们的方向。

wrong_tile.en: This may not be a suitable environment for it.
wrong_tile.trans: 这里的环境可能并不适合它。

wrong_season.en: Perhaps this is not the right time of year for it to thrive.
wrong_season.trans: 也许现在不是它茁壮成长的好时节。

generic.en: It appears to be growing nicely.
generic.trans: 它似乎长得很好。

spear_wathgrithr_lightning.en: An electrically conductive spear! How intriguing.
spear_wathgrithr_lightning.trans: 一根导电的长矛！真迷人。

generic.en: Plant and animal have merged into one in this specimen.
generic.trans: 动植物在这个标本中融为了一体。

rope.en: A short length of strong hemp rope.

wx78module_movespeed2.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

wx78module_light.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_light.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

hedgehound.en: Ah. That would explain the respiration.
hedgehound.trans: 啊。这就解释了它为什么会呼吸。

out.en: It appears my reading light has run out.
It appears my reading light has run out.

petals_evil.en: Interesting. These petals seem to have a mind of their own.
petals_evil.trans: 有意思，这些花瓣似乎有自己的思想。

fishmeat_dried.trans: 虽然有点咸，但还是很令人满意。

pumpkincarver.en: I have carved many pumpkins in my day, and I was quite skilled.
pumpkincarver.trans: 我年轻的时候也刻过不少南瓜，那时我手艺挺不错的。

diseasing.en: Hm, I see browning at the leaves' edges.
diseasing.trans: 嗯，我看到叶子边上发黄了。

burning.en: Tsk. Such a waste of resources.

picked.en: A bush that grew from the lunar soil.

diseased.en: I fear it has contracted a disease.

withered.en: These are not ideal conditions for this species.
withered.trans: 不具备这种植物成长所需的理想环境。

generic.en: Surely that can't be fruit.
generic.trans: 那肯定不是水果。

barren.en: It is past the reproduction phase of its life cycle.
barren.trans: 已经过了生命周期中的生育阶段。

meatysalad.en: It contains quite a bit of protein for a salad.
meatysalad.trans: 尽管是沙拉，但是它还有不少蛋白质。

escaped.en: Oh dear, it looks like my catch escaped before I could return.
escaped.trans: 噢，天啊。没等我回来我的鱼就跑了。

generic.en: This will make collecting fish much more expedient.
generic.trans: 这将使收集鱼类变得更加便利。

antlionhat.trans: 有了它造景就方便多了。

lavaarena_armorheavy.en: I'll leave that to one of the younger folks.
lavaarena_armorheavy.trans: 我还是把那个留给年轻人吧。

generic.en: A large macrolecithal egg.
generic.trans: 一个大的多黄蛋。

picked.en: It requires hydration before it can fruit again.
picked.trans: 它需要经过水合作用才能再次结果。

inground.en: It is dormant this time of day.
inground.trans: 每天这个时候它会休眠。

generic.en: It is a fungus.
generic.trans: 它是一种菌类植物。

blue_cap.en: This seems to have medicinal properties.

wetgoop.en: Oh no. No, no, no. This won't do at all.

monkeyisland_portal.en: It appears to be leaking into this world.
monkeyisland_portal.trans: 它似乎正在渗入这个世界。

yots_lantern_post_item.en: One of those whippersnappers should find themselves useful and construct this.
yots_lantern_post_item.trans: 应该找个小年轻来做好这个，让他们证明自己有用。

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

drying_notmeat.trans: 脱水是一个缓慢的过程。

drying.trans: 脱水是一个缓慢的过程。

done_salt.en: The salt is a bi-product of the dehydration process for certain things obtained from the sea.
done_salt.trans: 这些盐是某些海产脱水过程中的副产品。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 下雨让脱水过程暂停了。

dryinginrain.en: The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.
dryinginrain.trans: 下雨让脱水过程暂停了。

burnt.en: It doesn't seem stable.

generic.en: This drying rack has a larger capacity.
generic.trans: 这个晾肉架容量更大。

umbrella.en: A simple apparatus for keeping dry.
umbrella.trans: 用来保持干燥的简易装备。

adventure_portal.en: That violates some pretty fundamental physical laws.
adventure_portal.trans: 那违反了一些最基本的物理定律。

noeyeball.en: It is rendered useless without the eye of that beast.
noeyeball.trans: 没有那只野兽的眼睛，它就变得毫无用处。

generic.en: An implement that conditions the air, or ambient-temperature-reduction-device for short.
generic.trans: 调节空气的工具，简称环境温度降低装置。

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: I'm always in need of a good reading light.
mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 我特别欣赏一盏好的阅读灯。

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: A crude attempt at tricking me.

quagmire_pot.en: A larger pot takes longer to boil.
quagmire_pot.trans: 大锅要久一点才能煮沸。

ocean_trawler_kit.en: It's just a simple matter of assembling the pieces.
ocean_trawler_kit.trans: 这只是一个简单的组装作业。

saltrock.en: It's growing in a curiously geometric formation.
saltrock.trans: 它在以一种奇异的几何样式增长。

starving.en: Without sustenance, it will surely perish.
starving.trans: 没有食物，它肯定会死的。

generic.en: A rather diminutive specimen of the class Aves.
generic.trans: 鸟类中身材矮小的品种。

mask_blacksmithhat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_blacksmithhat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

wx78module_movespeed.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

yotd_anchor.en: One of the more curious uses for gold I've seen yet.
yotd_anchor.trans: 这是我见过的最奇特的一种对黄金的运用。

salty_dog.en: I'm more of a cat person.

spear_gungnir.en: I fear I'll not be much use with that.
spear_gungnir.trans: 恐怕那个对我没多大用处。

forgetmelots.en: This strain can be used to brew a rather pleasant herbal tea.
forgetmelots.trans: 这种作物可以用来冲泡相当愉快的草药茶。

spice_chili.en: I'm not a fan of spicy food.

generic.en: Eager minds should always have access to a library.
generic.trans: 求知如渴的头脑应当永远有机会去图书馆博览群书。

burnt.en: Few things are as saddening as the sight of destroyed books.
burnt.trans: 世上多少惨剧也比不上亲眼看到书籍被毁。

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: It would be wise to equip the boat with a protective barrier.
boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 在船上配备保护屏障是明智之举。

dumbbell_heat.en: An interesting combination of exercise and temperature regulation.
dumbbell_heat.trans: 运动和温度调节的有趣结合。

slingshot_frame_gems.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

kitcoon_moon.en: A feline? From the moon? Quite fascinating...
kitcoon_moon.trans: 猫科动物？而且来自月球？相当令人着迷……

pudgy.en: Abundant nourishment has led to an amicable personality.
pudgy.trans: 营养充足有助于形成友好的性格。

ornery.en: The creature has developed a nasty disposition.
ornery.trans: 那个生物已经形成令人讨厌的性格。

mypartner.en: It has become rather attached to me.
mypartner.trans: 它变得对我十分依赖了。

follower.en: It appears to be following me.

dead_mypartner.en: There may yet be a way to revive it...
dead_mypartner.trans: 或许还有办法让它复活……

domesticated.en: While tame, it has become dependent on its human master.
domesticated.trans: 驯服的时候，它已经独立于自己的主人。

rider.en: This one seems lean and athletic.
rider.trans: 这个家伙既纤细又健硕。

generic.en: It looks almost like a Bos Taurus.
generic.trans: 它看起来和家牛好像。

quagmire_oven.en: It is best suited to baking sweets.
quagmire_oven.trans: 它最适合用来制作甜品了。

playing.en: This appears to trigger the firing mechanism.
playing.trans: 这似乎能触发射击机制。

generic.en: I believe it requires a form of currency to start.
generic.trans: 我相信它需要用某种货币来启动。

coolant.en: The fluids exhibit anomalous properties, no doubt catalyzed by the mutations.
coolant.trans: 这种流体呈现出异常特性，毫无疑问，是收到了突变的催化作用。

wetpouch.trans: 或许里面有什么有用的东西？

bird_mutant_spitter.en: The poor thing appears to have been altered by unnatural means.
bird_mutant_spitter.trans: 这可怜的东西似乎被非自然手段改变了。

powder_monkey.en: Such deplorable manners! You need a good talking to!
powder_monkey.trans: 你的行为令人发指！得好好找人管教管教！

dustmoth.en: I would have been quite pleased to have one helping me in the library.
dustmoth.trans: 如果它能帮我打理图书馆，我会很高兴的。

greenstaff.en: It appears to rewind time on an object.
greenstaff.trans: 似乎能让物体回到过去的样子。

blueprint.en: There is something at the top.

generic.en: The danger far outweighs the possibility of discovering anything of value.
generic.trans: 风险远远大于发现任何有价值东西的可能性。

pumpkin_cooked.en: Cooked Cucurbita pepo. Gooey and delicious.
pumpkin_cooked.trans: 烤南瓜。又软又甜，很好吃。

voltgoatjelly.en: His ingenuity with limited materials is very impressive.
voltgoatjelly.trans: 有限的材料缺做出此等美味，着实令人刮目相看。

costume_fool_body.en: It appears to be a theatrical costume.

generic.en: An excellent hollow for a den.
generic.trans: 适合做窝的中空树桩。

empty.en: Looks used up.
empty.trans: 看来是耗竭了。

battlesong_sanitygain.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_sanitygain.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

wathgrithr_improvedhat.en: An even further departure from historical accuracy, I'm afraid.
wathgrithr_improvedhat.trans: 这恐怕更加偏离了史料的准确性。

vault_lobby_exit.en: This must indeed be the point of egress from these chambers.
vault_lobby_exit.trans: 这确实应该是一个出口。

greengem.en: Chromium impurities have colored this gem green.
greengem.trans: 因为含铬杂质而呈现绿色。

trunk_winter.en: A specimen of leather and fur.

quagmire_flour.trans: 磨碎的小麦属植物谷粒。

yotc_carrat_race_start.en: This will be a unique opportunity to observe the Daucus carota rattus.
yotc_carrat_race_start.trans: 这会是观察野胡萝卜的一次绝佳机会。

oceantree_pillar.en: I was able to recreate the growth conditions, but not to the extent of the original.
oceantree_pillar.trans: 我虽然能模拟它的生长条件，但难以企及它原来的程度。

kelp_dried.en: It's slightly more palatable with this texture.
kelp_dried.trans: 新的口感让它稍微可口了一些。

battlesong_healthgain.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_healthgain.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

firestarter.en: Not everything is a campfire, dear.
firestarter.trans: 不是所有的东西都是营火，亲爱的。

ghost.en: Oh my, you must be more careful dear!
ghost.trans: 哦，亲爱的，你必须要多小心！

murderer.en: Goodness, is that how they taught you to behave in the Pioneers?
murderer.trans: 天啊，先锋队的人就是这样教你行为举止的吗？

attacker.en: Let's all use our words, dear.

reviver.en: My, how very kind of you %s.

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

burnt.en: Oh, oh dear...

generic.en: Careful not to get a splinter, dear.
generic.trans: 别被碎片割到，亲爱的。

moonglass_wobster_den.en: It appears to be a den of some sort.
moonglass_wobster_den.trans: 看样子是某种动物的巢穴。

record_creepyforest.en: I can't imagine where one would find a record press out here.
record_creepyforest.trans: 我无法想象能在哪找到唱片印刷机。

unagi.en: A common way to prepare eel.
unagi.trans: 一种常见的制作鳗鱼料理的方法。

waterplant_baby.en: This one must be a juvenile.

tentacle_pillar.en: There's more of it below than above!
tentacle_pillar.trans: 下面的部分比露出的部分更多！

yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.en: The ending point for this little experiment.

slingshot_frame_bone.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

quagmire_foliage_cooked.en: I believe we could have prepared it better.
quagmire_foliage_cooked.trans: 我相信我们可以做得更好。

carrot_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
carrot_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: It would be wise to equip the boat with a protective barrier.
boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 在船上配备保护屏障是明智之举。

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: It appears simple enough to construct.

slingshotammo_rock.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_rock.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

watermelonhat.en: That's certainly one thing you could do with a watermelon.
watermelonhat.trans: 这无疑是一种你可以用西瓜做出来的东西。

slingshot_handle_sticky.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

succulent_plant.trans: 独特地适应了干旱气候。

generic.en: A tuft of a graminoid.
generic.trans: 一丛禾草。

monkeytail.en: A variation of the common Typha latifolia, perhaps?
monkeytail.trans: 这或许是常见的香蒲科香蒲属的一种变种？

strawhat.en: This will offer some protection from the sun.

burnt.en: Unfortunately, it's useless now.
burnt.trans: 不幸的是，它现在已经没有用了。

generic.en: I used to have one of those back home.
generic.trans: 我以前在老家也有一个这样的东西。

generic.en: Its movement appears to be hypnotic to the kittens.
generic.trans: 它的动作似乎对小猫有催眠作用。

burnt.en: Gone with the fire.

boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.trans: 必须对它进行战略性部署。

undrawn.en: A drawn diagram might help keep things tidy.
undrawn.trans: 一个画好的图表可以帮助保持东西的整齐性。

generic.en: An excellent diagram! Very accurate.
generic.trans: 一个很棒的图表！非常精确。

cotl_trinket.en: Oh dear, did it just blink at me?
cotl_trinket.trans: 天哪，它刚刚是对我眨眼了吗？

lavaarena_armorextraheavy.en: Best for someone on the receiving end of harsh attacks.
lavaarena_armorextraheavy.trans: 最适合用来抵挡严酷的攻击。

cutless.en: It may be a suitable plaything for the children, if they behave themselves.
cutless.trans: 如果孩子们表现好的话，可以拿这个当玩具。

pocketwatch_parts.en: It appears these pieces of clockwork have been infused with shadow fuel.
pocketwatch_parts.trans: 看来这些钟表已经被注入了暗影燃料。

burnt.en: How unfortunate.

generic.en: Let's get to it then, shall we?
generic.trans: 那就开始吧？

empty.en: I will require an offering.
empty.trans: 需要提供供品。

rabbitking_aggressive.en: That rabbit has a rather hostile disposition.

record_drstyle.en: The music was better back in my day.
record_drstyle.trans: 我那个时代的音乐更好。

quagmire_bowl_silver.en: There are so many uses for a bowl.

skeletonhat.en: It has a detrimental effect on the mortal mind.
skeletonhat.trans: 这对凡人的心灵会造成有害的影响。

hermitcrab_shell.en: This instrument will transport the holder instantly to Pearl's.
hermitcrab_shell.trans: 这个装置能将持有者瞬间传送到珍珠的住处。

mutator_hider.en: How interesting! It appears to alter an arachnid's form when ingested.
mutator_hider.trans: 多么有趣啊！它被摄入后似乎会改变蛛形纲动物的形态。

undrawn.en: All art begins with a blank page.
undrawn.trans: 所有艺术都始于空白页。

generic.en: Sure. Why not?
generic.trans: 当然可以。为什么不呢？

ghost.en: Fascinating. %s indeed has a specter, and it lingers still.
ghost.trans: 了不起。%s实际上有个幽灵，而且它还在四周徘徊。

firestarter.en: Do be careful when trying to destroy all life, dear.
firestarter.trans: 摧毁所有生命时一定要当心，亲爱的。

murderer.en: The binary is simple, %s... On, or OFF.
murderer.trans: 二进制很简单，%s……开还是关。

attacker.en: What devilishness is that robot up to?
attacker.trans: 那个机器人到底有多可怕？

reviver.en: I appreciate your commitment to group survival, %s.
reviver.trans: 我欣赏你对团体生存的坚持，%s！

generic.en: Ah, the automaton. Greetings, dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊，机器人，打声招呼吧，亲爱的 %s！

watermelon_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
watermelon_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

moon_altar_cosmic.en: It says there's more knowledge yet to be found.
moon_altar_cosmic.trans: 说明还有很多知识等待着我们去寻找。

eyeturret.en: The magic of the two beasts has been concentrated by the Thulecite.
eyeturret.trans: 那两种野兽的能量已经被铥矿石聚集起来了。

held.en: I'm a carrier of a carrier of genetic information.
held.trans: 我是遗传信息携带者的携带者。

generic.en: A bright red carrier of genetic information.
generic.trans: 遗传信息的亮红携带者。

formal_blueprint.en: It seems rather senseless to attempt to make a beefalo appear dignified.
formal_blueprint.trans: 让皮弗娄牛看起来很体面这件事实在是没什么道理。

glass.en: I strongly suspect moon glass is organic in composition now.
glass.trans: 我现在强烈质疑月光玻璃的有机构成。

bombed.en: Yes, I'll definitely soak my feet later.

generic.en: My old feet could use a good soak.
generic.trans: 我这双老脚应该好好泡泡了。

empty.en: The spring will replenish itself in good time.
empty.trans: 假以时日，泉水会自己补满的。

sewing_tape.en: A high grade adhesive, good for small mends.
sewing_tape.trans: 高级粘合剂，能用来进行细小的修补。

dragonboat_pack.en: Everything I need has been conveniently collected into a singular package.
dragonboat_pack.trans: 我所需要的一切都已方便地汇集到一个包装中。

marblebean.trans: 从乔木学的角度看，大理石的生长是不可能的。

playbill_the_princess_yoth.en: There is a rather dark metaphor here.
playbill_the_princess_yoth.trans: 其中隐含一个相当黑暗的隐喻。

mutator_moon.en: How interesting! It appears to alter an arachnid's form when ingested.
mutator_moon.trans: 多么有趣啊！它被摄入后似乎会改变蛛形纲动物的形态。

ice_blueprint.en: It's always prudent to have a set of winter garments.
ice_blueprint.trans: 谨慎起见，还是要准备一套冬天的衣物。

spider_healer.en: This arachnid has evolved the ability to heal others around it.
spider_healer.trans: 这种蛛形纲动物进化出了治疗周围其他人的能力。

friendlyfruitfly.en: This one appears to be of a different, more agreeable subspecies.
friendlyfruitfly.trans: 这个似乎是一种更讨喜的亚种。

generic.en: The earthenware has been magically animated.
generic.trans: 这个陶土制品奇迹般地活了。

dead.en: He gave his life for his queen.
dead.trans: 他为女王奉献出了自己的生命。

generic.en: It appears to be of the warrior caste.
generic.trans: 它似乎是族群里的战士。

sleeping.en: A well deserved rest, no doubt.

potato_cooked.trans: 烤茄科茄属植物马铃薯。

boat_item.en: It will allow us to go on the water.
boat_item.trans: 这将赋予我们航海的能力。

generic.en: There is a surprisingly varied selection to choose from.
generic.trans: 选择的多样性令人感到惊艳。

garlic.en: Allium sativum, a close relative of Allium cepa.
garlic.trans: 百合科葱属植物，洋葱葱属植物的近亲。

moon_altar_rock_idol.en: I think I had best mine it out.
moon_altar_rock_idol.trans: 我认为最好还是把它开采出来。

generic.en: This is not the same type of magic I've seen from Maxwell's fuel.
generic.trans: 我看过麦斯威尔的燃料，和它不是同一种魔法。

nolight.en: The moon cycles here are beginning to make a lot more sense.
nolight.trans: 我开始理解这里的月亮周期了。

security_pulse_cage.en: I have not come across this in any book.
security_pulse_cage.trans: 我在任何一本书中都没有看到过这个。

picked.en: I don't have time to wait for it to grow back.
picked.trans: 我没时间等它重新长出来了。

generic.en: I am not familiar with this species of plant.
generic.trans: 我对这个植物品种不熟悉。

fishsticks.en: Give me some tartar sauce and I'm in heaven.
fishsticks.trans: 给我一点塔塔酱，那我简直可以说是身在天堂。

normal.en: It is burning at half strength, presently.
normal.trans: 目前它正在以一半的强度燃烧。

high.en: The magic of the two gems keeps it burning at maximum strength.
high.trans: 两颗宝石的魔法让它以最大的强度燃烧。

hammered.en: Hm, that was an interesting choice of alteration.
hammered.trans: 嗯，那是改变的一个有趣的选择。

generic.en: A very efficient, magically powered furnace.
generic.trans: 一个非常有用的魔法驱动的火炉。

marbletree.en: Amazing. A tree made entirely of marble.
marbletree.trans: 不可思议。一棵完全由大理石做成的树。

quagmire_park_fountain.en: A pity. I always enjoyed a good fountain.
quagmire_park_fountain.trans: 太可惜了。我一向喜欢好看的喷泉。

waterplant_planter.en: Perhaps I'll get back into gardening.
waterplant_planter.trans: 也许我有天会重新回到园艺领域。

sketch.en: Detailed diagrams of a stone sculpture.
sketch.trans: 一个石头雕像的详细的图像。

cave_fern.trans: 令人心情愉悦的观赏植物。

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: Those corvids are quite capable craftspeople.
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 这些鸟类的手艺巧夺天工。

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: It appears simple enough to construct.

healingsalve_acid.en: This salve is derived from gastropod secretions.
healingsalve_acid.trans: 这种药膏提取自腹足类动物的分泌物。

acorn.en: Deciduous seeds encased in a Pericarp.
acorn.trans: 包裹在果皮里的落叶植物种子。

shadow_beef_bell.en: It revives one's dead beefalo by a simple mechanism: magic.
shadow_beef_bell.trans: 它通过一种简单的机制来复活死去的皮弗娄牛：魔法。

record_danger.en: I can't imagine where one would find a record press out here.
record_danger.trans: 我无法想象能在哪找到唱片印刷机。

smallmeat.en: It's a small, raw piece of meat.

boaron.en: They appear to be used as fodder.
boaron.trans: 它们的作用好像是当饲料。

quagmire_goatkid.trans: 温柔可爱的幼年牛科动物。

drying_notmeat.trans: 脱水是一个缓慢的过程。

drying.trans: 脱水是一个缓慢的过程。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 下雨让脱水过程暂停了。

dryinginrain.en: The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.
dryinginrain.trans: 下雨让脱水过程暂停了。

generic.en: It seems our chitinous friend could use some assistance.
generic.trans: 看来我们的几丁质的朋友可以使用一些帮助。

burnt.en: It doesn't seem stable.

beehat.en: Appropriate protective equipment is a must!
beehat.trans: 适当的保护装备是必须的！

handpillow_steelwool.en: This seems ill-suited for a restful night's sleep.
handpillow_steelwool.trans: 它与安眠二字格格不入。

lunarfrog.en: It possesses a truly unnecessary abundance of eyes.
lunarfrog.trans: 它拥有大量无用的眼睛。

winter_ornamentgorge.en: The needlework on this is quite intricate.

spiderhole.en: This is the source of the spider infestation.
spiderhole.trans: 这就是蜘蛛肆虐的源头。

yoth_knighthat.en: This knight's helm affords adequate cranial protection.
yoth_knighthat.trans: 此骑士头盔能提供充分的头部保护。

yotp_food1.en: A feast fit for a festival!

nonslipgrit.en: It will enhance my grip, at the cost of my tool's longevity.
nonslipgrit.trans: 它虽然会增强握持力，但会缩短工具的使用寿命。

yotp_food3.en: I do enjoy a snack now and then.

slingshot_handle_silk.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

spiderhole_rock.en: This is the source of the spider infestation.
spiderhole_rock.trans: 这就是蜘蛛肆虐的源头。

chesspiece_crabking.en: A rendering of a treasure-obsessed crustacean.
chesspiece_crabking.trans: 展现了一只痴迷宝藏的甲壳动物。

kitcoon_yot.en: Oh dear, the bell truly augments your... cuteness. Ho ho!
kitcoon_yot.trans: 哦，亲爱的，这个铃铛极大增强了你的……可爱程度。呵呵!

sculpture_bishophead.en: I can lift it. I'm more spry than I look.
sculpture_bishophead.trans: 我抬得起它。我比我看上去敏捷得多。

boat_rotator_kit.en: It should improve the boat's maneuverability.
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 它应该能提高船的可操作性。

warg.en: Domesticating this Canis will be an entertaining challenge.
warg.trans: 驯化这只犬属动物将会是一个令人愉悦的挑战。

monkeyqueen.en: How interesting, the apes seem to have a matriarchal society.
monkeyqueen.trans: 多么有趣啊，猿猴似乎是母系社会。

quagmire_coin1.en: Worth a paltry sum to the locals.
quagmire_coin1.trans: 足够用来施舍给当地人了。

carnivaldecor_figure_kit.en: How intriguing! I wonder what's inside?
carnivaldecor_figure_kit.trans: 多么耐人寻味啊！我想知道里面有什么？

quagmire_coin4.en: It's made of a sort of condensed magic.

wagpunk_floor_kit.en: It's obviously a method of coastal extension.
wagpunk_floor_kit.trans: 这显然是种海岸拓展这么解决方案。

brokenhorn_follower.en: I'm sure it will grow back in time, dear.
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 亲爱的，以后肯定会长回来的。

generic.en: It appears to be a variation of the Monodon monoceros.
generic.trans: 它似乎是哺乳纲一角鲸的变种。

burnt.en: Not much of an aid now.
burnt.trans: 现在可没有太大的帮助了。

generic.en: A navigational aid. "Thataway".
generic.trans: 导航帮助。“那个方向。”

construction_plans.en: Oh, I do like the look of this.
construction_plans.trans: 哦，我真的很喜欢它的样子。

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: Everything I need to test my subject's alertness.
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 测试对象警觉性的物品。

steeringwheel.en: Ship steering is no easy task.

turf_road.en: The ground. You step on it.

mast_item.en: A tool for harnessing the wind's power.

book_birds.en: The expurgated version, but it has my favorite: Megascops kennicottii.
book_birds.trans: 虽然是删节版本，但它里面有我的最爱：西美角鸮。

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: It measures the racing prowess of herbaceous rodents.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 它能测量草本啮齿动物的赛跑能力。

acorn_sapling.trans: 快要成熟的落叶植物种子。

record_main.en: I can't imagine where one would find a record press out here.
record_main.trans: 我无法想象能在哪找到唱片印刷机。

barnacle.en: People in ancient times believed geese grew from barnacles. Can you imagine?
barnacle.trans: 古代的人认为鹅是由藤壶长出来的。你能想象吗？

lureplant.trans: 一个具有攻击性的物种。

polishcookie.en: Now it feels like the holidays.

megaflare.en: I can lure adversaries to a place of my choosing.
megaflare.trans: 我可以把对手引到我所选择的地方。

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496.
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 人类有记载的首次使用钓鱼浮漂是在1496年。

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: I wonder if she would allow me to write down my observations...
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 不知她是否会允许我记录我的观察……

mask_mirrorhat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

merm_tool.en: While crudely made, I admit it's far more efficient than their usual methods.
merm_tool.trans: 虽然制作粗糙，但我承认这比他们惯用的方法要有效得多。

turf_mosaic_blue.en: The ground. You step on it.

slurper_pelt.en: This must be useful for something.

footballhat.trans: 近身战斗时使用的保护装备。

support_pillar_scaffold.en: It appears some construction is required.
support_pillar_scaffold.trans: 看来需要进行一些施工。

has_item_light.en: I'm afraid the weight of this bit of produce is too small to tabulate.
has_item_light.trans: 恐怕这点农产品的重量太小，统计不出来。

generic.en: I suppose I must put my gardening prowess to the test!
generic.trans: 看看我的园艺能力能不能经得住检验!

burnt.en: I'm afraid that's that.

teleportato_crank.trans: 它运用了基本的机械原理。

quagmire_trader_merm2.en: They appear to have been quarantined. How foolish.
quagmire_trader_merm2.trans: 他们似乎被隔离了。真愚蠢。

tillweedsalve.en: The Tillweed's roots appear to have limited healing capabilities.
tillweedsalve.trans: 犁地草的根部似乎有一定药用价值。

archive_orchestrina_main.en: There must be a manual somewhere.
archive_orchestrina_main.trans: 某个地方肯定有一本说明书。

watertree_pillar.en: I wonder what contributed to its advanced growth?
watertree_pillar.trans: 究竟是什么促成了如此先进的增长？

picked.en: Nereocystis luetkeana needs time to regrow.
picked.trans: 褐藻门海带科植物需要时间重新生长。

generic.en: Nereocystis luetkeana.
generic.trans: 褐藻门海带科。

shovel.en: It's a shovel. Surely you've seen one before?
shovel.trans: 这是一把铲子。你以前肯定见过吧？

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 它的设计无疑是超凡脱俗的。

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: Those lagomorphs are quite the rascals.
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 这些兔类动物很调皮捣蛋。

pomegranate_oversized.en: A rather large Punica granatum specimen.
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 一株硕大的石榴科石榴属标本。

woodcarvedhat.en: A bit utilitarian, but sturdy enough.
woodcarvedhat.trans: 听起来有点功利，但足够坚固。

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: I should be able to assemble it easily enough.
carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.trans: 我应该能够很容易地组装它。

brush.en: Microscopic barbs allow for optimal hair retrieval.
brush.trans: 微观倒钩可以进行光学头发检索。

houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 一种简易的牙齿投射物发射装置。

spoiled_food.trans: 里面积聚了大量的细菌。

short.en: We shall soon reap the fruits of our labors.
short.trans: 很快我们就可以收获自己的劳动果实了。

cold.en: You will catch your death of cold!

hot.en: Exposure to temperature extremes may result in death.
hot.trans: 暴露在极端温度下可能会让它死掉。

generic.en: Development appears to be progressing.
generic.trans: 似乎正在发育。

burning.en: This is, in fact, saving it.

reviving.en: The little bird is on a different path now... terrible one.
reviving.trans: 小鸟现在走上了另一条道路……一条可怕的道路。

generic.en: If only this were the end for the little bird.
generic.trans: 要是这就是小鸟的尾声该多好。

critter_puppy.en: Who's the sweetest little Canis lupus?
critter_puppy.trans: 谁是最亲爱的那头小狼？

burnt.en: I do hope she'll build another.

generic.en: That Winona is quite resourceful.
generic.trans: 那个薇诺娜足智多谋。

moonrocknugget.en: Implications of a lunar body? Interesting.

skeleton_notplayer.en: Looking at the bone structure, this was clearly not human.
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 从骨骼结构上研判，显然不是人类。

boat_bumper_shell.trans: 一道厚厚的软体动物屏障。

quagmire_salt.en: Sodium chloride. Also known as table salt.

drumstick_cooked.en: Not terribly healthy, but my is it delicious!
drumstick_cooked.trans: 虽然不是特别健康，但它真的是太美味了！

chesspiece_moon.en: The missing chunk is a recent development.
chesspiece_moon.trans: 残缺的部分是最近才变成这样的。

pepper.en: Of the genus Capsicum, if I'm not mistaken.
pepper.trans: 如果没错的话，应该是辣椒属的作物。

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

walking_stick.en: An impressive level of detail, considering it was carved with an axe.
walking_stick.trans: 考虑到它是用斧头雕刻的，细节水平令人印象深刻。

polly_rogers.en: Please squawk with your inside voice, dear.
polly_rogers.trans: 请用你内心的声音鸣叫，亲爱的。

perd.en: Nasty Meleagris, you stay away from those berries!
perd.trans: 讨厌的火鸡，你离那些浆果远点！

construction1.en: I'm afraid I can't yet ascertain its function.
construction1.trans: 恐怕我一时间还不能说清它的功能。

construction2.en: The pieces are slowly falling into place.
construction2.trans: 这些组件渐渐都放好了。

generic.en: As I suspected, it's meant to function as a battery of sorts.
generic.trans: 如同我的假设一样，它的功能就是储能电池。

chesspiece_beequeen.en: A queenly tribute to the Apis mellifera.
chesspiece_beequeen.trans: 向西方蜜蜂的女王致敬。

idle.en: It appears there are no more artifacts to find.
idle.trans: 似乎已经没有更多的物品了。

generic.en: The path to discovery awaits.
generic.trans: 探索之路在等待着我们。

saddle_race.en: The decorative antennae are a lovely touch.
saddle_race.trans: 这装饰的触角摸起来很舒服。

trident.en: It produces quite literal sound waves!
trident.trans: 它能制造出强大的波浪！

walkingplank_ancient.en: A dangerous escape route for one stranded at sea.
walkingplank_ancient.trans: 对于受困海上的人，这是一条危险的逃跑路线。

moonrockcrater.en: Would make a useful cartographic instrument with proper embellishments.
moonrockcrater.trans: 会用适当的装饰制造一个有用的制图工具。

malbatross.en: It appears to be of the family Diomedeidae.

book_gardening.en: Dead plants tied together to help me aid living plants.
book_gardening.trans: 用死去的植物来帮助活着的植物。

generic.en: It appears to be deceased.
generic.trans: 它似乎已经死亡。

gingerbreadhouse.en: Reminds me of a story I know.

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: I don't think I can stomach it.
barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 我不认为我可以忍受它。

spice_garlic.en: My goodness that smell is pungent!
spice_garlic.trans: 苍天啊，怎么这么大的味儿。

merm_toolshed.en: A place for everything, and everything in its place.
merm_toolshed.trans: 什么都能装、收拾的井井有条。

shadow_forge_kit.en: It cannot be utilized until its been assembled.
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 组装完成之后才能使用。

generic.en: The voice says it has knowledge to share.
generic.trans: 有个声音在说它有知识要分享。

moon_altar_wip.en: It says it'll share a secret with me if I complete it.
moon_altar_wip.trans: 它说我如果能完成就会告诉我一个秘密。

veryhappy.en: It has been mollified with tributes.

generic.en: Ah. You must be behind all the seismic activity.
generic.trans: 嗯。你肯定就是所有地震活动的罪魁祸首。

monkeypillar.en: These appear to be supporting the throne.
monkeypillar.trans: 这些似乎是支撑王座的柱子。

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: Merely a single piece of a larger costuming pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 仅仅是一个更大的礼服款式中的一小部分。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: Merely a single piece of a larger costuming pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 仅仅是一个更大的礼服款式中的一小部分。

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: Merely a single piece of a larger costuming pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 仅仅是一个更大的礼服款式中的一小部分。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: I'll leave that to someone a tad more spry.
lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.trans: 我还是把那个留给比较敏捷的人吧。

wx78_moduleremover.en: Do be careful with that, dear.
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 这个一定小心使用，亲爱的。

goldenpickaxe.en: The most malleable of metals, but let's see how this mines.
goldenpickaxe.trans: 黄金是最具可塑性的金属，不过我们还是先看看它挖矿的效果吧。

inactive.en: It appears to be a tiny pyramid.
inactive.trans: 它看起来像个小金字塔。

handpillow_kelp.en: What a fascinating use of kelp.
handpillow_kelp.trans: 多么别出心裁的海带用法啊。

quagmire_seedpacket.trans: 农作物的未来就装在这包东西里。

quagmire_berrybush.en: Those berries need time to grow back. Time I don't have.
quagmire_berrybush.trans: 那些浆果重新长出来需要时间，而我根本没时间。

ruinshat.en: A bit gaudy for my tastes, but it seems useful.
ruinshat.trans: 对我来说有点过于俗丽，但似乎还挺有用的。

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

mosquitobomb.en: Absolutely horrid. It makes my skin crawl.
mosquitobomb.trans: 绝对恐怖。它让我浑身起疙瘩。

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: Everything I need to test the stamina of my subject.

bloom.en: Apparently it's the breeding season for this species.
bloom.trans: 显而易见，现在是这个物种的繁殖期。

generic.en: A tree with a fungal parasite.
generic.trans: 一棵寄生着菌类的树。

acidcovered.en: The acid will expedite the spoilage of the fungal yield.
acidcovered.trans: 酸会加速产出菌类的变质速度。

broken.en: The switch appears to be broken.

generic.en: A finely crafted ancient torch.
generic.trans: 工艺精良的远古火炬。

spear_lance.en: Such an ineffectual shape for a polearm.
spear_lance.trans: 这个长柄武器的形状也太不实用了。

corn_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
corn_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

cactus_meat.en: I'm not sure it's been prepared properly.
cactus_meat.trans: 我不确定我处理得对不对。

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

deck_of_cards.en: Do we have enough players for Bridge?

featherhat.en: Not quite the genuine article, but it might fool some birds.
featherhat.trans: 虽然不是真正的东西，但也许能够骗过一些鸟。

atrium_key.en: The key to that old gateway.

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: These tools are specialized for clockmaking.
pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 这些工具是专门用于制作钟表的。

balloonvest.en: I applaud your attempt at practicality, dear.
balloonvest.trans: 亲爱的，我欣赏你在实用方面的尝试。

line_1.en: An ancient mural of a non-mammalian civilization.
line_1.trans: 非哺乳类文明的古代壁画。

line_2.en: This mural panel is too eroded to decipher.
line_2.trans: 壁画的面板侵蚀太严重，无法破译。

line_5.en: The city appears exponentially more prosperous.
line_5.trans: 城市看起来更加兴旺发达。

line_3.en: A dark shadow, or perhaps a substance, overtakes the civilization.
line_3.trans: 暗影，或者说一种物质，降临了这个文明。

line_4.en: The citizens molt from their exoskeletons in this panel.
line_4.trans: 画面里，居民们从他们的外骨骼中脱皮。

destabilizing.en: We'd best not be around when it goes off.
destabilizing.trans: 它离开时，我们最好不要露面。

quagmire_mermhouse.en: Home of the local piscean bipeds.

asparagus_cooked.en: It releases sulfur compounds when it's digested.
asparagus_cooked.trans: 它被消化的时候会释放出硫化合物。

abandoned.en: The remnants of a lighting apparatus.

generic.en: It illuminates the space nicely.
generic.trans: 它为周围空间提供了良好的照明。

burning.en: An axial section of tree trunk. On fire.
burning.trans: 砍下的一段树干。烧着了。

generic.en: An axial section of tree trunk.
generic.trans: 砍下的一段树干。

trails.en: All brawn and no brain, I'm afraid.
trails.trans: 恐怕是肌肉发达头脑简单。

generic.en: A winter coat for the Cardinalis? How peculiar!
generic.trans: 北美红雀的冬衣？好奇特！

spider_repellent.en: Unfortunately, it seems that the arachnids only respond to one of their kind.
spider_repellent.trans: 不幸的是，似乎这些蛛形纲动物只对它们的同类有反应。

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: The artist truly captured its ferocity!
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 艺术家真实地捕捉到了它的凶猛！

carnival_vest_c.en: It smells deligthfully of summer leaves.
carnival_vest_c.trans: 它散发着夏叶的独有的芬芳。

carnival_vest_b.en: How fascinating that these corvids have evolved to the point of wearing clothing.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 这些鸟类已经进化到了穿衣服的地步，多么令人着迷。

lavaarena_firebomb.trans: 我还是比较喜欢我的书。

waxpaper.en: Now we just require rope to secure it in place.
waxpaper.trans: 现在我们只需要绳索来把它绑在固定的地方。

merm_lunar.en: It's been mutated nearly beyond recognition.
merm_lunar.trans: 它已经被变异得面目全非。

emberlight.en: Nothing like some unnatural fire to warm yourself with on a chilly day.
emberlight.trans: 在寒冷的日子里，什么都比不上非自然火焰带来的温暖。

growing.en: Oh my... they seem to form that way naturally.
growing.trans: 哎呀……它们尽然是浑然天成的。

mined_out.en: The salt has already been harvested.

generic.en: Intriguing... just how were those figures constructed?
generic.trans: 着实有趣……不过这些雕塑是如何建造的？

book_bees.en: I've grown rather fond of beekeeping.

generic.en: This genus seems to lack reproductive capabilities.
generic.trans: 这个物种似乎缺乏繁殖能力。

burnt.en: A carbonized tree.

revealed.en: Oh dear, the roaming vendor sure could use a bath.
revealed.trans: 天啊，这位流动摊贩真该洗个澡了。

generic.en: It appears rather unhealthy.
generic.trans: 它看起来相当不健康。

quagmire_turnip_seeds.trans: 芸薹属植物的变异种子。

turf_mud.en: The ground. You step on it.

turf_monkey_ground.en: The ground. You step on it.

archive_lockbox.en: It seems to require an outside power source to activate.
archive_lockbox.trans: 似乎要接外部能量源才能启用。

carnival_vest_a.en: The corvids seem to have developed a method of fabricating clothing from leaves.
carnival_vest_a.trans: 鸟类似乎已经发展出一种用树叶制作衣服的方法。

ghost.en: Oh dear... I'm quite inclined to help it.
ghost.trans: 噢，天啊……我很想帮它。

firestarter.en: I don't believe it's quite evolved enough to handle fire.
firestarter.trans: 我认为它还没有进化到正确使用火的程度。

murderer.en: That wild animal must be dealt with!
murderer.trans: 必须解决这个野生动物！

attacker.en: Oh my, perhaps it's not as intelligent as I first thought.
attacker.trans: 哦，天啊，也许它并不像我最初设想的那样聪明。

reviver.en: The creature seems rather attached to us. I wonder why?
reviver.trans: 这个生物似乎对我们相当依恋。我想知道为什么？

generic.en: It displays a higher level of intelligence than I'd expect from an ape.
generic.trans: 它显示了比我所设想的猿猴更高的智力水平。

wx78module_maxhealth.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

generic.en: Their society has stark social class roles.
generic.trans: 它们的群体有着严格区分的阶级角色。

sleeping.en: It has entered the REM stage of sleep.
sleeping.trans: 它进入了快眼动阶段的睡眠。

turf_ruinstiles.en: The ground. You step on it.

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: I have a bad feeling about what is written here.
wagstaff_mutations_note.trans: 我对这里写的东西有一种不好的感觉。

mask_queenhat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_queenhat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: A bit easier to digest, but lacking in any vision-improving effects.
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 比较容易消化，但缺乏改善视力的效果。

quagmire_rubble_chimney.en: Something must have knocked it down.
quagmire_rubble_chimney.trans: 肯定是什么东西把它弄倒了。

yotb_post_item.en: It should be simple enough to erect.
yotb_post_item.trans: 应该很轻松就能立起来。

inspectself.en: I'm aging like a fine, intelligent wine, am I not?
inspectself.trans: 我是不是老化得像上等的智能酒？

book_brimstone.trans: 总感觉有什么不对劲呢？

klaus.en: It uses its powerful olfactory sense to locate prey.
klaus.trans: 它用它那强大的味觉搜寻猎物。

fused_shadeling.en: It is reminiscent of the parasitic shadows we encountered before.
fused_shadeling.trans: 这让我想起了之前遭遇过的寄生暗影。

glassed.en: How curious, the water reacts similarly to what I observed in the grotto.
glassed.trans: 真奇特，水的反应跟我在洞窟中观察到的一致。

cave.en: It appears to lose functionality in subterranean conditions.
cave.trans: 它似乎会在地下条件中失去功能。

night_new.trans: 月亮的周期重新开始了。

night_full.en: This cycle of the moon has drawn to a close.
night_full.trans: 月亮的这一周期快结束了。

generic.en: Something very odd is going on here.
generic.trans: 这里正在发生古怪的事情。

archive_security_pulse.en: It seems unwise to follow it.

done.en: The flavoring is ready for use.

generic.en: It'll need some elbow grease.
generic.trans: 得花点力气了。

tomato_oversized.en: I always was quite good at growing tomatoes.
tomato_oversized.trans: 我一直都很擅长种西红柿。

thulecite.en: This seems to be an interesting, ectoplasmic residue-bearing variety of zoisite.
thulecite.trans: 这似乎是一种有趣的、含有灵质杂质的变种黝帘石。

quagmire_rubble_carriage.en: The remnants of a once thriving culture.
quagmire_rubble_carriage.trans: 一个曾经繁盛的文化的残留物。

generic.en: A cluster of brambles.
generic.trans: 一簇荆棘。

burnt.en: Burned entirely.

quagmire_grill_small.en: Smaller than normal, but it'll do.

infused.en: It's radiating a faintly glowing energy.
infused.trans: 它在散发着一种发微光的能力。

generic.en: The glass seems to have stabilized.
generic.trans: 玻璃似乎稳定了下来。

succulent_potted.en: I wonder how my garden is doing without me.
succulent_potted.trans: 我想知道，没了我，我的花园会变成什么。

burnt.en: It wasn't doing me much good anyhow.
burnt.trans: 反正它对我来说也没什么用。

generic.en: Sleeping in there would give me a stiff neck.
generic.trans: 睡在那里面会让我落枕。

boat_grass_item.en: Its durability is questionable, but it will do for now.
boat_grass_item.trans: 它的耐用性值得怀疑，但当下还能凑活。

moonglassaxe.trans: 对于效率的追求是无止境的！

bodypillow_petals.en: It gives off a delicate floral aroma.
bodypillow_petals.trans: 它散发出一种精致的花香。

giftwrap.en: Wrapping presents is soothing work, isn't it?
giftwrap.trans: 包装礼物是一件抚慰人的活儿，不是吗？

pocket_scale.en: I'm always prepared to weigh in.

feather_robin_winter.en: It looks like a feather of Cardinalis, but white.
feather_robin_winter.trans: 它看起来像北美红雀的羽毛，只是它是白色的。

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: I wouldn't mind a bit of gardening.
carnivaldecor_plant_kit.trans: 我不介意做一点园艺工作。

moon_cap_cooked.en: How odd. Once cooked, they seem to act as a stimulant.
moon_cap_cooked.trans: 真奇怪。一旦煮熟了，它们就具有刺激性了。

mermarmorupgradedhat.en: This helmet was specifically made to fit the merm cranium.
mermarmorupgradedhat.trans: 这款头盔是专门为人鱼头盖骨设计的。

pond_algae.en: It is a good thing this algae has no need for photosynthesis.
pond_algae.trans: 还好这种藻类不需要进行光合作用。

quagmire_potato_cooked.trans: 烤茄科茄属植物马铃薯。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

barnacle_cooked.en: As I suspected, it tastes nothing like goose.
barnacle_cooked.trans: 正如我所猜测的那样，它的味道一点也不像鹅肉。

dreadstone_stack.en: Its source must lie even deeper underground.
dreadstone_stack.trans: 它的源头一定在更深的地下。

picked.en: The nest is empty. Soon the cycle will begin anew.
picked.trans: 巢是空的。很快就会开始一个新的生命周期。

generic.en: What a tremendous Magnus Avis egg!
generic.trans: 好大的巨型鸟蛋！

milkywhites.en: Tunica albuginea oculi, the opaque white covering of the vitreous humor. Also known as disgusting.
milkywhites.trans: 巩膜，是玻璃体的不透明的白色覆盖物。还有另一个名字叫恶心。

eyemaskhat.en: I doubt that they make my prescription in this size.
eyemaskhat.trans: 应该没有这么大的老花镜吧。

wx78module_bee.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_bee.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

foliage_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

turf_fungus.en: The ground. You step on it.

meat.en: It's improper to eat it raw, but if we've no choice...
meat.trans: 这个不适合生吃，但是我们别无选择…

locked.trans: 肯定有一把配套的钥匙。

generic.en: This city's former inhabitants had stashed goods within.
generic.trans: 这座城市以前的居民在这里面藏了好东西。

rock_petrified_tree_old.en: Should make for an excellent building material.
rock_petrified_tree_old.trans: 应该有益于某种不错的建筑材料。

burnt.en: Carbonized, through and through.

generic.en: A new material may be of some use to us.
generic.trans: 新材料对我们能派上用场。

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

yots_worm.trans: 一个栖息于地表的蠕虫。有趣。

desiccantboosted.en: This should keep me comfortably dry.
desiccantboosted.trans: 这应能让我保持舒适干爽。

staff_lunarplant.en: It allows the user to attack from afar.
staff_lunarplant.trans: 有了它，用户就能从远处发起攻击。

armormarble.trans: 选这种材料来做护甲，有意思。

messagebottle.en: Not the most effective postal service.
messagebottle.trans: 不是最有效的寄件方法。

ghost.en: Tsk. Were you wearing your hardhat, dear?
ghost.trans: 啧。你有没有戴安全帽，亲爱的？

firestarter.en: That was not a regulation fire, dear.
firestarter.trans: 没有必要放那把火啊，亲爱的。

murderer.en: I'll not tolerate cruelty!
murderer.trans: 我不能忍受残暴！

attacker.en: Rather crass wouldn't you say, %s?

reviver.en: %s is quite the Jane of all trades.

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

charlie_npc.en: I'd like to give that young lady a stern talking to!
charlie_npc.trans: 真想狠狠地教训那位年轻女士一顿！

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: An easily constructed directional testing apparatus.
yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 一种简易的方向测试机器。

pomegranate.en: Punica granatum. Watery, sweet and a bit sour.
pomegranate.trans: 是石榴。水分足又酸酸甜甜的石榴。

record.en: I could see it getting a tad repetitive.
record.trans: 我可以听出它变得有点重复。

fossil_piece.en: Hardened remains preserved by taphonomic processes.
fossil_piece.trans: 埋葬处理所保存的变硬的遗骸。

sharkboi.en: This brute has broken innumerable laws of nature, and I simply will not have it.
sharkboi.trans: 这个粗鄙之物违反了无数的自然法则，我绝不允许。

follower.en: He seems to have bonded with me.
follower.trans: 他似乎和我有密不可分的关系。

guard.en: It appears to be a guardian.

werepig.trans: 它是有变兽妄想症的猪人。

dead.en: Don't worry, there are plenty more where that came from.

generic.en: It's a semi-intelligent bipedal pig.
generic.trans: 它是半傻的两足猪。

burnt.en: Ahem. I'll be needing a new reading light.
burnt.trans: 呃哼。我会需要新的灯光来读书。

off.en: Basic color theory is a must.
off.trans: 色彩基础理论是必须要有的。

on.en: Red and blue spores produce lovely reading light when combined.
on.trans: 红色和蓝色孢子组合在一起时会产生可爱的亮光，看书时可用。

ready.en: It simply needs a key now.
ready.trans: 现在只需要一把钥匙了。

generic.en: It will need some work before it can function.
generic.trans: 它需要修理，才能用。

shroombait.en: This malodorous combination will render unconscious any creature that ingests it.
shroombait.trans: 这种恶臭组合会让任何摄入它的生物失去知觉。

scrap_monoclehat.en: It seems to exponentially increase the wearer's field of view.
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 它似乎能成倍增加佩戴者的视野。

wilted.en: A pity. Shall we find replacements?
wilted.trans: 真遗憾。我们要找替代品吗？

freshlight.en: The more light to read by the better, in my opinion.
freshlight.trans: 在我看来，光越亮，读起来越轻松。

oldlight.en: It is Maxwell's turn to procure bulbs. I've it written down right here.
oldlight.trans: 轮到麦斯威尔获得灯泡了。我这里有记录。

burnt.en: Well, such as it is.

generic.en: It's pleasant to see a little decor out here.
generic.trans: 除此之外，看到一个小装饰品是令人愉快的。

empty.en: Ah, could use a doily, wouldn't you say?
empty.trans: 啊，可以用一张小垫补，你不是说这样吗？

beequeenhivegrown.en: An Apis mellifera nest of unusual size.
beequeenhivegrown.trans: 一个大小不寻常的西方蜜蜂蜂巢。

supertacklecontainer.en: A place for everything, and everything in its place.
supertacklecontainer.trans: 什么都能装、收拾的井井有条。

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: It would be wise to equip the boat with a protective barrier.
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 在船上配备保护屏障是明智之举。

beargerfur_sack.en: A portable chilling unit. Well and good, but cold food makes my teeth ache.
beargerfur_sack.trans: 便携式冷却装置。很好很好，但是吃冷的食物会让我牙疼。

papyrus.en: Thin sheets of cellulose and lignin.
papyrus.trans: 由纤维素和木质素构成的薄片制品。

shadowthrall_parasite.en: A sort of parasite hailing from another realm.
shadowthrall_parasite.trans: 一种来自异世界的寄生虫。

chesspiece_dragonfly.trans: 艺术家对虚构双翅目生物的演绎。

lavae_tooth.en: An egg tooth used by a baby reptile to break out of its egg.
lavae_tooth.trans: 爬虫宝宝为了从蛋中破壳而出而使用的牙齿。

moon_altar_idol.en: Its energy is prodding at the edges of my mind.
moon_altar_idol.trans: 它的能量在刺激着我的大脑。

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: They have evolved into a more hostile form.
gestalt_guard_evolved.trans: 它们已进化为更具敌意的形态。

spicepack.en: This should keep my provisions from spoiling!
spicepack.trans: 这应该能防止我的粮食变坏！

mask_kinghat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_kinghat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

dug_trap_starfish.en: It is no longer a danger.

comfy.en: This egg is at a suitable temperature for hatching.
comfy.trans: 这个蛋处于合适的孵化温度。

cold.en: The temperature of this egg is below optimal.
cold.trans: 这个蛋的温度低于理想温度。

quagmire_tomato_cooked.trans: 烤茄科茄属植物西红柿。

crabking_mob_knight.en: That is one brute of a decapod.
crabking_mob_knight.trans: 这是一个十足动物中的野蛮人。

some_kelp.en: A little more. They are not yet satiated.
some_kelp.trans: 再放一点。他们还没有满足。

lots_of_kelp.en: It's sure to topple if we pile on any more.
lots_of_kelp.trans: 如果我们再继续堆积，它肯定会倒塌。

generic.en: The merms are known for their love of kelp.
generic.trans: 鱼人素来以热爱海带而闻名。

deflated.en: Probably not enough air left to analyze its composition...
deflated.trans: 余下的空气不足以分析它的成分……

generic.en: The chemical composition of the young man's breath must be fascinating.
generic.trans: 这位年轻人呼吸中的化学构成一定很迷人。

lavae_cocoon.trans: 我会说那是驯化的好机会。

diseasing.en: Hm... There are spots of discoloration here.

picked.en: I think it will grow back.
picked.trans: 我想它会重新长出来的。

diseased.en: It's afflicted with an agrarian disease beyond my curing.
diseased.trans: 它得了种农业病，我治不好。

withered.en: It can't survive in this hot climate.
withered.trans: 天气太炎热了，它会死的。

generic.en: A cluster graminoid stalks.
generic.trans: 一丛禾草茎秆。

quagmire_pond_salt.en: It is a natural spring of sodium-infused water.

carnival_plaza_kit.en: What an intriguing specimen... I can't quite pinpoint the subspecies.
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 多么耐人寻味的标本……我不能完全确定它的亚种。

quagmire_turnip.trans: 根部可食用的芸薹属植物。

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: Don't let the power go to your head, dear.
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 别让权力冲昏了头脑，亲爱的。

generic.en: Something about this place has made the creature go quite wrong.
generic.trans: 某种能量使得这个物种产生了错误变异。

sleeping.en: I see no reason to wake it.

generic.en: A standard watering can.
generic.trans: 一个标准的浇水壶。

empty.en: Perhaps there's a freshwater source nearby.
empty.trans: 也许附近有淡水源。

generic.en: Highly conductive!
generic.trans: 高度导电！

head.en: A bicephalic shadow beast. How curious.

flipped.en: The shadow beast has been upended. However, its compromised position will not persist, I'm afraid.
flipped.trans: 暗影巨兽已被掀翻。然而，恐怕其失衡状态不会持续太久。

body.en: The creature's dreadstone armoring exhibits near-impenetrable properties.
body.trans: 此生物的绝望石护甲展现出近乎不可穿透的特征。

boat_leak.en: Our ship is taking on water.

monkey_smallhat.en: It could use a thorough washing.
monkey_smallhat.trans: 它可能需要彻底清洗一下。

wormhole_limited.en: It will only last a few trips.

dustmothden.en: It seems a chemical reaction within the bodies of these creatures creates Thulecite.
dustmothden.trans: 似乎是这些生物体内的化学反应产生了铥矿。

eggplant_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
eggplant_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

winterhat.en: I ought to teach the children how to pick up a stitch.
winterhat.trans: 我应该教孩子们怎么拿针。

security_pulse_cage_full.en: The glowing object inside emits some sort of energy.
security_pulse_cage_full.trans: 里面发光的物体能发出某种能量。

rainhat.en: I hate when my bun gets wet.

reviving.en: Some parasitic entity is utilizing the body as a host!
reviving.trans: 某种寄生实体正在利用它的尸体作为宿主！

generic.en: I'd rather not leave such a thing lying around.
generic.trans: 我宁愿不把这样的东西留在身边。

quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.en: This house is no longer livable.
quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.trans: 这个房子已经没法住了。

marsh_plant.trans: 扎根在沼泽中的地下茎植物。

lichen.en: A symbiote! A fungus and a phycobiontic bacteria.
lichen.trans: 一种共生生物！一种菌类加上一种共生藻菌。

talleggs.en: Like most comfort food, it will likely wreak havoc on the arteries.
