talleggs.trans: 像大多数舒适食品一样，它可能会对动脉造成巨大破坏。

kitcoon_forest.en: It appears to have developed a form of camouflage.
kitcoon_forest.trans: 它似乎已经演化出了一种伪装的形式。

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: I wouldn't dream of using any underhanded tactics to win. I'll exercise caution.
boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.trans: 我做梦也不会想到用不正当的手段取胜。务必谨慎。

boarrior.en: We best not underestimate that one.
boarrior.trans: 我们最好不要低估那个。

fishingrod.en: I've read all about fishing. It should be a snap.
fishingrod.trans: 我已经读过了所有关于钓鱼的知识。这对我来说应该是小菜一碟。

book_tentacles.en: Hard to put this one down. It's gripping, frankly.
book_tentacles.trans: 真是难以释手。坦白讲，它真的很吸引人。

boatpatch_kelp.en: A temporary solution, but better than nothing.
boatpatch_kelp.trans: 这是一个临时解决方案，但总比什么都没有强。

burnt.en: What a shame, it might have been useful.
burnt.trans: 太可惜了，本来可能是有用的。

generic.en: Excellent! A place to air out musty equipment.
generic.trans: 太好了！一个可以晾晒发霉设备的地方。

flower_withered.en: This flower lacks the essentials for growth.
flower_withered.trans: 这朵花缺乏生长所需的养分。

lowpower.en: Hm, her invention is starting to run down.
lowpower.trans: 嗯，她的发明准备没电了。

burnt.en: I do hope she'll build another.

generic.en: An electrical power supply for her lovely inventions.
generic.trans: 为她的可爱发明提供电力。

diseased.en: It appears to be infected by some unknown pathogen.
diseased.trans: 它好像被不知名的细菌感染了。

generic.en: I've never encountered this species before. Seems harmless.
generic.trans: 我之前从未遇到过这一物种，它看起来无害。

generic.en: Another moon-induced mutation... Hm.
generic.trans: 又是种月亮带来的变异...嗯。

sleeping.en: I should like to study it up close.
sleeping.trans: 我想更近距离的观察它。

turf_fungus_moon.en: The ground. You step on it.

shieldofterror.en: It seems better suited to offensive measures, rather than defensive as one might think.
shieldofterror.trans: 它似乎更适合进攻，而不是人们想象的防御。

turf_checkerfloor.en: The ground. You step on it.

beefalowool.en: Long follicles harvested from the beefalo.
beefalowool.trans: 从皮弗娄牛身上收获的长毛。

wx78module_cold.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_cold.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

yellowstaff.en: Luckily the star is a manageable size.
yellowstaff.trans: 还好这颗星星不是特别大，可以掌控。

stash_map.en: The penmanship is messy, but legible.
stash_map.trans: 笔迹凌乱，但终究可以辨识。

line_1.en: Fascinating! These glyphs seem to be the base that their language evolved from.
line_1.trans: 真是迷人！这些字形似乎是他们的语言演变的基础。

line_2.en: The introduction of shadow fuel must have had a tremendous impact on their culture.
line_2.trans: 暗影燃料的引入，一定对他们的文化产生了巨大的影响。

line_5.trans: 这里还需要进一步研究。

line_3.en: These glyphs must pre-date their discovery of the shadow fuel.
line_3.trans: 这些字形一定是在他们发现暗影燃料之前就存在了。

line_4.en: This glyph in particular keeps repeating... if only I could decipher its meaning.
line_4.trans: 这个字形一直在重复出现……如果我能解读它的意思就好了。

meat_dried.trans: 虽然有点咸，但还是很令人满意。

fishingnet.en: The sea is a treasure trove of survival resources.
fishingnet.trans: 海洋是一座宝库，提供了生存所需的各种资源。

pig_coin.en: A boon from the Pig King.

burnt.en: That won't do at all.

generic.en: It's a tribute to the small plant-animal hybrid.
generic.trans: 它敬供着小型动植物混合体。

empty.en: It requires an offering of some sort.
empty.trans: 它需要某种形式的供品。

eyebrellahat.en: The cornea must be quite water-repellent.

playing_hideandseek.en: The kittens are currently attempting to hide.
playing_hideandseek.trans: 小猫们目前正试图躲起来。

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: The kittens' hiding game will come to an end soon.
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 小猫们的躲猫猫游戏很快就会结束了。

burnt.en: It seems the kittens have lost their residence.
burnt.trans: 看来小猫们已经失去了住所。

generic.en: A well-constructed habitation for the kittens.
generic.trans: 小猫们的良好居所。

knight_nightmare.en: Its nightmare fueled surroundings have corrupted its programming.
knight_nightmare.trans: 周围噩梦燃料的使用破坏了它的程序设计。

bunnystew.en: Caloric, but nutritious. It smells wonderful, as well.
bunnystew.trans: 虽然很多卡路里，但是营养丰富，而且香气四溢。

quagmire_garlic_seeds.trans: 百合科葱属植物的变异种子。

carnival_crowkid.en: Corvids are remarkably intelligent, I'd imagine this species is even more so.
carnival_crowkid.trans: 鸦雀都是非常聪明的，这个物种尤其如此。

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: Materials to construct entertaining toys for kittens.
kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 为小猫建造娱乐性玩具的材料。

oceantreenut.en: Oh my, this seed seems quite eager to grow.
oceantreenut.trans: 哦，天哪，这颗种子似乎相当渴望成长。

berries.en: Some Ardisia crenata berries, I think.
berries.trans: 我想这是一些朱砂根浆果。

turf_ruinstrim.en: The ground. You step on it.

petals.en: Now it's a delightful handful of potpourri.
petals.trans: 现在它是些令人愉悦的百花香。

moonbutterflywings.en: As I suspected. There are high concentrations of lunar residue.
moonbutterflywings.trans: 如同我所怀疑的一样，月球残余物的含量非常高。

quagmire_onion.trans: 可食用的球茎状洋葱葱属植物。

generic.en: A tribute to a creature with both reptilian and insectoid traits.
generic.trans: 向一种同时具有爬行动物和昆虫特征的生物致敬。

burnt.en: It has expired.
burnt.trans: 它生命的期限已经过了。

empty.en: I suspect it requires a tribute of charcoal.
empty.trans: 我怀疑它需要木炭作为供品。

quagmire_key.en: I shall have to see what this unlocks.
quagmire_key.trans: 我要去看看它能打开什么锁。

dead.en: Strange, I was expecting a bit more than that.
dead.trans: 奇怪啊，我本来以为要折腾一番呢。

generic.en: Our activities seem to have triggered a defense mechanism of sorts.
generic.trans: 我们的行为似乎引起了某种防御机制。

dead.en: I doubt it will stay inert for long.
dead.trans: 这种惰性应该不会持续太久。

generic.en: Interesting, it seems to utilize aspects of the altars for combat.
generic.trans: 有趣，它似乎利用了祭坛的某些方面进行战斗。

quagmire_grill_small_item.en: I need to put it down somewhere to use it.
quagmire_grill_small_item.trans: 我需要把它放在某个地方才能用。

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: A trophy that doubles as a useful anatomical model.
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 这个战利品可以用作解剖学模型。

home.en: A place to kick up one's feet.

burnt.en: The house had no fire-prevention system.

generic.en: The pig creatures have such prosaic taste in architecture.
generic.trans: 这些猪人在建筑方面的品味真不咋地。

full.en: I wonder what they do in there.
full.trans: 我很好奇他们在里面都干些什么。

firenettles_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

drying_notmeat.trans: 脱水是一个缓慢的过程。

drying.trans: 脱水是一个缓慢的过程。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 下雨让脱水过程暂停了。

dryinginrain.en: The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.
dryinginrain.trans: 下雨让脱水过程暂停了。

burnt.en: It doesn't seem stable.

generic.en: Meats can be dehydrated.
generic.trans: 它可以使肉脱水。

wx78_scanner_item.en: It appears to be dormant, for the moment.

tomato_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
tomato_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

wormlight.en: It's softer than I would've thought.

alterguardian_phase3.en: If my assumptions are correct, this should be its final form.
alterguardian_phase3.trans: 如果我的假设正确，这应该是它的最终形式。

kitcoon_grass.en: Oh dear, have you been startled?
kitcoon_grass.trans: 哦，亲爱的，你被吓到了吗？

moon_altar_link.en: I'm afraid its purpose eludes me, for now.
moon_altar_link.trans: 我有些看不透它的目的。

yoth_knightstick.en: It simply confers greater swiftness upon one's steps.
yoth_knightstick.trans: 它不过是使人步伐更为迅捷罢了。

marblebean_sapling.trans: 我相信它是多年生植物。

catcoon.en: A sort of a wildcat. Handsome fellow.

quagmire_tomato_seeds.trans: 茄科茄属植物西红柿的变异种子。

relic.en: A relic of an ancient civilization, lost to the ravages of time.
relic.trans: 岁月变迁中被遗忘的古代文明遗迹。

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_fastregen.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

yellowmooneye.en: The geography of this place is less unknown each day.
yellowmooneye.trans: 这地方的地里每天都越来越不为人所理解。

turf_carpetfloor2.en: The ground. You step on it.

deflated.en: Now that the thermal lift is gone, it descended accordingly.
deflated.trans: 既然热升力消失，它自然也就落下来了。

held.en: Deployment consists simply of allowing it to ascend upon release.
held.trans: 部署方式很简单：放手，让它自行上升。

generic.en: Nothing magical here. It's flotation is merely due to hot air being less dense than the surrounding atmosphere.
generic.trans: 此处并无魔法可言。它之所以漂浮，仅仅是因热空气密度低于周围大气。

statuemaxwell.en: He's actually quite a sweet boy when you peel away the ego.
statuemaxwell.trans: 除了有点自大，他其实是个很好的男孩。

rope_bridge_kit.en: Not exactly a marvel of engineering, but I'm sure it will do.
rope_bridge_kit.trans: 这不是个奇迹工程，但我相信它会起作用。

armorwagpunk.en: I do wish it wasn't quite so noisy.
armorwagpunk.trans: 我真希望它不是那么吵。

lavaarena_boarlord.en: He has a chip on his shoulder, though I couldn't say why.
lavaarena_boarlord.trans: 他总是忿忿不平的，我也不知道为什么。

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: Our verdant friend seems to have worked his magic on this.
bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 我们那位苍翠的朋友似乎发挥了他的魔力。

polly_rogershat.en: A bit ostentatious for my taste.

wagpunkhat.en: It analyzes combat in order to augment the physical capabilities of the wearer.
wagpunkhat.trans: 它通过分析战斗来增强佩戴者的物理能力。

stinger.en: It tapers to a sharp point.
stinger.trans: 它逐渐变细，最后成为一个尖刺。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.en: This marker should help keep things on track.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.trans: 这个标识物有助于保持正确的方向。

generic.en: It seems to utilize radio waves to pinpoint the location of anomalous objects.
generic.trans: 它似乎是利用无线电波来定位异常物体。

poweroff.en: It appears to lack an energy source.

generic.en: Somehow, the ancients devised a way to store knowledge in liquid form.
generic.trans: 古人居然设计了一种使用液体储存知识的方法。

steelwool.en: It has a variety of household uses.

lunarrift_crystal.en: These crystalline structures have grown at a rapid rate.
lunarrift_crystal.trans: 这些晶体结构的成长速度十分快。

generic.en: Pygocentrus Nattereri.
generic.trans: 红腹鱼。

hermitcrabtea_tillweed.trans: 这是一杯颇具恢复功效的茶饮。

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496.
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 人类有记载的首次使用钓鱼浮漂是在1496年。

ancienttree_seed.en: It's difficult to identify the species at this stage of development.
ancienttree_seed.trans: 在这一生长阶段，很难确定物种。

mutator_warrior.en: How interesting! It appears to alter an arachnid's form when ingested.
mutator_warrior.trans: 多么有趣啊！它被摄入后似乎会改变蛛形纲动物的形态。

dreadstonehat.en: Unfortunately, the material seems to have adverse affects on the mind.
dreadstonehat.trans: 不幸的是，该材料对心灵有不良影响。

maxwellhead.en: I wish he wouldn't do that.

record_hallowednights.en: Tsk. This type of music inspires all manner of mischief.
record_hallowednights.trans: 啧啧。这种音乐会激发各种类型的恶作剧。

accomplishment_shrine.en: I feel a compulsive urge to activate it, again and again.
accomplishment_shrine.trans: 我总是忍不住一次又一次地启动它。

quagmire_rotten_crop.en: The soil in this realm is fetid.
quagmire_rotten_crop.trans: 这个世界的土壤是腐臭的。

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

armorslurper.trans: 恶心但又很神奇的衣服。

boneshard.en: Remnants of a life well lived.

candybag.en: A festive bag for seasonal treats.
candybag.trans: 用来装季节性点心的节日袋子。

mutatedbearger.en: The parasite seems capable of altering its host body to suit its needs.
mutatedbearger.trans: 寄生物似乎能够改变其宿主身体以适应其需求。

hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.en: The cooling refreshment is ideal for summer.
hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.trans: 这种清凉的提神饮品是夏季的理想之选。

book_fish.en: It starts with a rather compelling hook.
book_fish.trans: 它一开始就起了一个相当勾人的钩子。

dragonchilisalad.trans: 就喜欢新鲜的绿叶蔬菜。

monstermeat.en: It would be hazardous to consume this.

sewing_kit.en: A simple implement for domestic tasks.
sewing_kit.trans: 家务活中要用到的小工具。

turnip_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
turnip_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

generic.en: A capped lava pit.
generic.trans: 上面被封住的熔岩坑。

out.en: Nothing but a sheath of igneous rock now.
out.trans: 现在只是一座火成岩而已。

scandata.en: An incredibly thorough analysis. Well done!
scandata.trans: 分析地鞭辟入里。干得好！

wagstaff_tool_1.en: Oh dear, I wonder whether that is the tool he requested or not...
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 噢，天啊。真不知道这个是不是他要的工具……

wagstaff_tool_2.en: Perhaps this is the tool he requires? I should suggest a cataloging system.
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 也许这就是他要的工具？我建议建立一个索引。

batnose.trans: 生物的进化真的很了不起。

armor_sanity.en: A protective shroud that transfers attacks to another dimension.
armor_sanity.trans: 通过将敌人的攻击转移到另一个次元来提供保护的护甲。

wagstaff_tool_3.en: His instructions weren't particularly clear, but this might be what I seek.
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 他当时语焉不详，但也许要找的就是这个。

butterflywings.trans: 从被抓蝴蝶身上获得的翅膀。

wagstaff_tool_4.en: His tools would be much easier to procure if there was some organization...
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 哪怕有一点点的整理，他的工具也不至于这么难找……

wagstaff_tool_5.en: Regrettably unlabeled... I'll just have to assume it's what he's looking for.
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 可惜没有标签……我只好假设这就是他要找的。

lavaarena_armorlight.trans: 轻巧，但保护力不是特别强。

panettone.en: The origins of this cake trace all the way back to ancient Rome.
panettone.trans: 这种蛋糕的起源要追溯到古罗马时代。

dead.en: It's gone gray, but it's still dripping.
dead.trans: 虽然变成了灰色，但它还在不停地滴。

generic.en: It's dripping with goo.
generic.trans: 它一直在滴黏液。

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

slingshotammo_stinger.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_stinger.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

quagmire_onion_seeds.trans: 洋葱葱属植物的变异种子。

steeringwheel_item.en: A necessity should we want to steer our boat.

book_fire.en: Even misfortune offers opportunities to learn. Past mistakes shall not be repeated.
book_fire.trans: 不妨将不幸之事作为学习之良机。过去犯过的错误就不要再重复。

cactus_flower.en: Reminds me of Burroughs. A favorite at the library.
cactus_flower.trans: 让我想起了布若斯写的《仙人掌花》。那可是我在图书馆的最爱。

goose_feather.en: Soft body down! It makes me wish I could sleep.
goose_feather.trans: 好柔软的羽毛！它使我希望我能睡着。

occupied.en: If you're going to sit, you might as well read.
occupied.trans: 如果你要坐着它，你不妨找本书读一读。

generic.en: Reminds me of the chair in my reading nook. Just stonier.
generic.trans: 让我想起了读书角的椅子。只是更石化。

chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 它是同类中嘴巴最毒的。

generic.en: I'm not letting THAT in MY library!
generic.trans: 我不会让那个出现在我的图书馆！

armor_lunarplant_husk.trans: 基于植物、植物制造、植物穿戴。

worm_boss.en: This one is older, larger... deadlier.
worm_boss.trans: 这个更古老、更大……更致命。

bunnyman.trans: 一种有感情的兔类动物。

snowball.en: It needs much more to call it a snowman.
snowball.trans: 还需要添加很多要素才能称之为雪人。

generic.en: Interesting.
generic.trans: 有趣。

generic.en: Measure before you act.
generic.trans: 行动前先测量一下。

burnt.en: I can't read any measurements from that husk.
burnt.trans: 已经烧得只剩外壳了，再也不能测量了。

lavaarena_armormedium.en: This ought to prevent grievous harm from befalling the wearer.
lavaarena_armormedium.trans: 穿着它应该能防止暴力伤害。

frozenbananadaiquiri.en: This would pair nicely with a short book.
frozenbananadaiquiri.trans: 喝着这个读一本小书将会十分惬意。

spiderhat.en: Psionic control to exert over spiders. Excluding the boy, of course.
spiderhat.trans: 对蜘蛛进行心灵控制。当然，不包括那个男孩。

beefalofeed.en: Beefalo seem to be quite adept at digesting sticks.
beefalofeed.trans: 皮弗娄牛似乎很擅长消化树枝。

chum.en: I find it best not to dwell on what it's made of.
chum.trans: 最好不要追究它的成分。

nightcaphat.en: I'm afraid I have no use for it.

diseasing.en: Hm... Seems more brittle than is usual.
diseasing.trans: 嗯……看起来比平常还没用。

picked.en: Odd. I thought that would have killed it.
picked.trans: 真奇怪。我本来以为那会杀死它的。

diseased.en: It's afflicted with an agrarian disease beyond my curing.
diseased.trans: 它得了种农业病，我治不好。

withered.trans: 高温已经让它快不行了。

generic.en: It's a small tree.
generic.trans: 是一棵小树。

punchingbag.en: A useful tool for testing a weapon's efficacy.
punchingbag.trans: 测试武器功效的实用工具。

hermitcrabtea_firenettles.en: This beverage raises one's body temperature.
hermitcrabtea_firenettles.trans: 此饮品可有效提升体温。

carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.en: How intriguing! I wonder what's inside?
carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.trans: 多么耐人寻味啊！我想知道里面有什么？

turf_fungus_red.en: The ground. You step on it.

lavaarena_eyecirclethat.en: An enviable magic relic, I must say.
lavaarena_eyecirclethat.trans: 我必须说，这是个令人羡慕的神奇圣物。

voidcloth_umbrella.en: It provides a useful barrier against acid droplets.
voidcloth_umbrella.trans: 它提供了一个防止酸液滴落的有效屏障。

seafoodgumbo.en: I can feel the heartburn already!
seafoodgumbo.trans: 我已经感觉到了胃灼热！

costume_mirror_body.en: It appears to be a theatrical costume.

generic.en: What sort of fuel does it run on?
generic.trans: 它用什么燃料呢？

sweatervest.trans: 这件背心尖声说“时尚，但又能显示主人博学多才。”

firecrackers.en: A little too noisy for my liking.
firecrackers.trans: 按我的口味来说，有点儿太吵了。

burnt.en: It's the charred remains of a head on a stick. Tsk!
burnt.trans: 棍子插了颗猪头，后来被烧毁了。哎呀！

generic.en: Tut tut. It's a head on a stick.
generic.trans: 咳，棍子上插了颗猪头。

burnt.en: Oh dear.

generic.en: We must show our appreciation to the local lagomorphs.
generic.trans: 我们必须向当地的兔类生物表达谢意。

empty.en: The expression on this edifice suggests an offering of food may be appropriate.
empty.trans: 这座建筑上的各种表达都说明我应该献上食物。

horn.en: What an excellent specimen! I can almost hear the beefalo.
horn.trans: 好棒的标本！我几乎可以听到皮弗娄牛在叫。

purplegem.en: It gives off a strange aura.

generic.en: The coordinates remain unknown.
generic.trans: 坐标仍然未知。

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: A float might improve the rod's accuracy.
oceanfishingbobber_none.trans: 使用浮漂可以提升钓竿的准度。

tophat_magician.en: It has been imbued with an ectoplasmic residue.
tophat_magician.trans: 它上面带有一种灵质残渣。

lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.en: A weave of magic replenishes the wearer's will.
lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.trans: 穿上这件编织的魔力装备可以增强意志。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: Its effect appears to be stronger during the day.
oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.trans: 它在白天能更好的发挥效用。

livingtree_sapling.en: Ah. Its horror has taken root.

farm_plow_item.en: I'd best find a suitable spot for my garden.
farm_plow_item.trans: 我最好给我的花园找个合适的地方。

battlesong_lunaraligned.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_lunaraligned.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

oceanvine.en: These vines seem to enjoy a symbiotic relationship with the tree.
oceanvine.trans: 这些藤蔓似乎享受着与树的共生关系。

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: A stronger brew to cure a particularly severe bout of madness.
hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.trans: 药效更为猛烈，用于治疗特别严重的精神错乱发作。

charging.en: It allows her to control things remotely.
charging.trans: 它能让她远程控制东西。

charged.en: It allows her to control things remotely.
charged.trans: 它能让她远程控制东西。

generic.en: It allows her to control things remotely.
generic.trans: 它能让她远程控制东西。

wall_scrap.trans: 循环利用资源的典型案例。

pumpkin_lantern.en: Carving the Cucurbita pepo is such a nice pastime.
pumpkin_lantern.trans: 雕刻南瓜灯真是个不错的消遣方式。

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: This will amplify the effects of incoming healing magic.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 它会增强所接收的治愈力。

dumbbell_golden.en: A bit of exercise can be quite beneficial to one's health.
dumbbell_golden.trans: 做点运动对健康相当有益。

inactive.en: It seems to have sunk into the soil.

active.en: Fascinating. I'll have to study these markings later.
active.trans: 很有意思。以后我得研究一下这些标记。

shellweaver.en: It utilizes salt in a wide variety of ways.
shellweaver.trans: 它能以多种方式利用盐。

merm.trans: 一只双鱼座的两足动物！

slingshotammo_horrorfuel.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_horrorfuel.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

oceanfishingrod.en: A sturdy rod for ocean fishing.

balloonhat.en: I believe it's meant to evoke the image of a Lagomorph.
balloonhat.trans: 它在试图刻画兔形目的生物。

generic.en: A statue of a large insectoid form.
generic.trans: 一尊大型昆虫的雕像。

activated.en: It follows a particular movement pattern.
activated.trans: 它遵循特定的移动规律。

rock_avocado_fruit_sprout.en: It would be better to allow it to grow at this point.
rock_avocado_fruit_sprout.trans: 这个阶段还是让它先长大比较好。

portablefirepit_item.en: A travelling heat source. Useful if handled with due caution.
portablefirepit_item.trans: 便携式热源，慎用方显其效。

carnivaldecor_banner.en: It doesn't actually "catch" the light of course, but merely reflects it.
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 当然，它实际上并不“捕捉”光线，而只是反射光线。

backpack.en: That could carry so many books.

statue.en: An intricately crafted terra cotta statue.
statue.trans: 一座精心制作的陶土雕像。

generic.en: Ah, how charmingly fearsome.
generic.trans: 啊，真是又可怕又迷人。

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

chesspiece_formal.en: The king is, by all measures, a liability to everyone on the board.
chesspiece_formal.trans: 总的来说，国王是棋盘上每个子的职责所在。

durian.en: Aha, the Durio zibethinus. It really does reek.
durian.trans: 啊哈，榴莲。它闻起来真的很臭。

hambat.en: This was perhaps not the most efficient use of resources.
hambat.trans: 这可能不是最有效的资源使用。

pumpkin_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
pumpkin_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

slingshot_band_mimic.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

reskin_tool.en: We're well past due for a spring cleaning around here.
reskin_tool.trans: 我们早就应该大扫除了。

festive_blueprint.en: It features quite an eclectic combination of colors.
festive_blueprint.trans: 它使用了一个折中的色彩组合。

diseased.en: It's afflicted with an agrarian disease beyond my curing.
diseased.trans: 它得了种农业病，我治不好。

burnt.en: A carbonized tree.

generic.en: This species yields lumber and pliable sprigs. Useful.
generic.trans: 这个物种生长木材和柔韧的小枝。很有用。

book_silviculture.en: Dead plants tied together to help me aid living plants.
book_silviculture.trans: 用死去的植物来帮助活着的植物。

mashedpotatoes.en: I wouldn't mind a bite or two, myself.

cool.en: It's cooled down, almost like basalt.
cool.trans: 它已经冷却下来了，就跟玄武岩一样。

hot.en: Its saliva is similar to molten lava.

turf_archive.en: The ground. You step on it.

webberskull.en: That is a most unusual skull.
webberskull.trans: 那是最不同寻常的头骨。

lavaarena_feathercrownhat.en: A weak enchantment is present on this wreath.
lavaarena_feathercrownhat.trans: 这个花环带有轻微的魔力。

exposed.en: It will require much greater force than I can muster to break it.
exposed.trans: 要打破它，需要超出我掌握范围之外的更大的力量。

generic.en: How odd... the marble appears to be encasing something.
generic.trans: 真奇怪......大理石似乎包裹着某种东西。

turf_forest.en: The ground. You step on it.

krampus.trans: 它是神话中的圣诞怪物。

hareball.trans: 大冒险吗？小孩子的把戏。

decor_centerpiece.en: I suppose it's pretty, but it doesn't do much.
decor_centerpiece.trans: 虽然确实很漂亮，但没什么实际作用。

chesspiece_antlion.en: A stately statuary of the Panthera auropunctata.

wagboss_robot_constructionsite.en: An unprecedented feat of technological advancement, yet thoroughly uncivilized.
wagboss_robot_constructionsite.trans: 前所未有的技术进步成就，然而却是彻底的野蛮之物。

shadowdancer.en: ...Has anyone checked in on him recently?

lunar_seed.en: A piece of its crown, no doubt.

burnt.en: I suppose my reading chair will have to wait.
burnt.trans: 看来我的阅读椅要再等等了。

generic.en: I could use a new reading chair.
generic.trans: 我需要一把新的阅读椅。

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: If it could be convinced to stay still, it would make an excellent reading light.
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 如果能说服它静止不动，它将是一盏极好的阅读灯。

blowdart_lava2.en: I'll leave that to the younger folks.
blowdart_lava2.trans: 我还是把那个留给年轻人吧。

plantregistryhat.en: It seems to be a wearable directory of sorts, detailing various plant strains.
plantregistryhat.trans: 这似乎是一种可穿戴式目录，详细介绍了各种植物门类。

held.en: I may have a use for this.

generic.en: It gets its green hue from the lunar residue in its system.
generic.trans: 它身上的绿色来自于体内的月球残余物。

generic_smallstack.en: I assume the more tickets I collect, the greater the prize will be.
generic_smallstack.trans: 我推断收集的奖品越多，奖品就越丰厚。

generic_largestack.en: I seem to be quite good at these games!
generic_largestack.trans: 我似乎很擅长这些游戏！

generic.en: I should be able to exchange these for a prize of some sort.
generic.trans: 我应该可以用这些东西换取某种奖品。

costume_doll_body.en: It appears to be a theatrical costume.

burnt.en: On beyond dilapidated.

generic.en: Obviously dilapidated.
generic.trans: 很明显已经残破了。

spore_moon.en: An odd, yet effective defense mechanism.
spore_moon.trans: 一种古怪而又有效的防御机制。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: It would be best utilized in snowy weather.

uncovered.en: What an awful state it's in!
uncovered.trans: 它所处的状态多么糟糕啊！

covered.en: I feel a light dusting of magic. Odd.
covered.trans: 我感觉到一束含有魔法的亮光。真古怪。

finished.en: We may want to keep an eye on this.
finished.trans: 我们可能要注意点这东西。

nightstick.en: I wonder if it's named for Venus?
nightstick.trans: 我怀疑它是不是以金星命名的？

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: It seems content to watch the proceedings.

generic.en: Oh dear, I can't seem to make any sense of it.
generic.trans: 哦，亲爱的，我似乎无法理解它。

turf_carpetfloor.en: The ground. You step on it.

turf_rocky.en: The ground. You step on it.

generic.en: A colorful lepidopteran.
generic.trans: 五颜六色的鳞翅目昆虫。

burnt.en: Not to worry. We can still celebrate.
burnt.trans: 不要担心。我们仍然可以庆祝。

generic.en: Let's grow a proper tree, shall we?
generic.trans: 让我们种一棵合适的树吧，好吗？

turf_shellbeach.en: The ground. You step on it.

turf_underrock.en: The ground. You step on it.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: Its effect appears to be stronger during the day.
oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.trans: 它在白天能更好的发挥效用。

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: Such a strange and grotesque affliction...

slingshotammo_container.en: I'm glad Walter is getting organized!
slingshotammo_container.trans: 我很高兴沃尔特开始整理收纳了！

eggplant_cooked.en: For your enjoyment: Braised Solanum melongena.

maxwell.en: Get down from there this instant!

wagboss_robot_secret.en: Looks like a machine of sorts.

vault_chandelier_broken.en: It would appear substandard workmanship has permitted this chandelier to fall from its mounting.
vault_chandelier_broken.trans: 基本可以断定，工艺不达标导致了这盏枝形吊灯从安装处坠落。

chest_mimic_revealed.trans: 这个生物模仿了一件文物。

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_dreadstone.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

moon_altar_ward.en: It's communicating a need to be reconstructed.
moon_altar_ward.trans: 这是在传达一种想被重建的消息。

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: I will endeavor to find a suitable environment for it.
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 我会尽力找到适合它的环境。

chesspiece_depthworm.en: One of the hungriest large invertebrates.
chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 这是最饥饿的大型无脊椎动物之一。

uncovered.en: So this is what was lurking inside.
uncovered.trans: 所以这就是潜伏在里面的东西。

covered.en: There's an almost animalistic ferocity in the chiselwork.
covered.trans: 凿功中透出动物般的凶猛。

rock_avocado_fruit.en: The outside is mineral, yet the inside is organic.
rock_avocado_fruit.trans: 外部是矿物，里面却是有机物。

fish.en: Some kind of whitefish, I believe.
fish.trans: 我猜应该是某种白鲑鱼。

dragonfruit_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
dragonfruit_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

locked.en: Oh dear. I believe this will require a key.
locked.trans: 哦，亲爱的。我们需要一把钥匙。

generic.en: A mollusk of exceptional size and functionality.
generic.trans: 体型庞大，功能齐全的软体动物。

snurtle.trans: 腹足类动物的罕见变种。

critter_lamb.en: I could just squish that widdle face.

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Interesting, it seems to have retained the energy that powered it.
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 有趣，它似乎保留了为其提供动力的能量。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: Fascinating! The spines secrete a potent neurotoxin.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.trans: 真迷人！它的脊骨分泌一种强劲的神经毒素。

burning.en: Combusting the arboreal support structure will facilitate unobstructed access to the minerals.
burning.trans: 燃烧树木支撑结构后，将便于无阻碍地获取矿物。

chopped.en: The boulder is ready to be mined.

generic.en: The plant's structural integrity appears more than sufficient to bear the considerable mass of the boulder.
generic.trans: 该植物的结构完整性似乎足以承载巨石的重量。

oceanwhirlportal.en: One typically avoids sailing into a whirlpool, but sense and reason seem to mean nothing in this place.
oceanwhirlportal.trans: 人们通常会避免驶入漩涡，但在这里，逻辑和理性似乎毫无意义。

stalker_atrium.en: We could have learned much from each other.
stalker_atrium.trans: 我们可以从对方身上学到很多。

bishop.trans: 一位上了发条的神职人员。

wilted.en: A pity. Shall we find replacements?
wilted.trans: 真遗憾。我们要找替代品吗？

freshlight.en: The more light to read by the better, in my opinion.
freshlight.trans: 在我看来，光越亮，读起来越轻松。

oldlight.en: It is Maxwell's turn to procure bulbs. I've it written down right here.
oldlight.trans: 轮到麦斯威尔去拿灯泡了。我这里有记录。

generic.en: It's pleasant to see a little decor out here.
generic.trans: 很高兴看到这里有一些小装饰。

empty.en: Ah, could use a doily, wouldn't you say?
empty.trans: 啊，可以加个小垫子，不是吗？

poweroff.en: I wonder what its intended purpose was.
poweroff.trans: 不知道它的预期目的是什么。

generic.en: It appears to be a remarkably advanced security system.
generic.trans: 看起来是一种极为先进的安全系统。

figkabab.en: I suppose this is the next logical step after meat on a stick.
figkabab.trans: 我想既然可以做肉串，那现在这样做也是合乎逻辑了。

shadow_battleaxe.en: There is a price to wielding such implements.
shadow_battleaxe.trans: 使用这样的工具是有代价的。

generic.en: SHHH!
generic.trans: 嘘嘘嘘！

generic.en: Shhh!
generic.trans: 嘘嘘嘘！

generic.en: Shhh!
generic.trans: 嘘嘘嘘！

flotationcushion.en: A passive deployment flotation device. I approve.
flotationcushion.trans: 被动部署的漂浮装置。我认可。

wobster_sheller.trans: 非常有趣的无脊椎动物。

turf_woodfloor.en: The ground. You step on it.

burning.en: Tsk. Such a waste of resources.

burnt.en: Carbonized, through and through.

generic.en: It seems to have been altered by ambient lunar energies.
generic.trans: 似乎被周遭月亮的能量改变了。

seeds.trans: 一把不知道是什么的种子。

pig_token.en: How did they manage to achieve such detail using pig hooves?
pig_token.trans: 他们是如何用猪蹄实现此等细节的？

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: I should be able to assemble it easily enough.
carnivaldecor_banner_kit.trans: 我应该能够很容易地组装它。

broken.en: The device is in need of repair.

unpowered.en: As it is unpowered, this mechanism cannot operate.
unpowered.trans: 由于未充能，此装置无法运行。

generic.en: It operates through particle transfer principles.
generic.trans: 它通过粒子传输原理运作。

picked.en: I don't think they'll grow back.
picked.trans: 我认为它们还会重新长出来。

generic.en: A wild cluster of edible mushrooms.
generic.trans: 一大簇野生食用菌。

imprisoned.en: My, how did it end up in this state?
imprisoned.trans: 天哪，它怎么会沦落至此？

generic.en: This creature has terrible manners.
generic.trans: 这种生物的教养简直可怕。

archive_centipede.en: An impressive piece of ancient engineering.
archive_centipede.trans: 一件令人印象深刻的古代工程产品。

generic.en: Is it petrified?
generic.trans: 它是被石化了吗？

empty.en: Nope, just a statue.
empty.trans: 不是，只是一座雕像而已。

deserthat.en: Much more effective than reading glasses.

quagmire_mushrooms.en: I'm not familiar with the species, though it is edible.
quagmire_mushrooms.trans: 我不熟悉这个物种，不过它是可食用的。

valid.en: The pedestals seem to draw power from these gems.
valid.trans: 这些底座似乎能从宝石中汲取能量。

gems.en: It appears to require a specific gem to activate.
gems.trans: 似乎需要特定的宝石才能激活。

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: I'm always in need of a good reading light.
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 我特别欣赏一盏好的阅读灯。

armorgrass.trans: 足够多的层数可以带来惊人的效果。

gestalt_guard.en: They possess higher defensive capabilities than their smaller counterparts.
gestalt_guard.trans: 相比小型的同类，它们拥有更高的防御能力。

off.en: I suspect it is powered by that horrible fuel.
off.trans: 我怀疑那些可怕的燃料在给它提供动力。

on.en: Indeed. It gained power from the key.
on.trans: 确实。它从钥匙中获得力量。

dragonboat_kit.en: It would make sense to construct this near the water.
dragonboat_kit.trans: 在水边建造这样的建筑才合理。

yoth_chair_rocking_item.en: It is a rocking horse, of the sort commonly found in children's nurseries.
yoth_chair_rocking_item.trans: 这是摇摇马，常见于儿童的育婴室。

ghost.en: %s, I told you not to run with spears. Tsk.
ghost.trans: %s，我跟你说过不要带着长矛跑。啧啧。

firestarter.en: "By Hel's fire" is a turn of phrase, dear.
firestarter.trans: 亲爱的，“地狱之火”只是一种表达方式。

murderer.en: Your saga ends here, %s!
murderer.trans: 你的传说到此结束，%s！

attacker.en: You're not making trouble, are you %s?
attacker.trans: 你没有在制造麻烦，对吧，%s？

reviver.en: I appreciate your commitment to group survival, %s.
reviver.trans: 我欣赏你对团体生存的坚持，%s！

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

pickaxe.en: A specialized axe for chipping away at rocks.
pickaxe.trans: 专门用来凿岩石的斧子。

mast.en: Simply raise a sail, and off we go!

match_but_snack.en: It's the correct food, although an insufficient amount.

mismatch.en: Not the proper dish for the great wyrm.

match.en: The exact thing to placate the great wyrm.
match.trans: 用来安抚大蛇再合适不过了。

generic.en: I suppose it's ready for the altar.
generic.trans: 我想，可以把它放在祭坛上了。

antliontrinket.en: It appears to be a child's plaything.
antliontrinket.trans: 它看起来像儿童的顽固。

flower_cave.en: You could read by that light.
flower_cave.trans: 你可以借助那个光来看书。

burnt.en: Oh my... I suppose they'll have to start all over.
burnt.trans: 哦，天啊，他们得从头来过了。

generic.en: The "if it fits, it sits" method of choosing a monarch. I'm familiar.
generic.trans: 这种"坐的下就给你坐"的君主筛选,我再熟悉不过了。

spider_spitter.trans: 会吐出抛射物的蛛形纲动物。

cooking_long.en: It's got a bit to go before it's ready.
cooking_long.trans: 还要等一会儿才能煮好。

burnt.en: Now it's truly derelict.
burnt.trans: 现在它是真正的废弃了。

empty.en: It looks derelict when it's not cooking something.
empty.trans: 没有烹饪东西的时候，它看起来就像是废弃了一样。

costume_queen_body.en: It appears to be a theatrical costume.

mermguard_lunar.en: It's been mutated nearly beyond recognition.
mermguard_lunar.trans: 它已经被变异得面目全非。

armordreadstone.trans: 极其的耐用，出奇的轻盈。

chesspiece_malbatross.en: I'll have to add an appendix to "Birds of the World".
chesspiece_malbatross.trans: 我要为 "世界鸟类大全"加一笔附录了。

yotb_sewingmachine_item.en: Well, I'd better get that set up.

onion_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
onion_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

burning.en: What an unfortunate turn of events!

full_weed.en: Weeds have no place in the garden.

seed.en: It takes patience to grow crops from seed.
seed.trans: 从种子开始种植农作物需要极大的耐心。

rotten_oversized.en: How terrible to see it all go to waste!
rotten_oversized.trans: 浪费这么多东西，太可怕了!

rotten.en: I detest the sight of spoiled food!
rotten.trans: 我最讨厌看到变质的食物!

generic.en: Of the kingdom Plantae.
generic.trans: 植物王国的一员。

full.en: I daresay that's ready to harvest.
full.trans: 我敢说，已经可以收割了。

playbill_the_doll.en: I suspect there's a deeper meaning to its storyline.
playbill_the_doll.trans: 我怀疑故事情节有更深层次的含义。

ancientfruit_gem.en: I suspect burning away the tough outer skin might reveal something at its core.
ancientfruit_gem.trans: 我猜想：烧掉坚硬的外皮可能会揭示它的内核。

berries_juicy.en: A variant of Ardisia crenata berries. Good hydration.
berries_juicy.trans: 一种朱砂根浆果变体。水合作用很好。

held.en: Serinus canaria. We ought never enter a cave without one.
held.trans: 金丝雀。我们不应不带一只金丝雀就进洞穴。

generic.en: Serinus canaria. A historically useful sentinel species.
generic.trans: 金丝雀。历史有益的哨兵物种。

generic.en: A thirsty female Haemagogus Devorator.
generic.trans: 一只饥渴难耐的雌性吸血蚊。

ready.en: Honey can be harvested from it.

somehoney.trans: 还没到收获蜂蜜的时候。

fullhoney.en: Honey can be harvested from it.

burnt.en: Poor bees!

generic.en: A crude apiary.
generic.trans: 简陋的蜂房。

spiderden_bedazzler.en: Be sure to tidy up when you're finished, young arachnid.
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 完成后一定要整理好，年轻的蛛形纲动物。

succulent_picked_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

wall_scrap_item.trans: 循环利用资源的典型案例。

wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.en: Fundamental components of a colossal, militarized automaton.
wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.trans: 巨型军用机器人的基础配件。

oceanfish_medium_9.en: I surmise that its coloring is a result of its fig-based diet.
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 我推测它的颜色是多年进食无花果后导致的。

oceanfish_medium_8.en: All fish are cold-blooded of course, but this is exceptional.
oceanfish_medium_8.trans: 当然，所有鱼类都是冷血动物，但这也太神奇了。

oceanfish_medium_7.en: It appears to be a subspecies of Cyprinus carpio.
oceanfish_medium_7.trans: 似乎是欧洲鲤的一种亚种。

oceanfish_medium_6.en: It appears to be a subspecies of Cyprinus carpio.
oceanfish_medium_6.trans: 似乎是欧洲鲤的一种亚种。

oceanfish_medium_5.en: A fascinating blend of animal and vegetable.

oceanfish_medium_4.en: I've never been superstitious about black cats, never mind a catfish!
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 我从来就没迷信过黑猫，更别说是鲶鱼了！

oceanfish_medium_3.en: Oh dear, I believe these are actually an invasive species.
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 噢，天啊，我相信这些是入侵物种。

wathgrithr_shield.en: I'm happy to see her exploring more defensive tactics.
wathgrithr_shield.trans: 我很欣慰她在探索更多的防御战术。

oceanfish_medium_2.en: This species usually prefers deeper waters.
oceanfish_medium_2.trans: 这种物种通常喜欢深水。

petrified_tree.en: Should make for an excellent building material.
petrified_tree.trans: 应该有益于某种不错的建筑材料。

oceanfish_medium_1.en: Oh my... is it supposed to look like that?
oceanfish_medium_1.trans: 噢天啊……这看起来正常么？

moonstorm_static_catcher.en: It is not carrying a charge.

seedpouch.en: For the practical storage and transport of seeds.
seedpouch.trans: 非常实用的种子贮藏和运输工具。

lightflier.en: If it could be convinced to stay still, it would make an excellent reading light.
lightflier.trans: 如果能说服它静止不动，它将是一盏极好的阅读灯。

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: Proximity to the blossoms produces a restorative effect for the user.
lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.trans: 靠近这些花朵的时候会产生恢复作用。

generic.en: A handy bit of pocket-sized weaponry.
generic.trans: 一个方便的口袋型武器。

broken.en: Ancient debris. Perhaps it can be restored?
broken.trans: 古老的碎片。也许它可以被修复？

moonstaff.en: The magic of the stone appears to be inexhaustible.
moonstaff.trans: 石头的魔法似乎是用不完的。

wrongstaff.en: Hmm... It seems the staves are not interchangeable.

generic.en: The magic of this structure ebbs in predictable cycles.
generic.trans: 这一结构的魔法在可预测的周期中衰退。

quagmire_potato.en: Solanum tuberosum, a staple in some cultures.
quagmire_potato.trans: 茄科茄属植物马铃薯，在某些文化里属于主食。

bedroll_furry.en: I'm not sleeping on the ground.

yotr_decor_1_item.en: It would look quite nice right over there.

rhinodrill.en: Prone to unnecessary displays of masculinity.
rhinodrill.trans: 倾向于卖弄自己的雄壮威猛。

spiderden.en: Fascinating. These spiders have a communal hive.
spiderden.trans: 很有意思。这些蜘蛛的巢穴是共用的。

generic.en: Its design is rather eccentric, but the theory is sound.
generic.trans: 虽然它的设计相当古怪，但是理论很扎实。

activated.en: The strong magnetic force will pull my ship toward its target.
activated.trans: 强大的磁力会把我的船拉向目标。

dragonheadhat.en: This is the head to the dragon costume.
dragonheadhat.trans: 这是龙造型装束的头部。

farm_hoe.en: Humans have cultivated crops since Neolithic times.
farm_hoe.trans: 人类从新石器时代就开始种植农作物。

phlegm.en: The congealed mucus retains its sticky texture.
phlegm.trans: 那团凝固的黏液仍保持着黏黏的质地。

rook_nightmare.en: It looks like it could break apart at any moment.
rook_nightmare.trans: 看起来它随时都可能分崩离析。

eggplant.trans: 一个茄属植物。特别是，矮瓜。

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: A stone rendition of a pair of mechanical marvels.
chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 用石材表达出了机械奇迹的神韵。

book_temperature.en: You must be mindful of your thermal equilibrium.
book_temperature.trans: 你必须要注意自己的热平衡。

dirt.en: It would be best to stay away from that.
dirt.trans: 最好是离那个东西远点。

batbat.en: Interesting. This weapon appears to be alive.
batbat.trans: 有意思。这件武器好像是活的。

carnivaldecor_plant.en: It's so soothing to care for a small tree.
carnivaldecor_plant.trans: 照顾一棵小树是如此令人舒心。

skeleton.en: I guess I could study the bones.
skeleton.trans: 我猜我可以研究这些骨骼。

starving.trans: 它看上去有点营养不良。

dead.en: I do believe he has starved.
dead.trans: 我真的认为它是饿死的。

generic.en: This will safely contain one avian specimen.
generic.trans: 这能安全地关住一只鸟。

fish_box.en: A clever contraption to keep seafood fresh.

onion_oversized.en: A rather large Allium cepa specimen.

generic.en: It is especially venomous.
generic.trans: 它的毒性尤其高。

chesspiece_daywalker2.en: Resourceful, admittedly. Yet, in essence, a brute.
chesspiece_daywalker2.trans: 得承认它有些机智。但究其本质，仍旧是莽夫一名。

bloom.en: The smell is used to ward off predators.
bloom.trans: 这个味道可以用于抵御捕食者。

generic.en: A red variety of Mycena luxaeterna.
generic.trans: 红色品种的发光蘑菇。

acidcovered.en: The acid will expedite the spoilage of the fungal yield.
acidcovered.trans: 酸会加速产出菌类的变质速度。

moonrockidol.en: Curious. It rather looks like a key.
moonrockidol.trans: 好奇。它看起来像把钥匙。

featherpencil.en: Oh, how I missed proper writing implements!
featherpencil.trans: 哦，我多么想念合适的书写用具！

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

beast_blueprint.en: I'm not one to rely on luck, but a bit won't hurt in a competition.
beast_blueprint.trans: 我不是一个靠运气的人，但在比赛中有一点运气也不是坏事。

generic.en: Despite their affinity with the ocean, the apes still seem to prefer sleeping in trees.
generic.trans: 尽管它们与海洋关系密切，但猿类似乎仍然喜欢在树上睡觉。

burnt.en: I suppose all that thievery leaves little time to organize a fire brigade.
burnt.trans: 光顾偷窃，忽略了建设消防力量。

lowpower.en: The magical focus will wear out soon.
lowpower.trans: 魔法焦点很快就会用完。

overloaded.trans: 可怜的小家伙操劳过度了。

off.en: It needs a new magic focus.
off.trans: 它需要一个新的魔法焦点。

burnt.en: I do hope she'll build another.

generic.en: It's good to see her keeping an open mind.
generic.trans: 她的思想开放，真好。

book_sleep.trans: 好温馨安宁的一本书，就像睡前的一杯热牛奶一样。

critter_bulbin.en: Are you animal or vegetable, dear?
critter_bulbin.trans: 你算动物还是植物呢，亲爱的？

venting.en: It is venting gas as a form of attack.
venting.trans: 排气是它的一种攻击手段。

sleeping.en: It is dormant at the moment.

generic.en: This mineral hybrid creature possesses the ability to store gas under considerable pressure.
generic.trans: 这种矿物混生物种具备在高压下储存气体的能力。

recharging.en: It appears to require some time to replenish its power between uses.
recharging.trans: 在两次使用之间，它似乎需要一些时间来补充其能量。

generic.en: Horology mixed with magic, truly fascinating.
generic.trans: 钟表学与魔法混合在一起，真的很吸引人。

lunarplant_kit.en: Now that I'm familiar with the material, it's a simple matter to repair it.
lunarplant_kit.trans: 现在我熟悉材料了，修复起来就很简单了。

shadowrift_portal.en: Intriguing and deeply worrying in equal measures.
shadowrift_portal.trans: 它耐人寻味和令人担忧的程度相当。

playing.en: The game appears to require quick reflexes.
playing.trans: 这个游戏似乎需要快速的反应力。

generic.en: I believe it requires a form of currency to start.
generic.trans: 我相信它需要用某种货币来启动。

rubble.en: Looks like a job for library paste!
rubble.trans: 看来要使用图书馆里用的厚浆糊！

mask_sagehat.en: There are times one must take the helm.
mask_sagehat.trans: 关键时刻，必须挺身而出。

messagebottleempty.en: This type of jar is most commonly used for canning.
messagebottleempty.trans: 这种类型的瓶子被广泛用于制作罐头。

held.en: The plant and animal matter has fused in total harmony.
held.trans: 动植物和谐的融合在了一起。

generic.en: My, another plant and animal hybrid. How odd.
generic.trans: 惊人啊，又一种动植物杂交品种。多么神奇。

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: Mankind has cultivated crops for centuries, and there's still more to learn.
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 尽管人类种植农作物的历史已经有数个世纪，但仍然有大量农业知识有待我们去学习和发现。

malbatross_feather.en: Its plumage has an almost scale-like texture.
malbatross_feather.trans: 它的羽毛有着近乎鱼鳞的质感。

spat.en: Ovis chalybs, and a right mean looking one at that.
spat.trans: 钢铁羊，看看它就知道这是什么意思了。

yoth_lance.en: During the medieval era, this type of lance was employed for jousting.
yoth_lance.trans: 中世纪时期，此类骑枪常用于马上比武。

kitcoon_rocky.en: Hmm, their body language seems to imply annoyance.
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 嗯，它们的身体语言似乎在说它们窝火了。

boatrace_start.en: I do love a good old fashioned boat race.
boatrace_start.trans: 我喜欢传统的赛艇比赛。

blowdart_lava.en: I haven't the lung capacity for such a thing.
blowdart_lava.trans: 我的肺活量不够大，用不好这个东西。

moose_nesting_ground.en: I should like to research its mating habits, someday.
moose_nesting_ground.trans: 有一天，我可能会想要研究它的求偶习惯。

turf_fungus_green.en: The ground. You step on it.

wobster_moonglass.en: This arthropod seems to have evolved to suit its environment.
wobster_moonglass.trans: 这种节肢动物进化出了适合它环境的能力。

twiggy_nut_sapling.en: It is fast growing into a fine young tree.
twiggy_nut_sapling.trans: 它快速长成一棵可爱的小树。

farm_soil_debris.en: Oh no you don't! Out of my garden!
farm_soil_debris.trans: 哦不，你想都别想！从我的花园出去！

bullkelp_root.en: I suppose this is why it's referred to as "bullwhip" kelp.
bullkelp_root.trans: 公牛海带果然名不虚传。

armor_yoth_knight.en: The rose decorating this armor is the maker's insignia.
armor_yoth_knight.trans: 盔甲上装饰的玫瑰，是制作者的徽记。

earmuffshat.en: Poor Leporidae. At least it's warm.
earmuffshat.trans: 可怜的兔兔。至少它很暖和。

cookiecuttershell.en: A thick casing of calcium carbonate.

spider_dropper.en: Ah, this species of arachnid has adapted to life on the cave ceiling.
spider_dropper.trans: 啊，这种蛛形纲动物已经适应了悬挂在洞穴顶上的生活。

moonspiderden.en: Those poor hideous creatures are making their den here.
moonspiderden.trans: 这些可怜的丑陋生物在这里筑了巢。

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: With the energy removed, I doubt it will be able to re-form.
alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 能量移除之后，我怀疑它多半不能再生了。

1.trans: 好迷人。妖怪，你会说话吗？

2.en: Fascinating. Can you speak, specter?
2.trans: 好迷人。妖怪，你会说话吗？

1.trans: 好迷人。妖怪，你会说话吗？

2.en: Fascinating. Can you speak, specter?
2.trans: 好迷人。妖怪，你会说话吗？

1.trans: 好迷人。妖怪，你会说话吗？

2.en: Fascinating. Can you speak, specter?
2.trans: 好迷人。妖怪，你会说话吗？

bananabush.en: The fruit is remarkably similar to the subterranean strain.
bananabush.trans: 它的果实与地下品系非常相似。

sleep.en: Winona's version is no less impressive.
sleep.trans: 薇诺娜的版本也毫不逊色。

charging.en: It is connected to a power source.

charged.en: It looks like it has sufficient power.
charged.trans: 看起来它有足够的动力。

generic.en: Winona's version is no less impressive.
generic.trans: 薇诺娜的版本也毫不逊色。

shadowthrall_wings.en: Its wings seem to be utilized for propulsion, not to remain airborne.
shadowthrall_wings.trans: 它的翅膀似乎用于推进，而非保持空中飞行。

dead.en: Considered a delicacy in some countries.
dead.trans: 这在某些国家可是一道上品佳肴。

generic.en: A amphibian tetrapod.
generic.trans: 一种两栖四足动物。

fireballstaff.en: Someone experienced with magic ought to wield this. Like myself!
fireballstaff.trans: 经历过魔法的人应该能够使用这个。比如我！

cookedmandrake.en: Mandragora officinarum, cooked in the name of discovery.
cookedmandrake.trans: 本着探索精神而做成的烤曼德拉草。

generic.en: Some kind of temporary habitation.
generic.trans: 某种临时居所。

empty.en: It has been deserted for now.
empty.trans: 现在它已经被遗弃了。

ruins_rubble.en: With a little elbow grease this could be put into working order.
ruins_rubble.trans: 只需要下一点点功夫，就可以把它弄得井井有条。

dug_bananabush.en: The fruit is remarkably similar to our own subterranean strain.
dug_bananabush.trans: 果实与我们熟知的地下品系非常相似。

treegrowthsolution.en: This fig mixture appears to induce rapid arboreal growth.
treegrowthsolution.trans: 这种无花果混合物似乎能诱发树木迅速生长。

fence_rotator.en: Sometimes sharpness is necessary to keep things aligned and orderly.
fence_rotator.trans: 有时，为了保持事物的排列有序，锐利是必要的。

wx78module_heat.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_heat.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

slingshotammo_gunpowder.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_gunpowder.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

multitool_axe_pickaxe.en: Quite functional, it operates as both an axe and a pickaxe.
multitool_axe_pickaxe.trans: 功能很强大，既能当斧子用又能当鹤嘴锄用。

telestaff.en: The gem appears to focus the nightmare fuel.
telestaff.trans: 宝石似乎将噩梦燃料的能量聚集了起来。

yotr_token.en: Traditionally, being struck with a glove implies a challenge to a duel.
yotr_token.trans: 传统上，被手套打到意味着决斗的挑战。

kabobs.en: Meat on a stick, what next?

molehat.en: Ah, to look through another creature's, uh, nose!
molehat.trans: 啊，透过另一种生物的，呃，透过它们的鼻子看世界！

fence_item.en: All the components for a wooden fence.
fence_item.trans: 一个木头栅栏的所有组件。

slurperpelt.en: This must be useful for something.

marblepillar.en: It shows the touch of a Roman artisan. How amazing.
marblepillar.trans: 它显示出罗马工匠的记忆。太了不起了。

quagmire_oven_item.en: All the parts are necessary to construct a fully functional oven.
quagmire_oven_item.trans: 需要所有部件都齐全，才能造出一台功能完整的烤箱。

squid.trans: 发光纲头足属！多么美丽的生物发光！

flower_cave_withered.en: It will not survive in these conditions.
flower_cave_withered.trans: 它无法在这种条件下存活。

teleportato_potato.trans: 既不是完全有机的也不是无机的！

saltlick.en: A cube of sodium chloride to lure wild beasts.
saltlick.trans: 一块用于引诱野兽的食盐。

pond.en: A small but deep freshwater pond.

armorskeleton.en: Now it's an exoskeleton. Ho ho!

generic.en: My old feet could use a good soak.
generic.trans: 我这双老脚应该好好泡泡了。

empty.en: The spring has dried up.
empty.trans: 泉水已经干涸了。

victorian_blueprint.en: Ah, this style does take me back...
victorian_blueprint.trans: 啊，这种风格的确让我想起了……

dreadstone.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是一种变质岩。

chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.trans: 此等可怕的融合是前所未有的。

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: A place for everything, and everything in its place.
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 什么都能装、收拾的井井有条。

burnt.en: It wasn't doing me much good anyhow.
burnt.trans: 反正它对我来说也没什么用。

generic.en: I can barely sleep on a bed, never mind the ground.
generic.trans: 即使在床上我都很难睡着，更不用说在地上了。

dumbbell_redgem.en: Careful dear, that looks suspiciously combustible.
dumbbell_redgem.trans: 小心点，亲爱的，那看起来有点易燃。

trunk_cooked.trans: 虽然不好吃，但蛋白质含量高。

spider_water.en: It's incredible that they can create enough surface tension to stay above water at that size.
spider_water.trans: 它们如此的身躯，居然还能创造足够的表面张力浮在水面，简直不可思议。

doll_blueprint.en: A bit childish for my tastes.
doll_blueprint.trans: 就我的口味而言，有些幼稚。

boat_bumper_crabking.en: A thick barrier of geocrustacean exoskeleton.
boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 厚厚的地壳外骨骼屏障。

acorn_cooked.en: The poison has been successfully cooked out of them.
acorn_cooked.trans: 已经用它们成功地制出了毒药。

quagmire_spotspice_ground.trans: 加工完毕，可以用于烹饪了。

spider_healer_item.en: This balm appears specially formulated to heal arachnids.
spider_healer_item.trans: 这种膏药似乎是专门为治疗蛛形纲动物而配制的。

firestarter.en: I'll not tolerate that behavior, %s!
firestarter.trans: %s，我忍受不了这种行为。

ghost.en: That's what you get for causing mischief, %s.
ghost.trans: 让你捉弄人，这就是你的下场，%s！

murderer.en: Enough tricks, %s! I'll finish you!
murderer.trans: 收起你的把戏%s！让我来终结你!

attacker.en: You'd best play nice now, %s.

reviver.en: Thank-you for the assistance, %s.

generic.en: You must tell me more about your species sometime, dear.
generic.trans: 你得多跟我讲讲你们这个物种的情况，亲爱的。

dock_woodposts_item.en: Unnecessary for a floating dock, but they do have a pleasant appearance.
dock_woodposts_item.trans: 对浮动码头来说没有必要，但外观确实令人愉快。

firestarter.en: Lighting fires are we now, %s? Tread carefully.
firestarter.trans: %s，我们现在要点火吗？务必小心。

ghost.en: Stings, doesn't it dear? Let me fetch you a heart.
ghost.trans: 亲爱的，刺痛对吗？让我给你拿到心。

murderer.en: Fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice... you're dead!
murderer.trans: 又骗我，你太无耻！骗了我两次…你死定了！

attacker.en: Up to your old tricks, are you %s?

reviver.en: There's good in you, %s.

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

purebrilliance.en: Pure energy, in a crystalline form.
purebrilliance.trans: 以晶体形式存在的纯粹能量。

mask_treehat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_treehat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

fishmeat_small_dried.trans: 虽然有点咸，但还是很令人满意。

compostwrap.en: Oh dear. Those are some large droppings.

nonslipgritboosted.en: I won't have to fear slipping with this sprinkled on the ground.
nonslipgritboosted.trans: 只要在地面撒上这些，我就无需担心打滑问题了。

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: I should be able to assemble it easily enough.
carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.trans: 我应该能够很容易地组装它。

picked.en: It requires hydration before it can fruit again.
picked.trans: 它需要经过水合作用才能再次结果。

inground.en: It is dormant this time of day.
inground.trans: 每天这个时候它会休眠。

generic.en: It is a fungus.
generic.trans: 它是一种菌类植物。

gravy.en: Oh my, it's a bit rich for me.
gravy.trans: 哎呀，我吃不了这么腻的东西。

burning.en: It's the safest course of action.
burning.trans: 这是最安全的处理方案。

reviving.en: Goodness! Something is reanimating the body!
reviving.trans: 天啊！有什么东西正在使尸体复活！

generic.en: It might be prudent to dispose of the body.
generic.trans: 还是谨慎一些，处理掉尸体为好。

maxwellphonograph.en: It appears to have no power source.

junk_pile.en: I may find something of use within.
junk_pile.trans: 我可能会在里面找到一些有用的东西。

generic.en: Mankind has used winches for many hundreds of years.
generic.trans: 人类使用绞盘已经有几百年的历史了。

carrot.trans: 胡萝卜。不仅可以吃，而且很美味。

decor_lamp.en: Now I can read my books at night.
decor_lamp.trans: 这下我晚上也能看书了。

wagdrone_parts.trans: 收集的零件可用于维修。

upgraded_stacksize.en: A fireproof chest with an impossibly expansive interior.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 一个防火箱子，内部空间大得惊人。

generic.en: Scales! Scales are the winner!
generic.trans: 鳞片！鳞片才是最终的胜利者！

i_won.en: Oh ho! Superb results, if I do say so myself.
i_won.trans: 噢，吼！不得不说，这是出色的成绩。

someone_else_won.trans: "备注: {winner}的标本展现出卓越的竞速能力。"

generic.en: I'm eager to document the results!
generic.trans: 我渴望记录结果！

burnt.en: Oh dear, that won't do at all.
Not much of an aid now.
burnt.trans: 现在可没太大的帮助了。

generic.en: A navigational aid. "You are here".
generic.trans: 导航辅助标志，表明“你在这里”。

nitre_formation.en: The acidic rain seems to have caused a chemical reaction, producing these formations.
nitre_formation.trans: 酸雨似乎引起了化学反应，产生了这些堆块。

poop.en: A quantity of animal feces. How fragrant.

lightninggoathorn.en: There must be something unnatural in the horn.
lightninggoathorn.trans: 羊角里面肯定有某种非自然的东西。

mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.trans: 一个非常明智的安全措施。

yotr_decor_2_item.en: It would look quite nice right over there.

beeswax_spray.en: It has an unpleasantly astringent odor.

uncovered.en: They say every block of stone has a statue inside.
uncovered.trans: 他们说每块石头里面都有个雕像。

finished.en: The structure is whole once again.

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: Increases the capacity of a storage container by a, frankly, absurd degree.
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 对存储容器的容量进行，坦率的讲，荒诞的提升。

chesspiece_pawn.en: Pawns that journey to the seat of power can be quite dangerous.
chesspiece_pawn.trans: 寻求权力宝座的兵卒可能会相当危险。

turf_sinkhole.en: The ground. You step on it.

wall_stone_item.en: I'll carry them. My strong backbone always was my best asset.
wall_stone_item.trans: 我会带着它们。我有力的后背一直是我最大的财富。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.trans: 这斑斓的彩纸表现的是环节动物。

moonglass.en: Perhaps I could keep a sample and study the composition.
moonglass.trans: 也许我能留一个样本，研究它的成分。

complete.en: Oh! A specimen fit for a museum!

funny.en: Paleontological incompetence has produced a sad excuse for a creature.
funny.trans: 古生物学的无能给生物捏造了一个悲哀的借口。

generic.en: There are pieces of the skeleton still yet to be assembled.
generic.trans: 还有骨架碎片需要组合起来。

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: Such a mask could only belong to one whose mastery was forged through relentless work.
mask_ancient_masonhat.trans: 此面具的主人通过不懈努力完善了自身的技艺。

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: It appears simple enough to construct.

quagmire_potato_seeds.trans: 茄科茄属植物马铃薯的变异种子。

warglet.en: This Canis needs a lesson in manners.
warglet.trans: 这只小犬需要学习礼貌。

burnt.en: That was myco-illogical. Ho ho!

off.en: A bioluminescent fungus. Neither Agaricales nor Xylariales.
off.trans: 一株生物性发光的真菌。既不是伞菌目，也不是炭角菌目。

record_end.en: The music was better back in my day.
record_end.trans: 我那个时代的音乐更好。

goldenpitchfork.en: The most malleable of metals, but let's see how this tills.
goldenpitchfork.trans: 黄金是最具可塑性的金属，不过我们还是先看看它松土的效果吧。

asparagus_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
asparagus_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

critter_perdling.en: What a handsome poult you are!
critter_perdling.trans: 你是一只多么好看的小火鸡啊！

kitcoonden_kit.en: Materials to construct a proper kitten household.

kelp_cooked.en: That certainly didn't improve the texture.

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: Its effect appears to be stronger at night.
oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.trans: 它在夜晚能更好的发挥效用。

powcake.en: The crowning achievement of the agricultural-industrial complex.
powcake.trans: 农业与工业结合所产生的最伟大成就。

generic.en: How very pagan.
generic.trans: 真是异教徒的作风。

burnt.en: It has been smote.

recharging.en: It appears to require some time to replenish its power between uses.
recharging.trans: 在两次使用之间，它似乎需要一些时间来补充其能量。

generic.en: Horology mixed with magic, truly fascinating.
generic.trans: 钟表学与魔法混合在一起，真的很吸引人。

alterguardianhatshard.en: These shards hold a significant amount of energy on their own.
alterguardianhatshard.trans: 这些碎片存储了大量能量。

smallghost.en: Your adorable appearance won't make me believe in you!
smallghost.trans: 单靠你可爱的样子不足以赢得我的信任！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: It seems to work in conjunction with precipitation.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 好像是配合降水使用的。

battlesong_fireresistance.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_fireresistance.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

builtup.en: Improving your living space can do wonders for one's mood.
builtup.trans: 提升居住空间能极大改善一个人的心情。

generic.en: Tsk. Look at the state of it...
generic.trans: 啧啧。瞧瞧它的状态……

struggle.trans: 看起来魔法正在准备中。

generic.en: A decorative stone carving of a bishop chess piece.
generic.trans: 一块雕刻成主教象棋棋子的装饰性石头。

mask_toadyhat.en: We all have our role to play.
mask_toadyhat.trans: 人人都有自己要扮演的角色。

quagmire_sapbucket.en: A simple implement for tapping trees.

generic.en: It will attract large electromagnets, but only once activated.
generic.trans: 它能吸引大型电磁铁，但首先要先启动它。

activated.en: The magnetic beacon has been activated.

shadowheart.en: This... This is no child's magic.

generic.en: The sleeping Megadrilacea Oraduos.
generic.trans: 睡着的拥有两张嘴的蚯蚓。

open.en: Concentric rings of teeth for rapid ingestion.
open.trans: 一圈圈的牙齿是为了帮助下咽的。

sweettea.en: It's as if all my worries and cares are fading away.
sweettea.trans: 仿佛我所有的烦恼和忧虑都消失了。

battlesong_instant_panic.en: Ah, how I love the classics!
battlesong_instant_panic.trans: 啊，我最喜欢那些古典的唱词了！

hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.en: Sometimes a little madness is appropriate.
hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.trans: 有时候，适量的疯狂也是可以接受的。

pondfish.en: Some kind of whitefish, I believe.
pondfish.trans: 我猜应该是某种白鲑鱼。

dragonbodyhat.en: The longer the dragon, the better the luck.

moon_altar_icon.en: It's projecting a sense of urgency into my mind.
moon_altar_icon.trans: 它把一种紧迫感投射到了我的心中。

icestaff.trans: 某种能产生冰冻效果的奇妙装置。

carrat_ghostracer.trans: 真是迷人！是全新的物种吗？

generic.en: How interesting, it seems to produce its own heat from within.
generic.trans: 真有趣，它似乎能从内部产生热量。

mosquitofertilizer.en: There is a direct correlation between the fertilizer's efficacy and odor.
mosquitofertilizer.trans: 肥料的效果与臭味成正比。

trap_teeth.en: It's covered with a thin film of canine digestive fluid.
trap_teeth.trans: 它覆盖着一层薄薄的犬科动物消化液。

quagmire_key_park.en: I believe this is for the park.
quagmire_key_park.trans: 我相信这是用来打开公园大门的。

wall_ruins_item.en: My pockets must be bigger on the inside.
wall_ruins_item.trans: 我的口袋比从外面看起来能装。

trap_bramble.en: Microscopic barbs on the thorns make them quite unpleasant.
trap_bramble.trans: 荆棘上密布着微小的倒钩，令人十分不悦。

held.en: Their bioluminescent properties might prove useful.
held.trans: 它们那会发光的身体也许会有用。

generic.en: They disperse when I approach.
generic.trans: 每当我走近时它们就会散开。

dragonfruit_cooked.trans: 精心制作的量天尺属火龙果。

blackflag.en: Historically, pirates also sailed under red or white flags.
blackflag.trans: 历史上，海盗也曾打着红旗或白旗航行。

wagboss_robot.en: It only poses a threat if he fails to control it.
wagboss_robot.trans: 只有在他失控时才会构成威胁。

alterguardian_contained.en: I wonder what he means to do with all that energy.
alterguardian_contained.trans: 不知道他要那么多的能量做什么。

roastturkey.en: I do hope it had enough time in the oven.

vault_orb.en: This orb constitutes an essential component of a particle transfer apparatus.
vault_orb.trans: 此球体是粒子传输装置的重要组件。

pirate_stash.en: That appears to be the location indicated on the map.
pirate_stash.trans: 这似乎是地图上指示的地点。

gelblob_storage_kit.trans: 一种简单的食品保存方法。

minotaurhorn.en: An amazingly large horn. I wonder if the nightmare helped fuel the growth.
minotaurhorn.trans: 它的角也太大了吧。真有点怀疑是不是借助噩梦燃料才长这么大的。

held.en: I'm a carrier of a carrier of genetic information.
held.trans: 我是遗传信息携带者的携带者。

generic.en: A soft blue carrier of genetic information.
generic.trans: 遗传信息的淡绿携带者。

spoiled_fish.en: That fish matter is becoming a biohazard.
spoiled_fish.trans: 那块鱼肉已经变成了生物危害物。

generic.en: A generically coniferous tree.
generic.trans: 一棵普通的针叶树。

burnt.en: A carbonized tree.

battlesong_container.en: A specialized container for sheet music.

animal_track.en: A sign of animal activity. Leads away.
animal_track.trans: 动物活动的标志。指向某个方向。

wagboss_robot_leg.en: The material seemed able to contain the being's power for a time.
wagboss_robot_leg.trans: 这种材料似乎能暂时容纳该存在的力量。

costume_blacksmith_body.en: It appears to be a theatrical costume.

wx78module_maxhunger.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.en: Goodness, I've no desire to wear such a thing.
lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.trans: 天啊，我才不想戴这样的东西。

quagmire_pebblecrab.en: I should like to study its shell more closely.
quagmire_pebblecrab.trans: 我想更近距离观察它的壳。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.en: It has returned bursting with lunar energy.

walterhat.en: I suppose one must try to stay young at heart.
walterhat.trans: 我想，人必须努力保持年轻的心态。

oceanfish_small_9.en: It's not unlike the Toxotes jaculator, though the coloring is unusual.
oceanfish_small_9.trans: 虽说颜色不同寻常，但与射水鱼并无二致。

playing.en: One's timing must be precise to win.
playing.trans: 必须精确把握时机才能获胜。

generic.en: I believe it requires a form of currency to start.
generic.trans: 我相信它需要用某种货币来启动。

oceanfish_small_6.en: Curious, it seems to be camouflaged for the wrong environment.
oceanfish_small_6.trans: 有意思，它似乎伪装错了环境。

battlesong_durability.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_durability.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

oceanfish_small_5.en: I don't think I'm familiar with this genus...

dragonpie.en: I do love a nice fruit pie.

oceanfish_small_8.en: Careful not to look directly at it, dears.
oceanfish_small_8.trans: 小心啊，孩子们，一定不要直视它。

oceanfish_small_7.en: Oh my, you'd look right at home in my old garden.
oceanfish_small_7.trans: 哎呀，你简直太搭配我家里那个花园了。

oceanfish_small_2.en: A smaller species of saltwater fish.

oceanfish_small_4.en: I believe they only grow to about this size.
oceanfish_small_4.trans: 它们只能长到这样大小。

burning.en: Hm. I suppose it was quite flammable.

generic.en: Ah, excellent. No more leaving clothes on branches to get wrinkled.
generic.trans: 啊，太好了。不会再出现把衣服挂在树枝上，衣服变得皱巴巴这种事了。

burnt.en: Pity. He was such a jolly fellow.
burnt.trans: 遗憾。他是这样欢乐的家伙。

beehive.en: The natural home of the bee.

cookedmeat.en: It is slightly more appetizing when cooked.
cookedmeat.trans: 烤熟后味道会更好一点。

firestarter.en: I know that fire wasn't for cooking, dear.
firestarter.trans: 亲爱的，我知道那火不是拿来做饭的。

ghost.en: We'd best get you back on your feet, dear.
ghost.trans: 亲爱的，咱们想办法让你重新站起来。

murderer.en: I smell fresh baked murder on the air. Attack!
murderer.trans: 空气里有新鲜出炉的谋杀味。我不客气了！

attacker.en: No need to cause a ruckus now, %s.

reviver.en: Excellent work today, %s.

generic.en: Ah, greetings, dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊，你好，亲爱的%s！

chesspiece_klaus.trans: 把季节的细节刻画的活灵活现。

quagmire_trader_merm.en: They appear to have been quarantined. How foolish.
quagmire_trader_merm.trans: 他们似乎被隔离了。真愚蠢。

generic.en: What a dear Fratercula corniculata!
generic.trans: 亲爱的长角海鹦属鸟儿！

record_efs.en: The music was better back in my day.
record_efs.trans: 我那个时代的音乐更好。

poweroff.en: The design is reminiscent of the Gateways we've traversed through before.
poweroff.trans: 这个设计让我联想到了我们之前穿越过的大门。

generic.en: A shame, it appears to no longer be operational.
generic.trans: 真遗憾，它似乎已经不能再运行了。

carrot_planted.en: Daucus carota is a root vegetable.
carrot_planted.trans: 胡萝卜是一种根用蔬菜。

ghost.en: Oh dear, even after all the precautions you took?
ghost.trans: 哦，亲爱的，即使你采取了所有的预防措施还是沦落至此吗？

firestarter.en: Surely you have the foresight to know that's unwise, don't you?
firestarter.trans: 你肯定有先见之明，知道那是不明智的，不是吗？

murderer.en: You should have known you wouldn't get away with it, %s. Attack!
murderer.trans: 你应该知道这么做的后果，%s。我动手了！

attacker.en: Really %s, you need to set a better example for the children.
attacker.trans: %s，你实在应该为孩子们树立一个好榜样。

reviver.en: I appreciate you taking the time, dear.
reviver.trans: 感谢你抽出时间救人，亲爱的。

generic.en: Greetings dear %s! Do you have any new insights on what lies ahead?
generic.trans: 你好，亲爱的%s！ 你对未来的事情有什么新洞察吗？

carpentry_blade_moonglass.en: A moon glass saw blade. Sharp enough to cut stone.
carpentry_blade_moonglass.trans: 一个月光玻璃锯片。足够锋利，可以切割石头。

tentacle_pillar_arm.en: A tiny horror waiting in the mud.
tentacle_pillar_arm.trans: 埋伏在淤泥里的小怪物。

boat_bumper_kelp.en: A thick barrier of Nereocystis luetkeana.
boat_bumper_kelp.trans: 一个厚厚的褐藻门海带科屏障。

ghostlyelixir_shadow.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

malbatross_beak.en: These beaks are designed to catch slippery prey.
malbatross_beak.trans: 他们的喙进化的非常适合抓住溜滑的猎物。

hermithotspring_constr.en: It is a hot spring for soaking underneath that tarp.
hermithotspring_constr.trans: 那块油布盖着的是泡澡用的温泉。

manrabbit_tail.en: They use their tails to balance.
manrabbit_tail.trans: 它们利用尾巴保持平衡。

merm_armory_upgraded.en: "Mermfolk Ownlee"? Hm. I see more spelling lessons are in order.
merm_armory_upgraded.trans: “止给鱼人用”？嗯。看来还得多上几节拼写课。

houndwhistle.en: It emits a frequency undetectable to the human ear.
houndwhistle.trans: 它发出一种人耳无法察觉的频率。

beefalotreat.en: We all could use a little treat from time to time.
beefalotreat.trans: 谁都喜欢偶尔吃两口好吃的。

burning.en: That ought to prevent any more mishaps.
burning.trans: 这下应该可以阻止更多的不幸了。

reviving.en: Fascinating, it's reanimating before my eyes.
reviving.trans: 难以置信，竟然在我眼前复活了。

generic.en: It would be in our best interest to dispose of it quickly.
generic.trans: 尽快处理掉尸体符合我们的核心利益。

uncommon.en: It appears to be of a slightly upgraded rarity.

rare.en: I believe this is among the rarest of the whole collection.
rare.trans: 我相信这是整个系列中最稀有的品种。

generic.en: It would look lovely in a little curio cabinet, don't you think?
generic.trans: 它放在小的珍宝柜里会很可爱，你不觉得吗？

collapsedchest.en: It would be prudent to rebuild the chest, rather than leave all this lying about.
collapsedchest.trans: 审慎起见，我们应该重建这个箱子，而不是把这些东西随地乱丢。

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: It appears simple enough to construct.

alterguardianhat.en: The multitudes of knowledge it contains... if only I could write it all down...
alterguardianhat.trans: 它所包含的知识如此广阔……我要是能全部记录下来就好了……

compost.en: The secret to any garden's success is nutrient-rich soil.
compost.trans: 任何花园的成功秘诀都是营养丰富的土壤。

generic.en: A Porcine tribute.
generic.trans: 猪的供品。

burnt.en: No use to me like this.
burnt.trans: 像这样对我是没用的了。

empty.en: It needs a sacrifice of meat.
empty.trans: 它需要祭肉。

quagmire_mealingstone.trans: 这是能把我们的材料磨成粉的机械工具。

marbleshrub.trans: 对灌木修剪法来说并不理想。

cannonball_rock_item.en: A suitable projectile for a cannon.

balloonparty.en: A reasonable amount of cheer every so often would do us good.
balloonparty.trans: 每隔一段时间，合理的欢乐会对我们有好处。

winter_ornament.trans: 现在对它小心点，亲爱的。

pepper_oversized.en: The result of proper research, planning and care.
pepper_oversized.trans: 适当研究、规划和照顾的结果。

cookiecutter.en: Its eyes seem fixed to my raft.
cookiecutter.trans: 它的眼睛盯死了我的筏子。

wasphive.en: I had best keep my distance.

batcave.en: This nook is actually a dwelling.
batcave.trans: 这个隐蔽的地方实际上是一处居所。

butterflymuffin.en: Who knew butterflies made such nice baked goods?
butterflymuffin.trans: 用蝴蝶居然可以做出这么好的烘焙食品，谁知道呢？

balatro_machine.en: One must know when the time for games has passed. Now is not that time.
balatro_machine.trans: 人必须知道什么时候该停止游戏。现在还不是时候。

saddle_war.en: A favorite perch of generals and assorted warlords.
saddle_war.trans: 将军和各类军阀喜欢的位置。

perogies.trans: 很好吃的饺子，口味很温和。

spidergland.en: This gland secretes a mildly toxic venom.
spidergland.trans: 这个腺体会分泌出一种低毒性的毒液。

dumbbell_gem.en: A bit of exercise can be quite beneficial to one's health.
dumbbell_gem.trans: 做点运动对健康相当有益。

turf_marsh.en: The ground. You step on it.

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

yotd_anchor_item.en: It will allow us to create an anchor for our ships.
yotd_anchor_item.trans: 这能让我们给船造一个锚。

tree_rock_sapling.en: The Boulderbough gradually accumulates minerals from its surroundings, maturing until it may be harvested.
tree_rock_sapling.trans: 巨石枝逐渐从周围环境中积累矿物质，成熟后便可采收。

record_dawn.en: I can't imagine where one would find a record press out here.
record_dawn.trans: 我无法想象能在哪找到唱片印刷机。

stump.en: As I thought, the sense of unease has passed.
stump.trans: 正如我所想的那样，不安感已经过去了。

generic.en: Could the sense of unease I feel be a part of its defense mechanism?
generic.trans: 我感到的不安会不会是它防御机制的一部分？

ghost.en: Goodness, this just won't do. Let me find you a heart, %s.
ghost.trans: 天哪，这不行。%s，让我给你找到心。

firestarter.en: Who gave you flammable materials, %s?
firestarter.trans: %s，谁给你易燃材料？

murderer.en: Someone needs to teach you some manners, %s!
murderer.trans: 你需要有人好好教教你礼仪了，%s！

attacker.en: %s! That's enough out of you, young lady!

reviver.en: You're a dear, %s. And so uniquely qualified to handle specters!
reviver.trans: %s，亲爱的。你独具能力，能够胜任对付妖怪的任务！

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

oceanwhirlbigportalexit.en: It appears to be sea debris and remnants from our watercraft.
oceanwhirlbigportalexit.trans: 这是我们的水上载具留下的残骸和碎屑。

slingshotammo_marble.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_marble.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

asparagus_oversized.en: It's quite the source of fiber!
asparagus_oversized.trans: 它是非常好的纤维来源!

rat.en: Oh my, look at it go!

burnt.en: I'm afraid it won't be of much use to anyone now.
burnt.trans: 恐怕它对任何人都没什么大用处了。

generic.en: Speed is no replacement for cleverness, but it helps.
generic.trans: 速度不能代替聪明，但是有一定的帮助。

redpouch.en: The vibrant red hue is a sign of good luck.
redpouch.trans: 活力满满的红色月眼是好运的象征。

potato.en: Solanum tuberosum, a staple in some cultures.
potato.trans: 茄科茄属植物马铃薯，在某些文化里属于主食。

snowcovered.en: Its growth has been halted by the extreme cold.
snowcovered.trans: 它的生长受到了极度寒冷的阻碍。

stuffed.en: We ought to pick them before they outgrow their planter.
stuffed.trans: 我们应当在它们长过头之前把它们摘下来。

rotten.en: The state of decomposition is too advanced to support any specimens.
rotten.trans: 腐烂的状态太超前了，没法支持任何标本了。

burnt.en: Carbonized by an exothermic chemical reaction.
burnt.trans: 被一个发出热量的化学反应所碳化。

empty.en: It must first be seeded with a cut specimen or fungal spore.
empty.trans: 它首先必须用切好的标本或真菌孢子进行播种。

mermguard_shadow.en: This development has me feeling rather uneasy.
mermguard_shadow.trans: 这一发展让我感到相当不安。

slingshotammo_freeze.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_freeze.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

burning.en: I'm relieved to see it go.
burning.trans: 看到它消失，我总算松了一口气。

reviving.en: Oh dear. It seems I'm too late.
reviving.trans: 哦，亲爱的。看来我来不及了。

generic.en: It could lead to trouble if it's not promptly disposed of.
generic.trans: 如果不及时处理，可能会招致麻烦。

mandrake_cooked.en: Mandragora officinarum, cooked in the name of discovery.
mandrake_cooked.trans: 本着探索精神而做成的烤曼德拉草。

shark.en: Fascinating! The entire jaw seems to be comprised of living stone!
shark.trans: 太神奇了！整个下巴似乎是由活石组成的！

quagmire_sap.en: This tree sap has extraordinary glucose content.

tophat.trans: 一看就是资产阶级的东西。

wagstaff_npc.en: He seems to be conducting research on the storm, I should assist him.
wagstaff_npc.trans: 他似乎在研究风暴，我应该帮助他。

armor_bramble.en: I believe our friend knit it himself.
armor_bramble.trans: 由我们的好朋友亲手编织而成。

boat_ancient_item.en: The style is reminiscent of the ships from days of old.
boat_ancient_item.trans: 其风格让人联想到昔日的船只。

dumbbell_marble.en: A bit of exercise can be quite beneficial to one's health.
dumbbell_marble.trans: 做点运动对健康相当有益。

minerhat.en: This would make a great reading light.
minerhat.trans: 这会成为一个很好的阅读灯。

anchor.trans: 这个锚可以装在我们的舰艇上。

leafymeatburger.en: At least I shouldn't have to worry about it being undercooked.
leafymeatburger.trans: 至少我不用担心不够熟。

book_elemental.trans: 一本拥有强大召唤力量的大书。

generic.en: It deconstructs the subject and reconstitutes them elsewhere.
generic.trans: 它把对象解构，并在其他地方重构。

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: I must commend the artist for their attention to detail.
chesspiece_guardianphase3.trans: 我想特别表扬一下艺术家的细节呈现。

eyeplant.en: I believe they are controlled by the larger plant.
eyeplant.trans: 我相信它们肯定被更大的植物控制着。

healingstaff.trans: 这是吃力不讨好的活儿。

goggleshat.en: I can't imagine these improving visibility.
goggleshat.trans: 我不能想象这些能提高能见度。

coontail.trans: 柔软灵活的躯干附属物。

growing.en: The Apis mellifera are constructing a new hive.
growing.trans: 西方蜜蜂在建造一个新的蜂巢。

generic.en: Thick Apis mellifera honeycomb.
generic.trans: 密集的西方蜜蜂蜂巢。

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: It appears simple enough to construct.

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: A rather eccentric design, yet surprisingly effective.
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 不同寻常的设计，但却出奇有效。

ruins_bat.en: An implement for administering devastating blows.
ruins_bat.trans: 实施毁灭性打击的工具。

moonstorm_static_item.en: This device appears to keep the energy contained, somehow.
moonstorm_static_item.trans: 这个设备好像以某种方式遏制了能量。

generic.en: Those mineral deposits may have irritated it into hostility.
generic.trans: 土壤中的矿物质可能激发了它的敌意。

held.en: The plant and animal matter has fused in total harmony.
held.trans: 动植物和谐的融合在了一起。

generic.en: My, another plant and animal hybrid. How odd.
generic.trans: 惊人啊，又一种动植物杂交品种。多么神奇。

lore2.en: A depiction of an extinction-level event.
lore2.trans: 这是对灭绝级事件的描绘。

lore3.en: These must be the soldier caste of the ancient insect society.
lore3.trans: 这些一定是古代昆虫社会的士兵阶层。

lore1.en: It appears the ancient king has forfeited his very essence to the darkness.
lore1.trans: 看来古代国王已将自己献给了黑暗。

anchor_item.en: It will allow us to create an anchor for our ships.
anchor_item.trans: 这能让我们给船造一个锚。

rock_moon.en: Implications of a lunar body? Interesting.

yellowgem.en: Perhaps it is similar to citrine.

charlie_lecturn.en: It lists the characters in the next act.
charlie_lecturn.trans: 它列出了下一幕中的角色。

atrium_overgrowth.en: It would take much too long to decipher.
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 破解译文需要太长的时间。

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: We ought to put it up by the sodium spring.
quagmire_salt_rack_item.trans: 我们应该把它放在盐泉边。

miniflare.en: It's safer for everyone to stick together.
miniflare.trans: 人群聚在一起会安全一点。

rabbitking_lucky.en: That is a rabbit worth capturing.
rabbitking_lucky.trans: 那是一只具有捕获价值的兔子。

berries_cooked.en: Roasted Ardisia crenata, just in case.
berries_cooked.trans: 烤朱砂根浆果，只是为了以防万一。

mushtree_moon.en: I suspect some property in the water caused it to change.
mushtree_moon.trans: 我怀疑是水中的一些物质导致了它的变化。

spiderqueen.en: That must be the center of the hive-mind.
spiderqueen.trans: 那肯定就是蜘蛛们的首脑了吧。

tacklestation.en: I can improve my chances of success with better fishing implements.
tacklestation.trans: 工欲善其事，必先利其器。

growing.en: It is not yet ready for harvest.

generic.en: It's a... plant. Of some kind.
generic.trans: 这是...植物。对，某种植物。

quagmire_pot_hanger_item.en: The old fashioned way to cook over a fire.
quagmire_pot_hanger_item.trans: 在明火上煮东西的老式方法。

hammer_mjolnir.trans: 那个好像用起来会很费力。

inert.en: Those impressions appear to have been made to house gems.

generic.en: I wonder if its size is natural or caused by lunar mutations?
generic.trans: 不知它硕大的体型是天然演化，还是月光引起的突变？

hungry.en: Please keep your voice level to a minimum.
hungry.trans: 请把你的声音压到最低。

sleeping.en: It seems to have had too much excitement.
sleeping.trans: 好像兴奋过头了，现在累得睡着了。

generic.en: An adolescent avian.
generic.trans: 还处于青少年阶段的鸟。

greenmooneye.en: That should help us keep our bearings.
greenmooneye.trans: 那会帮助我们保持我们的方位。

krampus_sack.en: It seems bigger inside than out.

held.en: I'm a carrier of a carrier of genetic information.
held.trans: 我是遗传信息携带者的携带者。

generic.en: A lovely green carrier of genetic information.
generic.trans: 遗传信息的可爱绿色的携带者。

halloweencandy_9.en: I had best not hear of any tummy aches later.
halloweencandy_9.trans: 最好我之后不会听到任何肚子疼的话。

hiding.en: Something devious is lurking in the shadows.
hiding.trans: 某些不光明的东西正在暗影中潜行。

robot_blueprint.en: I'm not certain just how much sewing is actually involved.
robot_blueprint.trans: 我不确定到底需要多少缝纫工作。

halloweencandy_7.en: I'll take the ones you don't want, dears.
halloweencandy_7.trans: 你们不要的都给我，亲爱的。

mask_dollhat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_dollhat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

slurtleslime.en: Their mucus is explosive for some reason.
slurtleslime.trans: 它们的黏液由于某种原因会发生爆炸。

koalefant_winter.en: Koalefanta Proboscidea in thick winter pelage.
koalefant_winter.trans: 顶着厚厚的御寒毛皮的长鼻目考拉象。

halloweencandy_1.en: Remember to eat in moderation, children.
halloweencandy_1.trans: 记得吃东西要有节制，孩子们。

generic.en: The dark gelatinous substance, colloquially known as Icker, will preserve our food items.
generic.trans: 这种深色凝胶状物质，俗称恶液，可以保存我们的食物。

full.en: The contents are perfectly safe to consume.
full.trans: 内容物可完全安全食用。

halloweencandy_2.en: Delightfully colored kernels of high fructose corn syrup.
halloweencandy_2.trans: 高果糖玉米糖浆颜色赏心悦目的糖心。

recharging.en: It appears to require some time to replenish its power between uses.
recharging.trans: 在两次使用之间，它似乎需要一些时间来补充其能量。

generic.en: Horology mixed with magic, truly fascinating.
generic.trans: 钟表学与魔法混合在一起，真的很吸引人。

halloweencandy_5.en: It almost seems a shame to eat them.
halloweencandy_5.trans: 吃它们几乎就是一件愧事。

halloweencandy_6.en: I'd prefer none of you eat these at all.

halloweencandy_3.en: Hmm, well, at least there's a healthy option on the table.
halloweencandy_3.trans: 嗯，好吧，至少桌子上有一种健康食品。

starving.trans: 这个生物需要立即进食！

content.en: I have to admit it is rather appealing.

generic.en: A healthy larval dragonfly.
generic.trans: 一只健康的幼小岩浆虫。

halloweencandy_4.en: I was always a fan of black licorice, myself.
halloweencandy_4.trans: 我自己一直很喜欢黑色甘草。

wx78module_music.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_music.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

salty_doghat.en: It gives one quite a commanding appearance.
salty_doghat.trans: 它让人看起来很有威严。

ceviche.en: Could use a little more sauce.

blueamulet.en: The gem appears to be sucking energy out anything it touches.
blueamulet.trans: 这个宝石无论接触到什么东西，似乎都会把它们的能量吸走。

petals_evil_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

cookiecutterhat.en: Hm, it has a very disagreeable odor.

lightcrab.en: Their translucent shells allow the bioluminescence of their bodies to shine through.
lightcrab.trans: 它们的半透明外壳使它们身体的生物荧光得以闪现。

bootleg.en: As far as teleportation methods go, it's quite unrefined.
bootleg.trans: 就传送技术而言，它还很不完善。

deer_gemmed.en: The poor creature has been forcibly fused to a magic gem.
deer_gemmed.trans: 那可怜的生物已经被强制性地融合到一颗魔法宝石中了。

moon_fissure_plugged.en: Goodness, that must have required some tenacity!
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 老天啊，堵了这么多，多么坚持不懈啊！

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: Oh my. That looks like rather advanced magic for her reading level.
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 噢，天啊。对她的阅读水平来说，这看起来是相当高级的魔法。

generic.en: A storage chest.
generic.trans: 一个储物箱。

burnt.en: The charred skeleton of a storage chest.

boat_ancient_container.en: This vessel is outfitted with a convenient storage receptacle.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 该船配有一个方便的储物箱。

grass_umbrella.en: A dainty parasol that will provide moderate protection.
grass_umbrella.trans: 可以提供一定程度保护的美丽阳伞。

generic.en: A sensible safety precaution.
generic.trans: 合理的安全措施。

burnt.en: I do hope she'll build another.

gestalt.en: They are the projections of something stronger.
gestalt.trans: 是某种强大力量的投射物。

lunarplant_husk.en: An extremely resilient material. I should make use of it.
lunarplant_husk.trans: 极其坚韧的材料。我要利用好它。

quagmire_pot_small.en: Hmmm, what shall we make next?
quagmire_pot_small.trans: 嗯，我们接下来要煮什么呢？

bonestew.en: Not quite how mum used to make, but it smells superb!
bonestew.trans: 虽然和妈妈以前做的不太一样，但闻起来很香！

yotb_stage_item.en: I suppose it's not going to construct itself.
yotb_stage_item.trans: 我认为它不能自己完成搭建。

phonograph.en: The music was better back in my day.
phonograph.trans: 我那个时代的音乐更好。

halloween_ornament_1.en: An ornamental poltergeist meant to be hung somewhere.
halloween_ornament_1.trans: 一个适合挂起来当做装饰的淘气鬼。

halloween_ornament_2.trans: 一大批会飞的哺乳动物。

halloween_ornament_3.en: An arborator adornment of the arachnid variety.

rat.en: Who's a clever little Daucus carota rattus?
rat.trans: 谁是个聪明的野胡萝卜呢？

generic.en: This will put the creature's sense of direction to the test.
generic.trans: 这将考验这个生物的方向感。

burnt.en: I'm afraid it won't be of much use to anyone now.
burnt.trans: 恐怕它对任何人都没什么大用处了。

halloween_ornament_5.en: An ornament such as this should be hung up.
halloween_ornament_5.trans: 这样的装饰物就该挂起来。

halloween_ornament_6.en: A corvus such as this would do better in a tree.
halloween_ornament_6.trans: 这种乌鸦似的东西比较适合挂在树上。
