costume_princess_body.en: These garments are indicative of royal status.
costume_princess_body.trans: 这些服饰昭示着皇亲国戚的身份。

generic.en: The native Meleagris flock to it.
generic.trans: 天真的火鸡成群跑向它。

burnt.en: A carbonized structure.

empty.en: A bush must be placed to attract the Meleagris.
empty.trans: 必须放一丛灌木来吸引火鸡。

nightmaregrowth.en: These crystalline structures do not appear to be natural.
nightmaregrowth.trans: 这些晶体结构似乎不是天然的。

cutreeds.trans: 一些割下来的灯芯草属植物。

pinecone_sapling.trans: 快要成熟的针叶树种子。

ancient_statue.en: This seems mystically aligned to the world.
ancient_statue.trans: 它似乎与现实世界存在某种神秘的联系。

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.en: An easily constructed speed testing device.

rat.en: I do believe its reaction time is improving!
rat.trans: 能看出它的反应时间在提高！

generic.en: This should be a good test of reflexes.
generic.trans: 它能很好的考验反应能力。

burnt.en: I'm afraid it won't be of much use to anyone now.
burnt.trans: 恐怕它对任何人都没什么大用处了。

book_moon.en: Investigating the ancient archives proved to be quite educational.
book_moon.trans: 事实证明，调查远古档案是相当有教育意义的。

turtillus.en: Best steer clear of those spikes, dear.
turtillus.trans: 亲爱的，你最好弄掉那些尖刺吧。

shadowdigger.en: Well, I suppose we did need an extra set of hands... Hm.
shadowdigger.trans: 好吧，我想我们确实需要额外的人手…嗯。

generic.en: A burial mound.
generic.trans: 一座墓冢。

lunarplanthat.en: It does not fit well over my glasses, but I suppose I must make do.
lunarplanthat.trans: 戴着眼镜不是很贴脸，但是先凑合一下吧。

stuffedeggplant.en: This aubergine has been cooked and packed with comestibles.
stuffedeggplant.trans: 茄子已经被做成菜了，和食物包在一起。

turfcraftingstation.en: I surmise this was a crucial part of ancient farming methods.
turfcraftingstation.trans: 我推测这是古代农耕体系的一个重要组成部分。

active.en: This machine can be used to travel between worlds.
active.trans: 这个机器可以用来在不同世界之间传送。

locked.en: The device needs to be activated.
locked.trans: 这个机器需要启动才能用。

partial.en: The device is in a partial state of completion.
partial.trans: 这个机器还没有完全完成。

generic.en: This runestone has unique geometric properties!
generic.trans: 这块符文石有独特的几何性质！

chesspiece_toadstool.en: The artist captured the parasitic relationship beautifully.
chesspiece_toadstool.trans: 艺术家美丽的捕捉到了这种寄生关系。

houndbone.en: The endoskeleton of Canis lupus, definitely not familiaris.
houndbone.trans: 是灰狼的内骨骼，绝对不是家犬的。

hivehat.trans: 它正散发出强大的信息素。

generic.en: A bizarre specimen of the insecta class.
generic.trans: 昆虫纲中长相怪异的家伙。

thurible.trans: 我们是它的计划接收者。

greenamulet.en: Works almost as a magical binding agent.
greenamulet.trans: 几乎和神奇的粘合剂具备一样的功效。

otter.en: This beast possess traits of an otter, fish and petty criminal.
otter.trans: 这种野兽具有水獭、鱼和小罪犯的特征。

armorwood.en: Crude plate mail cobbled together from log sections.
armorwood.trans: 由一段段木头拼凑而成的粗糙铠甲。

shadow_forge.en: I do not care for this type of magic.
shadow_forge.trans: 我不喜欢这种类型的魔法。

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: I should warn the children not to play too close to it.
chesspiece_kitcoon.trans: 我应该警告孩子们玩耍时不要离它太近。

record_balatro.en: The music was better back in my day... but let's hear it again.
record_balatro.trans: 我那个年代的音乐更好……不过让我们再听一次吧。

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: It no longer presents a threat of salmonellosis.
quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.trans: 它不再构成沙门氏菌威胁了。

veggie_oversized_rotten.en: How terrible to see it all go to waste!
veggie_oversized_rotten.trans: 浪费这么多东西，太可怕了!

ancient_husk.en: It's obvious which of these ancients was the perpetrator.
ancient_husk.trans: 这些远古者中谁是肇事者相当明显。

crabking_cannontower.en: Curious. These crustaceans have learned to launch projectiles.
crabking_cannontower.trans: 奇妙啊。这些甲壳动物学会了发射投掷物。

stalker.en: A mistake in need of correcting.

moonglass_rock.en: It appears to be mineral, but may actually be organic in nature.
moonglass_rock.trans: 虽然看起来像矿物质，但可能是有机物。

scraphat.en: Perhaps we might give it a good wash first?
scraphat.trans: 我们要不要先把它洗干净？

generic.en: A navigational aid. "Thataway".
generic.trans: 导航帮助。“那个方向。”

burnt.en: Not much of an aid now.
burnt.trans: 现在可没有太大的帮助了。

firestarter.en: %s needs a stern talking to.
firestarter.trans: %s需要一次严厉警告。

ghost.en: Didn't I tell you to wear a jacket? I'll get the hearts...
ghost.trans: 我不是跟你说过要穿夹克？我会拿到心的…

murderer.en: It appears we've entered a battle of the wits, %s!
murderer.trans: %s，好像我们已经进入斗智斗勇的境界！

attacker.en: I'll pull you back to base by the ear if I have to, %s.
attacker.trans: %s，必要的话，我会揪着你耳朵带你回家。

reviver.en: You may know a thing or two after all, scientist!
reviver.trans: 你还是知道一两件事的，科学家！

generic.en: Greetings, dear %s! How are your theorems coming?
generic.trans: 亲爱的%s，你好！你的定理怎么来的？

quagmire_wheat_seeds.trans: 小麦属植物的变异谷粒。

remains_eye_bone.en: The eyebone seems to have been burned entirely.
remains_eye_bone.trans: 眼骨似乎已经完全被烧毁了。

remains_glommerflower.en: The flower appears to have been completely burned up.
remains_glommerflower.trans: 这花似乎已经完全被烧毁了。

remains_thingie.en: This used to be something, but now it's just a pile of ash.
remains_thingie.trans: 这过去应该是个东西，但现在化成了一堆灰烬。

generic.en: Some non-aqueous residue remains after the fire.
generic.trans: 大火之后剩下的一些非水相残留物。

generic.en: It's good to keep the mind occupied at sea.
generic.trans: 注意力集中在海上是好事。

burnt.en: How irresponsible.

leafymeatsouffle.en: It seems to be made from a plant-based gelatin of sorts.
leafymeatsouffle.trans: 好像是用一种植物源的明胶做的。

firepen.en: A firestorm can be unleashed with but a few strokes of a writer's pen.
firepen.trans: 作家只需寥寥几笔就可以释放出一场火焰风暴。

moon_altar_seed.en: It is projecting images of an altar into my mind.
moon_altar_seed.trans: 它向我的大脑投射了一个祭坛的图像。

stuffing.en: Pairs perfectly with some turkey and gravy.

generic.en: This is rather convenient.
generic.trans: 这倒是很方便。

burnt.en: I do hope she'll build another.

quagmire_rubble_pubdoor.en: The door to a public house.

durian_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
durian_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

cave_banana_burnt.en: I do not believe this one can be restored.
cave_banana_burnt.trans: 我不相信这东西能复原。

pomegranate_cooked.en: Punica granatum is so nice when it's warmed up.

pomegranate_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
pomegranate_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

seastack.en: It would be no good to run aground of that.

cookedmonstermeat.en: It's still a little bit poisonous.

type3.en: The rain may inadvertently turn it into a bird bath.
type3.trans: 大雨无意中把它变成了鸟儿们洗澡的地方。

type2.en: A Grecian-inspired sculpture of the muse Thalia. Some liberties have been taken.
type2.trans: 缪斯塔利亚的希腊式启发的雕像。有点自由发挥。

type1.en: A Grecian-inspired sculpture of the muse Melpomene. Some liberties have been taken.
type1.trans: 缪斯墨尔波墨的希腊式启发的雕像。有点自由发挥。

generic.en: It's been sculpted from metamorphic rock.
generic.trans: 由变质岩雕刻而成。

eyeofterror_mini.en: I'm fascinated, but now is not the time to study you.
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 我虽然很想弄清楚，但现在不是研究你的时候。

carnival_host.trans: 他是一个相当令人好奇的人物。

held.en: I don't think my pocket is its natural habitat.
held.trans: 我觉得我的口袋不能成为它的自然栖息地。

underground.trans: 那下面有东西正在挖地道。

cutstone.trans: 一些磨得非常光滑的石头方块。

alterguardian_phase2spike.en: I should endeavor to not become trapped by its barriers.
alterguardian_phase2spike.trans: 我会努力不被它的障碍物困住。

saltbox.en: This should help prevent food spoilage.

critter_glomling.en: How do you maintain flight, dear?
critter_glomling.trans: 你是怎么保持飞行的，亲爱的？

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

turf_vault.en: The ground. You step on it.

icecream.en: Nothing like a book and a bowl of ice cream.
icecream.trans: 一本书和一碗冰淇淋，没有比这更好的东西了。

tentacle.en: A horror waiting in the mud.

has_item.en: Perfect for enjoying a cup of tea and a good book.

burnt.en: What a shame.

generic.en: Perfect for enjoying a cup of tea and a good book.
generic.trans: 非常适合品茶读书。

walkingplank.en: A dangerous escape route for one stranded at sea.
walkingplank.trans: 对于受困海上的人，这是一条危险的逃跑路线。

fishtacos.en: Personally I relish a spot of spice on my fish.
fishtacos.trans: 我个人喜欢在鱼肉上加点香料。

merm_tool_upgraded.en: While crudely made, I admit it's far more efficient than their usual methods.
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 虽然制作粗糙，但我承认这比他们惯用的方法要有效得多。

generic.en: Corvus brachyrhynchos.
generic.trans: 短嘴鸦。

winter_ornamentforge.trans: 一个令人伤感的手工艺品。

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496.
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 人类有记载的首次使用钓鱼浮漂是在1496年。

diseasing.en: Hm... The leaves are curling at the edges.

diseased.en: It's afflicted with an agrarian disease beyond my curing.
diseased.trans: 它得了种农业病，我治不好。

withered.en: The Ardisia crenata variant has shriveled in the heat.
withered.trans: 朱砂根变体已经在高温下枯萎了。

generic.en: That bush looks ready for harvest.
generic.trans: 那个灌木丛看起来可以丰收了。

sleepbomb.trans: 已经超过了你的就寝时间。

carnival_ball.en: I don't want to see anyone playing with this near any breakables.
carnival_ball.trans: 我不希望看到有人在易碎物品附近玩这个。

generic.en: It could support a small ecosystem.
generic.trans: 它可以支持小型的生态系统。

empty.en: Perhaps it's not the right time of year.
empty.trans: 或许现在是湖的枯水期。

pepper_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
pepper_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

sword_lunarplant.en: The energy has been stabilized enough to form a functional blade.
sword_lunarplant.trans: 能量已经稳定下来，足以形成一把实用的刀锋。

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

voidclothhat.en: Prolonged use will surely have detrimental effects on the mind.
voidclothhat.trans: 长期使用肯定会对精神产生不利影响。

bird_mutant.en: Oh dear, that creature looks unwell.
bird_mutant.trans: 噢，天啊。那个生物看起来不健康。

opalstaff.en: Appears to summon a cold star into being.
opalstaff.trans: 看似要召唤出一颗寒星。

carnivalfood_corntea.en: An acquired taste, but nevertheless quite refreshing.
carnivalfood_corntea.trans: 这是一种需要培养的品位，饮用后分外清爽。

ghostflowerhat.en: It allows one to imbibe like the dead.
ghostflowerhat.trans: 它让活人像逝者一样饮用。

orangegem.en: It looks like a Spessartite garnet.

orangemooneye.en: The fewer search parties we have to organize, the better.
orangemooneye.trans: 组织搜索队这事，当然是越少越好。

jammypreserves.en: I'd love some toast to put this jam on. Oh well.
jammypreserves.trans: 我希望能有点吐司，然后把果酱涂在上面吃。哦，想想就好美味。

struggle.trans: 看起来魔法正在准备中。

generic.en: A knight, in service to the king. Or perhaps the queen.
generic.trans: 效力于国王或女王的骑士。

snowball_item.en: Those young ones better mind their manners.
snowball_item.trans: 那些小家伙最好学会注意礼貌。

shadowthrall_hands.en: I would advise against challenging it in hand-to-hand combat.
shadowthrall_hands.trans: 我建议不要挑战它徒手肉搏。

lunarrift_portal.en: It seems to be contaminating the surrounding area.
lunarrift_portal.trans: 它似乎在污染周围的区域。

slingshotmodkit.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshotmodkit.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

turf_ruinstiles_glow.en: The ground. You step on it.

high.en: That fire is burning at an alarming rate.
high.trans: 营火正在以惊人的速度燃烧。

low.en: The fire could use some more fuel.

generic.en: A fire pit.
generic.trans: 一处火坑。

high.en: That fire is burning at an alarming rate.
high.trans: 营火正在以惊人的速度燃烧。

low.en: The fire could use some more fuel.

generic.en: A rather strange, magical fire pit.
generic.trans: 相当古怪而神奇的火堆。

generic.en: That offers some protection.
generic.trans: 这能提供一定程度的保护。

burnt.en: Fire was its weakness.

glasscutter.en: I like to get straight to the point.

wet.en: The moisture level of this mixture is too high.
wet.trans: 混合物的水分含量过高。

dry.en: It requires a bit more moisture.

burnt.en: Well... I suppose plants need carbon too.

generic.en: Composting is an essential component to gardening.
generic.trans: 堆肥是园艺的一个重要组成部分。

turf_sandy.en: The ground. You step on it.

cattoy_mouse.en: A simple mechanism behind an entertaining toy for felines.
cattoy_mouse.trans: 一个简单的机械原理支撑起了这件猫科动物的玩具。

axe.en: A dual inclined plane attached to a lever.
axe.trans: 一根杆上连着两个斜面。

winter_ornamentpearl.en: Rather intricate work performed with chelae.
winter_ornamentpearl.trans: 用螯足完成的相当精细的作品。

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: It would be wise to equip the boat with a protective barrier.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 在船上配备保护屏障是明智之举。

generic.en: A small fire is needed to achieve the full effect.
generic.trans: 需要小火才能达到全部效果。

lit.en: This statue seems to have fallen into disrepair.
lit.trans: 这座雕像似乎年久失修。

generic.en: A small fire is needed to achieve the full effect.
generic.trans: 需要小火才能达到全部效果。

quagmire_goatmum.en: Perhaps she would be willing to barter.

lit.en: The firelight reflecting against the gold surface is almost hypnotic.
lit.trans: 金色表面反射的火光催人入睡。

generic.en: Fire is needed to achieve the full effect.
generic.trans: 需要小火才能达到全部效果。

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.en: I can't say it would be much use to me.
lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 这个对我来说没多大用处。

battlesong_shadowaligned.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_shadowaligned.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

chester.trans: 一个能到处跑的储物箱。

dumbbell.en: A bit of exercise can be quite beneficial to one's health.
dumbbell.trans: 做点运动对健康相当有益。

charging.en: What a whimsical appearance for a teleportation device.
charging.trans: 这个传送装置的外观真是异想天开。

charged.en: What a whimsical appearance for a teleportation device.
charged.trans: 这个传送装置的外观真是异想天开。

generic.en: What a whimsical appearance for a teleportation device.
generic.trans: 这个传送装置的外观真是异想天开。

grotto_pool_small.en: How interesting, it seems to be forming moon glass stalagmites.
grotto_pool_small.trans: 真有意思，好像是在形成月光玻璃石笋。

generic.en: A sufficient offering has been made.
generic.trans: 供品已足。

burnt.en: This shrine has been burned.

empty.en: It demands are particular offering.
empty.trans: 它要求指定的供品。

warm.en: It is retaining thermal energy. But only a bit.
warm.trans: 它还有热量，但只有一点点。

frozen.trans: 它的温度已经降到冰点以下了。

hot.en: It is warm enough to radiate heat and light!
hot.trans: 它已经足够暖和，能发出光和热！

generic.en: Its temperature is totally unremarkable.
generic.trans: 这点温度不行啊。

bonesoup.en: Extremely savory. I wouldn't mind seconds.

royal_jelly.en: In the wild this might have produced more queens.
royal_jelly.trans: 在野外，这会产生更多的女王。

mapscroll.en: The potential of the blank page is paralyzing for some.
mapscroll.trans: 对某些人而言，看到空白页简直会造成瘫痪。

otterden_dead.trans: 这本来是完全可以避免的。

iceberg_melted.en: From dangerous solid to harmless liquid. Thank-you, heat.
iceberg_melted.trans: 从危险的固体变成了无害的液体。谢谢你，热量。

redlantern.trans: 多么华美的一个小灯笼啊。

lureplantbulb.en: Now it can be planted wherever is best.
lureplantbulb.trans: 现在它可以种在任何地方。

wx78module_maxsanity.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

quagmire_portal.en: My suspicions were correct. It has more than one destination.
quagmire_portal.trans: 我的怀疑是对的。它通往不止一个目的地。

burnt.en: Oh my, that won't do at all.

generic.en: Big enough for company.
generic.trans: 可以招待所有宾客了。

bathbomb.en: Ah, I do love a warm bath with a book.
bathbomb.trans: 嗯，我最喜欢边泡热水澡，边看书了。

mushroombomb.en: Everyone, give the volatile Agaricus wide berth!
mushroombomb.trans: 大家和挥发性的落叶松蕈保持安全距离！

voidcloth_scythe.en: A common harvesting implement, with an admittedly unsettling appearance.
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 常见的收割工具，尽管外观有些令人不安。

quagmire_grill_item.en: It needs to be on the ground.

spring.en: I hope the Lagomorph is all right down there!
spring.trans: 希望那下面的兔类动物安然无恙！

generic.en: It looks like a small animal's burrow.
generic.trans: 看起来像小动物的窝。

closed.en: It hunts similarly to Dionaea muscipula.
closed.trans: 跟双子叶植物纲捕蝇草属的捕猎方法相同。

generic.en: I'd be careful of that if I were you.
generic.trans: 我是你的话会小心的避开它。

quagmire_merm_cart1.en: Reminds me of my bookmobile days.
quagmire_merm_cart1.trans: 让我想起了我的流动图书馆岁月。

firestarter.en: Don't cry to me when you burn yourself, dear.
firestarter.trans: 你要是烧着自己，可别对着我哭，亲爱的。

ghost.en: Poor dear. %s needs a heart to anchor him to this plane.
ghost.trans: 亲爱的，%s需要一颗心脏把他固定在这个位面上。

murderer.en: They'll tell tales of your defeat, %s!
murderer.trans: 它们将讲述你的丰功伟绩，%s !

attacker.en: His body language says everything.
attacker.trans: 他的身体语言说明了一切。

reviver.en: You're a fine young man, %s.

generic.en: Ah, the mime lad. Greetings, dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，那个小丑。你好啊，亲爱的%s！

ready.en: Honey can be harvested from it.

somehoney.trans: 还没到收获蜂蜜的时候。

fullhoney.en: Honey can be harvested from it.

generic.en: It appears to be a crudely fashioned apiary.
generic.trans: 它似乎是一种老式的养蜂场。

burnt.en: Poor bees!

burning.en: My, I don't think it's supposed to do that.
burning.trans: 天啊，这应该不属于设计功能之一。

burnt.en: Oh dear...

generic.en: A place to display only the largest aquatic specimens.
generic.trans: 展示大型水生植物的设备。

cabbagerolls.en: Variations of this dish can be found across Europe and Asia.
cabbagerolls.trans: 这道菜的变体传到了欧洲和亚洲绝大多数地区。

fence_electric_item.en: This is an electric fence post and it must be planted before it can be used.
fence_electric_item.trans: 这是一根电栅栏的柱子，使用之前必须先固定在地上。

leif_sparse.trans: 我...甚至不知道有这种东西存在。

lobsterbisque.en: I'd almost forgotten what real food tasted like.
lobsterbisque.trans: 我几乎忘记了真正的食物是什么味道。

yotr_food4.en: Cakes on a stick, what next?
yotr_food4.trans: 蛋糕都能串了，还能鼓捣出什么？

yotr_food2.en: "Blue" is an odd adjective for a flavor, but I can't disagree.
yotr_food2.trans: 虽然用“蓝色”来形容风味有些古怪，但我不得不赞同。

palmcone_sapling.en: It has not yet fully matured.

yotr_food1.en: Putting carrots in your dessert does not make it healthy, I'm afraid.
yotr_food1.trans: 就算放根胡萝卜到甜点里，也不能让它变成健康饮食。

lavaarena_armorlightspeed.en: The lightweight material grants the wearer better mobility.
lavaarena_armorlightspeed.trans: 它材质轻巧，穿着它会更加行动自如。

slingshotammo_slow.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_slow.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

wagboss_robot_creation_parts.en: Equipped with such armaments, it shall usher in nothing but ruin and demise.
wagboss_robot_creation_parts.trans: 装备了重武器，必将招致毁灭与死亡。

broken_forgeditem.en: With the right materials, it could be repaired.
broken_forgeditem.trans: 只要使用正确的材料，它就可以被修复。

monkey.trans: 它们身上的味道真难闻。

book_rain.en: A succinct guide, without any extraneous fluff.
book_rain.trans: 言简意赅的指南，没有华而不实的赘述。

generic.en: Oculus Mysterium.
generic.trans: 神秘的眼睛。

fruitflyfruit.en: It seems that I can exert some level of control over these insects with this.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 看来，我可以通过这个对这些昆虫进行一定程度的控制。

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: The woolen fibers of a beefalo's coat make for excellent padding.
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 皮弗娄牛的毛发纤维是极佳的填充物。

deer_antler.en: It looks like a key, but it's quite brittle.
deer_antler.trans: 它看起来像把钥匙，但非常脆弱。

whip.en: An instrument for developing pain compliance.
whip.trans: 利用对方的疼痛达到驯服目的的武器。

mosquitomusk.en: The pheromones render one undetectable to the cursed bloodsuckers.
mosquitomusk.trans: 费洛蒙能让人不被诅咒的吸血虫察觉。

walkingplank_grass.en: A dangerous escape route for one stranded at sea.
walkingplank_grass.trans: 对于受困海上的人，这是一条危险的逃跑路线。

desiccant.en: It will help me be rid of excess moisture.
desiccant.trans: 它能帮我去除多余的湿气。

valid.trans: 它看起来已经准备好了。

gems.en: I don't think it's powered yet.

ghostflower.en: I'm afraid I'm unfamiliar with this genus.
ghostflower.trans: 恐怕我并不熟悉这种物种。

ghost.en: All our self-help books will finally be put to use, hmm %s?
ghost.trans: 我们所有的自助书籍最终还是有用的，嗯，%s ？

firestarter.en: Book burnings are quite gauche, %s.
firestarter.trans: 烧书真是无礼，%s！

murderer.en: I am my own worst critic!
murderer.trans: 我自我批评最严格！

attacker.en: %s's immorality is putting holes in my multiverse speculations.
attacker.trans: %s不道德行为破坏了我的多元宇宙猜想。

reviver.en: Our knowledge comes in handy, doesn't it, %s?
reviver.trans: 知识派上了用场，不是吗，%s ？

generic.en: Ah, greetings %s! Fancy seeing you here.
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，%s！真高兴在这看到你。

quagmire_fern.en: This species of fern is edible.
quagmire_fern.trans: 这种蕨类植物是可食用的。

melted.en: It must have melted due to its small size.
melted.trans: 一定是因为它体积太小了，所以才会融化。

generic.en: A small block of extremely dense ice.
generic.trans: 一小块高密度的冰矿。

crabking_claw.en: Thank goodness I'm not allergic to shellfish.
crabking_claw.trans: 谢天谢地，我对贝类不过敏。

wortox_reviver.en: Be responsible and we'll never have to use it.
wortox_reviver.trans: 只要人人都为自己的行为负责，我们就永远都用不到它。

bodypillow_kelp.en: What a fascinating use of kelp.
bodypillow_kelp.trans: 多么别出心裁的海带用法啊。

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: An eclectic design, but no less useful.
mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.trans: 设计不拘一格，但实用性丝毫不减。

featherfan.en: This will induce quite an airflow!

recharging.en: It appears to require some time to replenish its power between uses.
recharging.trans: 在两次使用之间，它似乎需要一些时间来补充其能量。

generic.en: Horology mixed with magic, truly fascinating.
generic.trans: 钟表学与魔法混合在一起，真的很吸引人。

mast_malbatross_item.en: Raise the sail, and let's be off!

scanning.en: It seems to be collecting data from that specimen.
scanning.trans: 它似乎在收集那个样本的数据。

hunting.en: It appears to be searching for a suitable specimen to analyze.
hunting.trans: 它似乎在寻找一个可分析的样本。

generic.en: I suspect our resident handywoman might have assisted with its construction.
generic.trans: 我猜我们的常驻女工可能协助了建造。

handpillow_petals.en: It gives off a delicate floral aroma.
handpillow_petals.trans: 它散发出一种精致的花香。

generic.en: Perhaps when I am better prepared.
generic.trans: 也许我得准备得更充分点。

full.en: Much too crowded for my liking.

spear_wathgrithr.trans: 多么帅气的猎捕工具啊！

nightmarepie.en: It tastes a bit like magic.

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

mutator_water.en: How interesting! They appear to alter an arachnid's form when ingested.
mutator_water.trans: 多么有趣啊！它们被摄入后似乎会改变蛛形纲动物的形态。

rocky.en: Their carapace is made of rocks.
rocky.trans: 它们的甲壳是岩石做的。

archive_moon_statue.en: These chambers appear to pre-date the rest of the ruins.
archive_moon_statue.trans: 这些房间似乎比其他遗迹年份更早。

kitcoon_deciduous.en: Oh dear, you are quite adorable.

turf_deciduous.en: The ground. You step on it.

peghook.trans: 一只有感觉的蝎子。真怪。

turf_grass.en: The ground. You step on it.

pigking.en: He appears to be the leader of the village.
pigking.trans: 他好像是这个村庄的老大。

molehill.en: The tunnel system must be vast!
molehill.trans: 它的洞穴通道一定四通八达！

monstermeat_dried.trans: 虽然有点咸，但还是很令人满意。

panflute.trans: 可以产生谐波共振的中空芦苇。

lavaarena_battlestandard.en: That banner is invigorating nearby enemies.
lavaarena_battlestandard.trans: 那面旗帜让附近的敌人恢复了活力。

chesspiece_deerclops.en: An anatomical study of those strange beasts.
chesspiece_deerclops.trans: 对这些奇怪野兽的解剖学研究。

support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.trans: 绝望石，这个可以坚持住。

saltlick_improved.en: The beefalo lick salt to acquire essential nutrients.
saltlick_improved.trans: 皮弗娄牛舔盐以获取必需的营养物质。

lots_of_flowers.en: The flowers seem to give off an aromatic effect.

lots_of_flowers_blossom.trans: 它们在发出一种地外的声音。

lots_of_flowers_evil.en: The flowers affect one's mental stability.
lots_of_flowers_evil.trans: 这些花会影响精神稳定。

some_flowers.en: I believe flowers are a traditional offering to the deceased.
some_flowers.trans: 花朵是传统上祭献逝者的一种供品。

generic.en: The poor dear.
generic.trans: 可怜的亲爱的。

cookedsmallmeat.en: It is slightly more appetizing when cooked.
cookedsmallmeat.trans: 烤熟后味道会更好一点。

dock_kit.en: Some essential materials for constructing a wharf.
dock_kit.trans: 建造码头的一些基本材料。

durian_cooked.en: Cooking this certainly did not improve its odor.
durian_cooked.trans: 烤熟之后的气味显然也不好闻。

mast_malbatross.trans: 多么引人注目的翼展啊！

fig.en: I do enjoy a nice ripe fig.
fig.trans: 我喜欢吃熟透了的无花果。

quagmire_saltrock.trans: 成团成簇的未加工氯化钠。

bomb_lunarplant.en: Unstable energy, barely held together by a hardy plant epidermis.
bomb_lunarplant.trans: 不稳定的能量，由坚韧的植物表皮给予一定的束缚。

amulet.trans: 来自另一个时代的遗留物。

generic.en: Plant and animal have merged into one in this specimen.
generic.trans: 动植物在这个标本中融为了一体。

diseasing.en: Hm... The leaves are curling at the edges.

picked.en: The berries are growing back, slowly.
picked.trans: 浆果会慢慢再长出来的。

diseased.en: It's afflicted with an agrarian disease beyond my curing.
diseased.trans: 它得了种农业病，我治不好。

withered.en: Ardisia crenata don't do well in extreme heat.
withered.trans: 朱砂根浆果不是特别耐热。

generic.en: It's an Ardisia crenata bush.
generic.trans: 是朱砂根浆果丛。

sculpture_rooknose.en: That's a thrown out back waiting to happen.

refined_dust.en: Better here than on my bookshelves.
refined_dust.trans: 在这总比在我的书架上更好。

magician_chest.en: I must admit, I find his renewed interest in the Codex... unsettling.
magician_chest.trans: 我必须承认，他重燃对秘典的兴趣……让我感到不安。

shadowthrall_mouth.en: A sensible person would avoid the toothy maw.
shadowthrall_mouth.trans: 明智的人会避开这个露齿的胃袋。

purpleamulet.en: I can almost sense it beckoning to something.
purpleamulet.trans: 我几乎可以感觉到它在召唤什么东西。

pepperpopper.en: Just a tad spicy for me!

boatrace_checkpoint.en: This should help us stay on course.
boatrace_checkpoint.trans: 这个应该能辅助我们保持航向。

fence_gate_item.en: All the components for a wooden gate.
fence_gate_item.trans: 一扇木头大门的所有组件。

walkingplank_yotd.en: An escape route I'd rather not take, despite the fine trimmings.
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 尽管有精美的装饰，我还是不想走这条逃生之路。

orangeamulet.en: The gem fades with each use.
orangeamulet.trans: 这块宝石每使用一次就会逝去一点。

mushroomhat.en: Ooo. What a delightfully wizened look.
mushroomhat.trans: 唔。多么欢快却枯萎的外表啊。

turf_meteor.en: I'm not sure you grasp the gravity of the situation. Ho ho!
turf_meteor.trans: 吼吼，一颗流星受引力的作用陨落了。

salsa.en: My goodness, that has some zest to it!

minifan.trans: 它的空气动力学原理令人不可思议。

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: The prudent gardener ensures they are able to discern every detail about their crops.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 谨慎的园丁确保他们能够分辨出作物的每一个细节。

wounded.en: Its internal structure has been damaged, but it can still recover.
wounded.trans: 它的内部结构已被损坏，但它还能复原。

stump.en: I should at least like to study its rings.
stump.trans: 我至少乐意研究一下它的年轮。

generic.en: What unique coloring. I should like to press its leaves in my books!
generic.trans: 多么独特的色彩。我想把它的叶子夹进我的书里！

tapped_bugs.en: The insecta are drawn to the glucose.
tapped_bugs.trans: 这些昆虫纲动物被糖分吸引了。

playing.en: It appears the object is to hit the insects while sparing the birds.
playing.trans: 初步看来，游戏目标是在打击昆虫的同时放过鸟类。

generic.en: Part of the mechanism for the game, I'd imagine.
generic.trans: 我想这是游戏机制的一部分。

winter_ornamentlight.en: Electrical currents do have a certain appeal, don't they?
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 电流没有某种吸引力，不是吗？

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: I wouldn't dream of using any underhanded tactics to win. I'll exercise caution.
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 我做梦也不会想到用不正当的手段取胜。务必谨慎。

lava_pond_rock.trans: 冷却不久的火成岩。危险。

tomato.trans: 茄科茄属植物西红柿的果实。

hermit_pearl.en: Oh dear, I do hope I can find him.
hermit_pearl.trans: 噢，亲爱的，我真希望能找到他。

pickaxe_lunarplant.en: A surprisingly effective mining and crushing implement.
pickaxe_lunarplant.trans: 意外有效的采矿和击打工具。

wall_moonrock_item.trans: 装在我的口袋里刚刚好。

sleeping.en: He's even more darling in sleep.
sleeping.trans: 他在睡觉时甚至是更惹人喜爱了。

generic.en: Look at his widdle face! (Ahem!)
generic.trans: 看他的脸好可爱！（嗯哼！）

book_light_upgraded.en: I've given it a glowing review.
book_light_upgraded.trans: 我给了它一个高光的评价。

spider_whistle.en: Arachnids seem to find the sound quite agreeable.
spider_whistle.trans: 蛛形纲动物似乎觉得这种声音很好听。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: This will ensure that I catch a larger specimen.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 这会确保我能抓到一条大标本。

maxwelllock.en: Now I just need a key.
maxwelllock.trans: 现在我只需要一把钥匙。

rabbithat.en: This silly headpiece will render the wearer non-threatening to rabbits.
rabbithat.trans: 这个傻傻的头饰将使佩戴者不会对兔子构成威胁。

burnt.en: A shame.

generic.en: Let the festivities begin!
generic.trans: 开始举行庆典吧！

empty.en: Tribute by fire, hm?
empty.trans: 以火致敬，哈？

crimson.en: The nightmare fuel appears to have had an adverse affect on it.
crimson.trans: 噩梦燃料似乎对它有负面作用。

waiting_for_dark.en: I believe it's storing up energy, but for what purpose?
waiting_for_dark.trans: 我相信它在储存能量，但为了什么目的呢？

cooldown.en: It appears to have expended its energy, but I cannot say for how long.
cooldown.trans: 它似乎已经耗尽了能量，但我说不准会持续多久。

spawn_disabled.en: It should remain inactive, as long as it's not disturbed.
spawn_disabled.trans: 只要不被打扰，它应该会继续不活跃。

generic.en: This is certainly not of this world. Curious.
generic.trans: 它必然不属于这个世界。有趣了。

enabled.en: What is the meaning of this?!

kelp.en: It is an edible kelp species.
kelp.trans: 一种可食用的海带标本。

lavaarena_spawner.en: It seems to facilitate local teleportation.
lavaarena_spawner.trans: 它好像能促进本地瞬移。

differentshard.en: Magic triggered by a clockwork mechanism, how fascinating!
differentshard.trans: 由钟表装置触发的魔法，多么令人着迷啊！

generic.en: Magic triggered by a clockwork mechanism, how fascinating!
generic.trans: 由钟表装置触发的魔法，多么令人着迷啊！

locked.en: It needs a key to open.

generic.en: We should have full access now.
generic.trans: 我们现在应该可以全权进入了。

sleeping.trans: 它们好像是夜行性动物。

generic.en: A large, carnivorous arachnid species.
generic.trans: 一种大型的食肉蛛形纲动物。

quagmire_beefalo.trans: 它的预期寿命已过去多年。

generic.en: Represents the protective walls of the king's castle.
generic.trans: 代表国王的城堡的保护墙。

struggle.trans: 看起来魔法正在准备中。

generic.en: Apis mellifera. Quite large!
generic.trans: 西方蜜蜂。长得好大！

woby_treat.en: These will make our dear Woby grow big and strong.
woby_treat.trans: 这些会让我们亲爱的沃比长得又大又壮。

multiplayer_portal.en: Hmm... This may require further reading.

record_worktobedone.en: I can't imagine where one would find a record press out here.
record_worktobedone.trans: 我无法想象能在哪找到唱片印刷机。

turf_cotl_brick.en: Brickwork, to be applied to the ground.

potatosack.en: He seems to have a deep fondness for tubers.
potatosack.trans: 他似乎对块茎类植物有深深的喜爱。

poison.en: That is no tree I've seen before!
poison.trans: 我以前从没见过这种树！

burnt.en: A carbonized tree.

generic.en: Fagales of some kind. It bears fruit when fully grown.
generic.trans: 某种壳斗目植物。长大后会结出果实。

wagstaff_item_1.en: This glove should not be real and yet it is.
wagstaff_item_1.trans: 这只手套本不该是实体，但它确实又是。

wagstaff_item_2.en: It is no longer a projection.

yotc_seedpacket_rare.en: I wonder what species it will turn out to be.
yotc_seedpacket_rare.trans: 我好奇它会长成什么物种。

mermwatchtower_regular.en: They seem to have found themselves a leader.
mermwatchtower_regular.trans: 他们看起来找到了新领袖。

generic.en: This relationship appears symbiotic.
generic.trans: 这个似乎是共生关系。

acidcovered.en: The acid will expedite the spoilage of the fungal yield.
acidcovered.trans: 酸会加速产出菌类的变质速度。

lumpy_sapling.trans: 可能这个物种能够长出新枝。

bedroll_straw.en: I'm not sleeping on the ground.

generic.en: Do be careful with that, dear.
generic.trans: 这个一定小心使用，亲爱的。

oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.en: The large plumage adds a little something special.
oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.trans: 硕大的羽毛确实让人眼前一亮。

figatoni.en: An unexpected, but not unpleasant combination.
figatoni.trans: 这样组合虽然出乎意料，但却又有几分讨喜。

book_light.en: I like to do a bit of light reading in the evening.
book_light.trans: 我喜欢在傍晚时做一些轻度阅读。

lost_toy_42.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_42.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

lost_toy_43.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_43.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

wobster_sheller_dead.en: I might as well eat it now.
wobster_sheller_dead.trans: 我也可能现在就吃掉它。

armor_voidcloth.trans: 抵御形而上学伤害的盔甲。

winter_ornamentboss.en: I'm of the opinion that one can never overdecorate.
winter_ornamentboss.trans: 我认为那东西绝不会过度装饰。

tacklesketch.en: Interesting! These would improve my fishing significantly!
tacklesketch.trans: 有意思！可预见到会极大提升我的鱼技！

support_pillar.en: I'm afraid it will not be able to withstand these tectonic shifts forever.
support_pillar.trans: 恐怕它无法永远承受这些构造变化。

taffy.en: That's terrible for your teeth, dear.
taffy.trans: 这对你的牙齿不好，亲爱的。

justeggs.en: It would be nice to have some buttered toast to go with it.
justeggs.trans: 如果能有一些黄油吐司当主食就好了。

mast_yotd_item.en: A tool for harnessing the wind's power.

antler.en: Its antler has grown in for winter.
antler.trans: 它的鹿角正在为冬天而生长。

generic.en: It has shed its antler for the warmer months.
generic.trans: 它已经为暖和的季节脱落了自己的鹿角。

flower_evil.en: It's not often one sees a flower with such a powerful aura.
flower_evil.trans: 像这样拥有强大灵气的花可不是很常见。

mask_foolhat.en: It appears to be a stage mask.
mask_foolhat.trans: 它似乎是一张舞台面具。

cooking_short.en: This will be finished in no time at all.

generic.en: It will be nice to eat some properly prepared food.
generic.trans: 能吃点像样的东西真是太好了。

empty.en: Hm, perhaps I'll whip something up.
empty.trans: 嗯，我来动手弄点吃的吧。

quagmire_rubble_cathedral.en: Interesting. It appears they didn't worship Gnaw.
quagmire_rubble_cathedral.trans: 有意思。看来他们并不拜饕餮。

lost_toy_10.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_10.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

portabletent.en: It's a lovely tent, but I'm afraid I don't have much use for it.
portabletent.trans: 这是一个可爱的帐篷，但我恐怕没有什么用处。

lost_toy_11.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_11.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

generic.en: It is linked to our Gateway, but inactive on this side.
generic.trans: 它连接着我们的大门，但是在这一边没有激活。

on.en: Well, this was an unexpected foray.
on.trans: 真是一场意想不到的冒险。

turf_vent.en: The ground. You step on it.

lost_toy_14.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_14.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

filled.trans: 里面已经包含了一个实体。

generic.en: It is quite empty.
generic.trans: 它挺空的。

hermitcrabtea_foliage.en: It is a herbal remedy for madness prevention.
hermitcrabtea_foliage.trans: 这是一味用于预防精神错乱的草药。

burning.trans: 我们可以一点得体的东西都没有吗？

generic.en: Ah! A proper desk! Just look at the finish on that wood!
generic.trans: 啊！一张合适的书桌！看看那块木材上的蜡！

burnt.en: The destruction of knowledge is such a difficult thing to stomach.
burnt.trans: 对知识的破坏真是一件难以忍受的事情。

twiggy_old.en: It would be a waste of time and resources to chop that old thing.
twiggy_old.trans: 砍掉那个老东西会浪费时间和资源。

thulecite_pieces.en: These could be combined to make a bigger piece.
thulecite_pieces.trans: 这些碎片可以合成更大的一块。

durian_oversized.en: Oh, our diminutive green friend will be thrilled!
durian_oversized.trans: 哦，我们的矮小的绿色朋友一定会很兴奋的!

stale.en: It should sit for a while longer yet, to reach full potency.
stale.trans: 还应该再放置一段时间，才能达到完全的效力。

spoiled.en: Quite acceptable, though it would be even better if I left it for just a bit longer.
spoiled.trans: 我可以接受，不过要是当初再多留一点时间就更好了。

generic.en: Kelp makes for an excellent fertilizer if prepared correctly.
generic.trans: 如果处理得当，海带是一种很好的肥料。

mutateddeerclops.en: The reanimation process seems to have altered its physicality.
mutateddeerclops.trans: 复活过程似乎改变了它的身体。

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: I'm afraid it will not be able to withstand these tectonic shifts forever.
support_pillar_dreadstone.trans: 恐怕它无法永远承受这些构造变化。

has_loot.trans: 它把战利品留在了身后。

generic.en: Nothing there at all.
generic.trans: 里面什么都没有。

inground.en: The growth needs a catalyst to breach the surface.
inground.trans: 它的生长需要催化剂来打破表面。

generic.en: A new member of the Agaricus genus?
generic.trans: 落叶松蕈属的新成员？

empty.en: The soil has been disturbed here.
empty.trans: 这里的土壤被干扰了。

oar.en: One and two, and one and two!

pandoraschest.en: An artifact which may contain other artifacts.
pandoraschest.trans: 可以装其他文物的文物。

lavaarena_bernie.en: Fascinating. It is animated, even here.
lavaarena_bernie.trans: 很有意思。它在这儿都是活的。

bernie_big.en: As whimsical as it is befuddling.
bernie_big.trans: 着实怪异，老妪参不透啊。

spidereggsack.en: A highly portable spider egg sack.

garlic_seeds.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
garlic_seeds.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: It's finished compiling some more research, I believe.
wx78_scanner_succeeded.trans: 我相信它已经完成了研究资料的编纂。

gargoyle_werepig.en: Lunar light catalyzes a strange reaction in its skin.
gargoyle_werepig.trans: 月光在它的皮肤上催化了一种奇怪的反应。

sculpture.en: We were all in dire need of an emotional outlet, I believe.
sculpture.trans: 我们都急需情感宣泄，我相信。

block.en: Oh, I never considered myself much of an artist!
block.trans: 哦，我从未把自己当成艺术家！

burnt.en: What a shame. It was a lovely addition.
burnt.trans: 多遗憾。它是一个可爱的添加物。

empty.en: A method of ceramic production. We somehow use it for sculpture.
empty.trans: 陶瓷生产的一套方法。我们莫名其妙地把它用来雕刻。

has_character.en: Someone is trapped inside and can't get out.
has_character.trans: 有人被困在里面出不来。

has_item.en: There appears to be an object inside.

generic.en: Icker is a highly adhesive gelatinous substance.
generic.trans: 恶液是一种高粘性凝胶状物质。

lavaarena_rechargerhat.en: A focal point for magical energies.

lost_toy_18.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_18.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

lost_toy_19.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_19.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

bloom.en: The light is caused by a chemical reaction.

generic.en: My word! A huge Mycena silvaelucens.
generic.trans: 哎呀！好巨大的发光蘑菇。

acidcovered.en: The acid will expedite the spoilage of the fungal yield.
acidcovered.trans: 酸会加速产出菌类的变质速度。

support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.en: It appears some construction is required.
support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.trans: 看来需要进行一些施工。

elixir_container.trans: 多漂亮的药剂收纳装置啊！

mandrakesoup.en: Mandragora officinarum, prepared as a soup in the name of discovery.
mandrakesoup.trans: 本着探索精神而做成的曼德拉草汤。

playing.en: Now now, let's not get too rough!
playing.trans: 咱们可说好了，点到为止！

generic.en: Ah. Silent, for now.
generic.trans: 啊，暴风雨前的宁静。

lutefisk.en: The fish is dried and then soaked in lye, hence the odd aroma.
lutefisk.trans: 先把鱼晒干，然后再放到碱液里腌制，方才得到这种怪异的味道。

turf_mosaic_grey.en: The ground. You step on it.

monkeyisland_portal_debris.en: I highly doubt the apes I encountered are intelligent enough to have constructed it.
monkeyisland_portal_debris.trans: 我非常怀疑我遇到的那些猿猴是否有足够的智慧来建造它。

wx78module_taser.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_taser.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

watermelonicle.en: The melon is entirely encased in an ice lattice.
watermelonicle.trans: 西瓜完全包裹在了冰格里面。

prime_mate.en: What odd coloration. A form of aposematism, perhaps?
prime_mate.trans: 多么奇怪的颜色。也许是一种动物的警戒色？

playbill_the_vault.en: It's more a confession or retelling of events than a stage play.
playbill_the_vault.trans: 这与其说是舞台剧，不如说更像是对事件的忏悔或重述。

miasma.en: Prudence dictates minimizing exposure to that most insidious vapor.
miasma.trans: 谨慎起见，应尽量减少接触这种有隐患的蒸汽。

gas.en: Those fumes are harmful to inhale and will cause spoilage to perishables.
gas.trans: 这些烟雾吸入有害，会导致易腐物品变质。

hot.en: Merely geothermal steam venting from a fumarole. One needn't be alarmed.
hot.trans: 不过是地热蒸汽从喷气孔中排出罢了。无需惊慌。

generic.en: Fumarole from which a number of gasses may emerge. Best steer clear.
generic.trans: 喷气孔，可能释放多种气体。最好避开。

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

generic.en: Winona has been rather tight-lipped about their function.
generic.trans: 薇诺娜对它的功能一直守口如瓶。

wagpunk_cagewall.en: It projects a force field tuned to repel physical matter and absorb kinetic impact. Simple.
wagpunk_cagewall.trans: 它能投射出排斥物质、吸收动能冲击的力场。就是这么简单。

saddle_wathgrithr.en: It follows that a beast used in battle should be well-armored.
saddle_wathgrithr.trans: 它遵循的是战斗中使用的野兽应当得到装甲保护的原则。

ancient_altar.en: A monument to some long dead god.
ancient_altar.trans: 某位死去很久的神的纪念碑。

garlic_oversized.en: How fascinating, it seems to have grown into a braided configuration all on its own!
garlic_oversized.trans: 多么迷人啊，它似乎给自己编出了一个样式！

generic.en: Sadly, it is just painted to look like a carrot.
generic.trans: 真可悲，它只是被漆得像一根胡萝卜。

burnt.en: It didn't even burn like a carrot.
burnt.trans: 它连烧起来都不像是胡萝卜。

hostile.en: Someone should teach this brute some manners.
hostile.trans: 那个粗鄙之物真该学学礼貌了。

buried.en: The pitiful beast is pinned beneath this pile of debris.
buried.trans: 这只可怜的野兽被压在了这堆瓦砾下面。

generic.en: The creature appears calm for now. Best not aggravate it.
generic.trans: 这只生物似乎暂时平静了下来。最好不要刺激它。

oceanfishingbobber_goose.en: The large plumage adds a little something special.
oceanfishingbobber_goose.trans: 硕大的羽毛确实让人眼前一亮。

wagstaff_machinery.en: Someone neglected to clean up their mess.
wagstaff_machinery.trans: 有人忘记了清理自己制造的垃圾。

tacklecontainer.en: Organized belongings are key to an organized mind.
tacklecontainer.trans: 东西收拾干净心灵才能干净。

frogglebunwich.en: It was an interesting choice to serve it as a sandwich.
frogglebunwich.trans: 把它看做一个三明治很好玩。

boat_cannon_kit.trans: 很不幸，这是一项必要的预防措施。

bearger.en: It's the Caniformia suborder... Beyond that, I cannot say.
bearger.trans: 它是一种犬型亚目动物...除此之外，我一无所知。

dustmeringue.en: Perhaps there's a creature around here that could metabolize this.
dustmeringue.trans: 也许这附近有一种生物可以代谢这个。

bandage_butterflywings.en: A delicate dressing made of butterfly wings.
bandage_butterflywings.trans: 一种由蝴蝶翅膀制成的精致伤口敷料。

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

warm.en: This is definitely the right track.

cold.trans: 上面的圆盘只是微微在动。

generic.en: It is a magitechnical homing device.
generic.trans: 一种采用了魔法技术的探测装置。

some_kelp.en: A little more. They are not yet satiated.
some_kelp.trans: 再放一点。他们还没有满足。

lots_of_kelp.en: It's sure to topple if we pile on any more.
lots_of_kelp.trans: 如果我们再继续堆积，它肯定会倒塌。

generic.en: The merms are known for their love of kelp.
generic.trans: 鱼人素来以热爱海带而闻名。

tentacle_pillar_hole.en: It appears to be all connected somehow.
tentacle_pillar_hole.trans: 它看上去以某种方式互相连通。

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

generic.en: Delightful!
generic.trans: 真令人愉快！

burnt.en: Carbonized. Pity.

moon_altar_glass.en: I believe it is trying to communicate with me telepathically.
moon_altar_glass.trans: 我相信它在试图跟我进行心灵感应。

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: Materials to construct entertaining toys for kittens.
kitcoondecor1_kit.trans: 为小猫建造娱乐性玩具的材料。

generic.en: The post is not conducting a current at the moment.
generic.trans: 这跟柱子当前并没有导电。

linked.en: The post is conducting a current just strong enough to deter uninsulated creatures.
linked.trans: 这跟柱子传导的电流强度刚好可以阻绝未绝缘生物体。

hedgehound_bush.en: How odd. This rose bush appears to be... breathing.
hedgehound_bush.trans: 真奇怪。这丛玫瑰似乎在……呼吸。

hermithouse_ornament.en: An attractive ornament to be hung on Pearl's house.
hermithouse_ornament.trans: 一件适合挂在珍珠居所的迷人装饰物。

kitcoon_nametag.en: Ah, it does bring back memories of my dear old cat...
kitcoon_nametag.trans: 啊，这确实勾起了我对亲爱的老猫的回忆……

statueharp_hedgespawner.en: Someone has let that poor statue become overgrown with vines.
statueharp_hedgespawner.trans: 有人放任藤蔓爬满了那座可怜的雕像。

quagmire_park_obelisk.en: I wish I could read the writing.
quagmire_park_obelisk.trans: 真希望我能看懂写的是什么。

watermelon_oversized.en: The result of proper research, planning and care.
watermelon_oversized.trans: 适当研究、规划和照顾的结果。

chesspiece_pipe.en: I hope this does not have a bad influence on the children.
chesspiece_pipe.trans: 我希望这不会给孩子们带来不好的影响。

ancientfruit_nightvision.en: If consumed, it seems to improve one's vision in the darkness.
ancientfruit_nightvision.trans: 饮用后似乎可以改善黑暗中的视力。

glowberrymousse.en: A brand new recipe I see. Marvelous!

miniboatlantern.en: The balloon seems a bit redundant, doesn't it?
miniboatlantern.trans: 气球显得有点多余，不是吗？

ghostlyelixir_slowregen.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_slowregen.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

slingshot_band_pigskin.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

bundle.en: At least someone's bundled up out here.
bundle.trans: 至少有人把它捆起来了。

orangestaff.trans: 很方便在短距离范围内使用。

pavlova.en: It takes its name from the Russian ballerina Anna Pavlova.
pavlova.trans: 它的名字来源于俄国芭蕾舞者安娜·巴甫洛娃。

firehound.en: That hound is more dangerous than the others.
firehound.trans: 那只猎犬比其他的都危险。

pickledherring.en: I do enjoy some pickled herring around the holidays.
pickledherring.trans: 我喜欢在假日时吃点腌鲱鱼。

oceanfishingbobber_robin.en: The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496.
oceanfishingbobber_robin.trans: 人类有记载的首次使用钓鱼浮漂是在1496年。

slingshotammo_scrapfeather.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_scrapfeather.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

burnt.en: I can't learn anything from a carbonized research station.
burnt.trans: 我没法用已经碳化了的研究站来学习东西。

generic.en: It's a research station. I can learn new things with it.
generic.trans: 是个研究站。我可以用它来学习新东西。

generic.en: Perhaps I have gone too far.
generic.trans: 也许我玩的太过火了。

burnt.en: An omen.

generic.en: I think the hat collects energy from the air.
generic.trans: 我猜那顶帽子是用来从空气中收集能量的。

burnt.en: It won't be collecting any energy now.
burnt.trans: 它再也没法收集能量了。

lantern.trans: 一种可重复加燃料的光源。

moon_altar_crown.en: Come now, let's get you back where you belong.
moon_altar_crown.trans: 来吧，让我带你回到属于你的地方吧。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_frame_wagpunk.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

moon_altar_astral.en: Are you ready to share your knowledge with me?
moon_altar_astral.trans: 你准备好和我分享你的知识了吗？

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: An eyeball... embryo? These creatures are quite perplexing.
eyeofterror_mini_grounded.trans: 是眼球……的胚胎？这些生物的构造真是复杂啊。

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: They appear to have a sleep inducing effect. Best to stay away.
alterguardian_phase3trap.trans: 它们似乎有催眠的能力。我最好避开一些。

rage.en: The symbiotic bond between toad and fungus has reached its apex.
rage.trans: 蟾蜍和真菌之间的共生关系已经达到了顶点。

generic.en: It has formed a dangerous symbiotic relationship with fungal spores.
generic.trans: 他已经和真菌孢子形成了一种危险的共生关系。

wolfgang_whistle.en: Please try to keep the noise to a minimum, dear.
wolfgang_whistle.trans: 亲爱的，请尽量将噪音降至最低。

rabbitkinghorn.en: It plays a melody meant for rabbit ears.
rabbitkinghorn.trans: 它会演奏一段适合兔子耳朵听的旋律。

bernie_active.en: That teddy bear seems to be animated somehow.
bernie_active.trans: 那个泰迪熊好像活过来了。

broken.en: This device is in a state of disrepair.
broken.trans: 这台设备处于失修状态。

generic.en: An automated unit for collecting and sorting items.
generic.trans: 一种自动收集和分类物品的装置。

cave_banana.en: All of them are genetically identical.
cave_banana.trans: 它们的基因全都是相同的。

turf_mosaic_red.en: The ground. You step on it.

spider_hider.en: An arachnid with a thick carapace.
spider_hider.trans: 长着厚甲壳的蛛形纲动物。

dug_monkeytail.en: A variation of the common Typha latifolia, perhaps?
dug_monkeytail.trans: 这或许是常见的香蒲科香蒲属的一种变种？

turf_cotl_gold.en: Children, wipe your feet before you even think about walking on that floor!
turf_cotl_gold.trans: 孩子们，在踏上那层地板之前先把脚擦干净！

turf_savanna.en: The ground. You step on it.

mask_ancient_architecthat.en: This mask once adorned a figure of considerable sagacity.
mask_ancient_architecthat.trans: 此面具曾被一位智者佩戴。

saddlehorn.trans: 一个强有力的卸下装备的装置。

firestarter.en: Do you remember what I said about fire? I should say not!
firestarter.trans: 你记不记得我怎么说不能玩火了？好吧，你忘了！

ghost.en: Oh that won't do at all, let's get you sorted out.
ghost.trans: 嗷，不能让你这样，我们会帮你的。

murderer.en: I will not tolerate that kind of behavior, %s!
murderer.trans: 我绝不容忍这种行为，%s！

attacker.en: Settle down, now!

reviver.en: Why thank you, dear.

generic.en: Hello dear %s, are you ready for more lessons?
generic.trans: 你好亲爱的%s，准备好上课了吗？

mermking.en: He seems to be the one in charge here.

barnaclesushi.en: I think I'm developing a taste for it.
barnaclesushi.trans: 我想我已经开始喜欢上它了。

lunar_grazer.en: Its unique physiology seems to allow it to re-form itself.
lunar_grazer.trans: 它独特的生理构造似乎能让它自我重构。

wx78module_nightvision.en: They dislike organics, but don't seem opposed to taking inspiration from them.
wx78module_nightvision.trans: 尽管TA不喜欢有机物，但似乎并不反对从它们那里获得灵感。

tumbleweed.en: A dried collection of plant matter.
tumbleweed.trans: 一些植物物质的干集合体。

pirate_flag_pole.en: Oh dear. That does not bode well.

chesspiece_muse.en: In chess, the queen is by far the most strategically formidable.
chesspiece_muse.trans: 在国际象棋当中，女王是目前为止在战略上最强大的存在。

w_radio.en: Interesting... I conclude it requires further study.
w_radio.trans: 有意思……我推断它需要进一步研究。

purplemooneye.en: A tool to mark our whereabouts.
purplemooneye.trans: 用来标记我们的行踪的道具。

growing.en: The plants are extracting minerals from the ground.
growing.trans: 植物正在从地里吸取矿物养分。

needsfertilizer.en: It has been rendered infertile for lack of nutrients.
needsfertilizer.trans: 它已经因为缺乏养分而变成了贫瘠之地。

burnt.en: It shan't grow a crop again.
burnt.trans: 它再也长不出农作物了。

generic.en: A small cultivated patch of ground.
generic.trans: 一小片耕地。

staff_tornado.en: I've never seen a weather vane employed as a weapon.
staff_tornado.trans: 没见过把风向标当成武器的。

burning.en: This is, in fact, saving it.

reviving.en: The buzzard is on a different path now... terrible one.
reviving.trans: 秃鹫现在走上了另一条道路……一条可怕的道路。

generic.en: If only this were the end for the buzzard.
generic.trans: 要是这就是秃鹫的结局该多好。

uncarved.en: The pumpkin requires a face before one can wear it.
uncarved.trans: 这南瓜需要先有张脸才能戴上。

generic.en: It does call to mind Ichabod's ill-fated encounter.
generic.trans: 难免不让人想起伊卡博德的厄运遭遇。

slingshot_handle_jelly.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

rock_petrified_tree.en: Should make for an excellent building material.
rock_petrified_tree.trans: 应该有益于某种不错的建筑材料。

archive_resonator_item.en: How exciting! This technology most likely hasn't been used in hundreds of years!
archive_resonator_item.trans: 真令人兴奋！这种技术很可能已经有几百年没人使用过了！

honeyham.en: Honey was the only sweetener used for this lovely ham.
honeyham.trans: 蜂蜜是在做这个美味火腿时唯一用到的甜味剂。

bodypillow_steelwool.en: This seems ill-suited for a restful night's sleep.
bodypillow_steelwool.trans: 它与安眠二字格格不入。

moonbutterfly_sapling.en: The moths and the trees have somehow mutated together here.
moonbutterfly_sapling.trans: 这里的飞蛾和树木都发生了变异。

succulent_picked.en: It will wither if not replanted.
succulent_picked.trans: 如果不移植，它就会凋零。

scorched_skeleton.en: You don't inspire a great deal of confidence, dear.
scorched_skeleton.trans: 你没有激发大量的信心，亲爱的。

festivefish.en: I'm unfamiliar with the origins of this dish.
festivefish.trans: 我不熟悉这道菜的起源。

costume_king_body.en: It appears to be a theatrical costume.

kitcoon_marsh.en: This feline has quite an uncanny appearance.
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 这种猫科动物有着相当不可思议的外表。

recharging.en: It appears to require some time to replenish its power between uses.
recharging.trans: 在两次使用之间，它似乎需要一些时间来补充其能量。

generic.en: Horology mixed with magic, truly fascinating.
generic.trans: 钟表学与魔法混合在一起，真的很吸引人。

tamales.en: The spice is actually quite mild, quite to my liking.
tamales.trans: 香料的分量把握的很克制，符合我的口味。

following.en: It follows me on account of the particular garb I wear.
following.trans: 它之所以跟随我，是因我身着特定装束。

generic.en: This is a decidedly unruly breed!
generic.trans: 这无疑是难以驯服的品种！

pigskin.en: The haunch of a semi-intelligent bipedal pig.

dragonfruit_oversized.en: The result of proper research, planning and care.
dragonfruit_oversized.trans: 适当研究、规划和照顾的结果。

guacamole.en: I always made guacamole for science day at the library.
guacamole.trans: 在图书馆搞研究的日子里，我经常做鳄梨酱。

yotd_oar.en: It never occurred to me how perfectly paddle-shaped the native Diptera's forearm is.
yotd_oar.trans: 我从没想过，本地双翅目昆虫的前臂居然是完美的船桨形状。

wagpunkbits_kit.en: We should consult the manual before using this.
wagpunkbits_kit.trans: 在使用之前，我们应该先查阅说明书。

voidcloth_boomerang.en: This particular projectile gains strength with distance before returning to origin.
voidcloth_boomerang.trans: 这种特殊的射弹在返回原点之前会随着距离的增加而增加强度。

carrot_cooked.trans: 烤得恰到好处的胡萝卜。

wagdrone_beacon.en: It forms a sort of implied wall.
wagdrone_beacon.trans: 它构成了一堵无形的墙。

dumbbell_bluegem.en: My, it's ice-cold to the touch!

eyeofterror.en: Oculus dexter or oculus sinister, I wonder? I have a suspicion it's the latter.
eyeofterror.trans: 这是给左眼戴的还是右眼戴的呢？我猜是右眼。

nightsword.trans: 可穿越不同次元的武器。

playing.en: Ah! A simple test of one's aptitude for memorization.

generic.en: I believe it requires a form of currency to start.
generic.trans: 我相信它需要用某种货币来启动。

oar_monkey.en: It appears to be a symbol of status aboard the apes' ship.
oar_monkey.trans: 这似乎是船上猿猴地位的象征。

broken.en: That bear is in need of repair.

generic.en: It's a teddy bear.
generic.trans: 它是一只泰迪熊。

voidcloth.en: This unusual fabric may be quite useful.
voidcloth.trans: 这种不寻常的织物可能相当有用。

moon_altar_rock_glass.en: I think I had best mine it out.
moon_altar_rock_glass.trans: 我认为最好还是把它开采出来。

monkey_mediumhat.en: Suitable headwear for one who spends time at sea.
monkey_mediumhat.trans: 长期在海上工作的人戴的头饰。

occupied.en: Let's get you looking a bit more presentable, shall we?
occupied.trans: 让我们帮你看起来更体面一点，好吗？

burnt.en: What an unfortunate turn of events.

generic.en: These creatures require regular grooming.
generic.trans: 这些生物需要定时美容。

walrus_tusk.en: This would be useful for scrimshaw.
walrus_tusk.trans: 这可以用于制作骨雕品。

cave_banana_tree.en: The seeds must have fallen down a sinkhole.
cave_banana_tree.trans: 以前一定有种子掉进陷洞。

burnt.en: A carbonized mangrove.

generic.en: A mangal rhizophora.
generic.trans: 一棵美洲红树。

ghost.en: What did I say about playing with axes? Let's get you a heart.
ghost.trans: 我是怎么说玩斧头的事了？让我们去帮你找颗心来。

beaverghost.en: I'll add "Castorthrope" to my endangered species list.
beaverghost.trans: 我要把“海狸人”加入我的濒危物种名单里了。

firestarter.en: Keep lighting fires if you want to get burnt, dear.
firestarter.trans: 如果你想被烧着的话，一直点火，亲爱的。

mooseghost.en: Don't you fret, I'll be back with a heart.
mooseghost.trans: 莫发愁，我定会带颗心回来。

murderer.en: I will defend myself from you, foul cad!
murderer.trans: 我会自卫的，笨蛋！

attacker.en: Careful, %s. You know what paper pulp is made of, don't you?
attacker.trans: 当心，%s。你知道纸浆是什么做成的，不是吗？

gooseghost.en: Poor dear, let's see about finding you a heart.
gooseghost.trans: 可怜人儿，我来试着帮你找颗心脏。

moose.en: Oh deer, it looks like you've expanded your repertoire.
moose.trans: 噢，鹿啊,看来你的戏路越来越宽了。

beaver.en: Poor dear never mentioned he was afflicted by Castorthropy.
beaver.trans: 亲爱的从来没提过他被海狸化所困扰。

reviver.en: Excellent work, %s.

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

bundlewrap.trans: 为保存食品的抗菌包装。

turf_pebblebeach.en: The ground. You step on it.
turf_pebblebeach.trans: 地皮。你可以踩在它上面。

beemine.en: A dangerous mine filled with Antophila.
beemine.trans: 用蜜蜂填装的危险地雷。

alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.en: A curious amalgamation of machine parts and sentient lunar energy.
alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.trans: 一个奇妙的结合体，由机器零件与有知觉的月能组成。

mushgnome.en: Should I classify you under Animalia or Fungi?
mushgnome.trans: 我应该将你归类为动物还是真菌呢？

carnival_seedpacket.en: A bit of extra fiber added to one's diet never hurts.
carnival_seedpacket.trans: 在饮食中增加一点额外的纤维素永远不会有坏处。

generic.en: This spider has perished.
generic.trans: 这只蜘蛛已经死亡。

mutatedwarg.en: Its body has been drastically altered.
mutatedwarg.trans: 它的身体发生了巨大的变化。

sculpture_knighthead.en: You have to lift with your knees, dear.
sculpture_knighthead.trans: 你要用你的膝盖来抬举，亲爱的。

burnt.en: I was right not to trust it.
burnt.trans: 看来不相信它是正确的。

generic.en: I don't trust that wall.
generic.trans: 我不相信那堵墙能保证我的安全。

turf_dirt.en: The ground. You step on it.

oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.en: Its effect appears to be stronger at dusk.
oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.trans: 它在黄昏能更好的发挥效用。

oceantree.en: It seems to be a hybrid between the genera Rhizophora and Salix.
oceantree.trans: 它似乎是红树和柳树的杂交品种。

trinket_41.en: This does not seem like it came from this world.
trinket_41.trans: 这看上去不像来自这个世界。

trinket_40.en: What a cute little mollusk shaped scale!
trinket_40.trans: 真是一只小巧玲珑的软体动物造型秤！

trinket_43.en: Perhaps I ought to save it for Webber.

trinket_42.trans: 天啊，它看上颇有些惆怅。

molebat.en: I suspect the impressive snout must compensate for its poor eyesight.
molebat.trans: 我猜想这令人印象深刻的鼻子一定是为了弥补它糟糕的视力。

stafflight.en: Perhaps a larger staff would summon a larger star.
stafflight.trans: 也许法杖再大点，就可以召唤更大的星星了。

reflectivevest.en: That could keep one moderately cool.
reflectivevest.trans: 那个能使人保持适当凉爽。

slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

trinket_44.en: A waste of a unique flora specimen.
trinket_44.trans: 浪费了一份独一无二的植物标本。

yotc_carrat_race_start_item.en: I should find a suitable place for this.
yotc_carrat_race_start_item.trans: 我要为它找个合适的位置。

mermarmorhat.en: This helmet was specifically made to fit the merm cranium.
mermarmorhat.trans: 这款头盔是专门为人鱼头盖骨设计的。

chesspiece_wormboss.en: This ancestor of the predatory annelid was far worse.
chesspiece_wormboss.trans: 这种掠食性环节动物的祖先才是真正的可怕。

handpillow_beefalowool.en: The woolen fibers of a beefalo's coat make for excellent padding.
handpillow_beefalowool.trans: 皮弗娄牛的毛发纤维是极佳的填充物。

ghostlyelixir_speed.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_speed.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

voidcloth_kit.en: Now that I'm familiar with the material, it's a simple matter to repair it.
voidcloth_kit.trans: 现在我熟悉材料了，修复起来就很简单了。

chesspiece_claywarg.en: The sculptor clearly studied the creature closely.
chesspiece_claywarg.trans: 雕塑师显然仔细研究过这个动物。

turf_dragonfly.en: This substance is imbued with a sort of natural fire deterrent.
turf_dragonfly.trans: 这种物质充满了某种天然的阻燃剂。

level_3.en: That appears to be an acceptable level of decoration.
level_3.trans: 这似乎是一个可以接受的装饰水平。

generic.en: It seems customary to place decorations around it.
generic.trans: 在它周围放置装饰品似乎是一种习俗。

level_2.en: Oh yes, that's coming along quite nicely!

trinket_30.en: Knights are better pieces when they're active in the center.
trinket_30.trans: 骑士在盘中运用的好，可以发挥比其他棋子更大的作用。

trinket_32.en: Oh, I got my hopes up for a nice crystal ball.
trinket_32.trans: 哦，我的愿望是有一个漂亮的水晶球。

trinket_31.en: In German it is referred to as the "springer".

merm_armory.en: "Mermfolk Ownlee"? Hm. I see more spelling lessons are in order.
merm_armory.trans: “止给鱼人用”？嗯。看来还得多上几节拼写课。

charged.trans: 简直是闪电的忠实粉丝。

generic.en: A variant of Capra aegagrus, keen on electricity.
generic.trans: 一种喜欢电的野山羊变种。

cooking_long.en: It's got a bit to go before it's ready.
cooking_long.trans: 还要等一会儿才能煮好。

burnt.en: Now it's truly derelict.
burnt.trans: 现在它是真正的废弃了。

empty.en: I suspect it must have had a purpose specific to these chambers.
empty.trans: 我猜测它有专门针对这些房间的用途。

quagmire_tomato.trans: 茄科茄属植物西红柿的果实。

trinket_38.en: This simply does not work right.

palmcone_seed.en: It can't begin growing until it's been planted, dear.
palmcone_seed.trans: 亲爱的，不种下的话它是不能生长的。

trinket_37.en: Luckily it is much too brittle to inflict any real damage.
trinket_37.trans: 幸运的是，它脆弱得多，没法造成任何真正的损害。

oceanvine_cocoon.en: This species seems to be both arboreal and aquatic.
oceanvine_cocoon.trans: 这种物种似乎既是树栖的又是水栖的。

pepper_cooked.en: I must be careful not to rub my eyes.
pepper_cooked.trans: 我要小心，千万不能揉眼睛。

trinket_39.en: It appears to be an abandoned glove.
trinket_39.trans: 似乎是一只被遗弃的手套。

trinket_34.en: The paw grants three wishes, with terribly ironic results. So the story goes.
trinket_34.trans: 爪子授予了三个愿望，带来非常讽刺的结果。故事仍在继续。

trinket_33.en: A decorative arachnid adornment! How darling!
trinket_33.trans: 一个装饰性蛛形纲动物饰品！多么惹人怜爱！

trinket_36.en: Dunk those in boiling water before wearing them, dear.
trinket_36.trans: 穿上它们前把那些东西泡在滚烫的水里，亲爱的。

trinket_35.en: Odorless. I believe it may have been sugar water.
trinket_35.trans: 没有气味。我相信它可能是糖水。

mosquitomermsalve.en: The infusion of fresh blood seems to boost a merm's overall health.
mosquitomermsalve.trans: 注入新鲜血液似乎能增强鱼人的整体健康。

generic.en: An agreeable member of the Columbidae family.
generic.trans: 一种惹人喜爱的鸠鸽科动物。

sleeping.en: It has entered the REM stage of sleep.
sleeping.trans: 它进入了快眼动阶段的睡眠。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.en: Part of the mechanism for the game, I'd imagine.
carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.trans: 我想这是游戏机制的一部分。

normal.trans: 一处营火。对，某种形式的营火。

high.en: That fire is burning at an alarming rate.
high.trans: 营火正在以惊人的速度燃烧。

low.en: The fire could use some more fuel, whatever fuel it takes.
low.trans: 应该再加一些燃料，无论燃料是什么。

generic.en: A fire pit. It's chilly.
generic.trans: 一处火坑。冒着寒气。

playing.en: A game of odds and probability.

generic.en: I believe it requires a form of currency to start.
generic.trans: 我相信它需要用某种货币来启动。

pigelitefighter4.en: I wonder what those green markings signify.
pigelitefighter4.trans: 我想知道那些绿色的标记是什么意思。

trinket_21.en: I have an excellent meringue recipe.
trinket_21.trans: 我有个很好的调和蛋白食谱。

rock_ice_melted.en: It must have melted due to its small size.
rock_ice_melted.trans: 一定是因为它体积太小了，所以才会融化。

carnival_gametoken.en: A form of avian currency, perhaps?

fence_junk.en: Unpleasant to the eye, but I suppose practicality outweighs aesthetics.
fence_junk.trans: 虽然不美观，但我想实用性还是大于美观性的。

generic.en: A small dimension tightly bound in magic.
generic.trans: 魔法里紧紧束缚着一个小次元。

pigelitefighter3.en: Has an earthy musk to him.

trinket_27.en: I miss the comforts of home.

trinket_26.en: It appears to be a primitive cup fashioned from a tuber.
trinket_26.trans: 它看起来像由块茎简单做成的杯子。

damaged.en: This one is only the sum of its parts.
damaged.trans: 这个个体现在只是其零件的总和。

generic.en: Such devices rely on gyroscopic stabilization and propulsive lift. Fascinating and irritating.
generic.trans: 这类装置依赖陀螺仪的稳定和推进器的升力。既迷人又恼人。

potato_oversized.trans: 令人印象深刻的硕大块茎！

trinket_29.en: Calling it a "castle" is plainly incorrect.
trinket_29.trans: 把它叫作“城堡”显然是不正确的。

goldnugget.en: A small lump of gold. Atomic number 79.

trinket_28.en: It was once called the "tower", long ago.
trinket_28.trans: 它很久以前曾经被称为“塔”。

merm_shadow.en: This development has me feeling rather uneasy.
merm_shadow.trans: 这一发展让我感到相当不安。

trinket_22.trans: 我奶奶以前总是在织布。

trinket_24.en: What a positively adorable kitty cat. Sigh.
trinket_24.trans: 好乐观可爱的凯蒂猫。哎。

ivy_snare.trans: 这种植物有很强的领地性。

icestaff2.trans: 一件附了魔的制冷器具。

icestaff3.en: It gives off a powerful chill.

resurrectionstone.trans: 那块石头具有复活的力量。

picked.trans: 艰难的时期就需要采取极端措施。

generic.en: A young barrel cactus.
generic.trans: 还没完全成熟的桶形仙人掌。

hutch.en: Eons of subterranean evolution went into this widdle malformed monstrosity.
hutch.trans: 万古地下演变，变成了这个恶心的畸形怪。

glommerwings.en: The pennons of that strange specimen.

monkeybarrel.en: This appears to be the home of several primates.
monkeybarrel.trans: 这似乎是某些灵长类动物的家。

slingshotammo_thulecite.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_thulecite.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

silk.en: Protein fiber extruded from an arachnid.
silk.trans: 蛛形纲动物吐出的蛋白质纤维。

firestaff.trans: 某种能投掷火焰的奇妙装置。

waterplant.en: I'm unfamiliar with this variety of sea vegetation.
waterplant.trans: 我对这个品种的海生植物并不熟悉。

charlie_heckler.en: I wouldn't classify their criticism as constructive.
charlie_heckler.trans: 我不会把他们的批评归类为有建设性。

trinket_10.en: I don't appreciate the insinuation, dear.
trinket_10.trans: 我欣赏不了这暗喻，亲爱的。

critterlab.en: A perfect hollow for nesting animals.

brewing.en: I'm happy to support a small business.
brewing.trans: 我很乐意支持做小买卖的。

active.en: There is nothing quite like a good cup of tea.
active.trans: 什么都比不上一杯好茶。

burnt.en: How awful.

generic.en: I do hope she's in soon.
generic.trans: 我真希望她能快点回来。

saddle_shadow.en: A beefalo saddle fitted for combat.
saddle_shadow.trans: 适合战斗的皮弗娄牛鞍具。

rabbitking_passive.en: It is a reputable breed known for fair dealings.
rabbitking_passive.trans: 这是一个以公平交易而闻名的信誉良好的品种。

dragontailhat.en: This is the back of the dragon costume.

chesspiece_beefalo.en: It captures my beefalo's likeness quite well.
chesspiece_beefalo.trans: 它把我的皮弗娄牛刻画的栩栩如生。

trinket_16.en: The groove in this piece symbolizes the bishop's ceremonial headwear.
trinket_16.trans: 这个东西上的凹槽是主教正式头饰的象征。

trinket_15.en: In medieval chess, this piece was called the elephant.
trinket_15.trans: 在中世纪的象棋中，这颗旗子叫做象。

lighter.en: Ah, a mechanical tool for fire starting. How useful.
lighter.trans: 哈，生火的机械工具。真有用。

trinket_17.en: This would be a practical eating utensil if it weren't bent.
trinket_17.trans: 如果它不是弯的，它会是个吃饭的新装置。

trinket_12.en: A muscular hydrostat that's been sat near something hygroscopic.
trinket_12.trans: 位于吸水物质附近的肌肉性静水骨骼。

sweetpotato.en: It's always a hit at holiday get-togethers.

trinket_11.en: Ah, it's a scale replica of that mischievous robot.
trinket_11.trans: 啊，它是那个淘气机器人的等比例复制品。

trinket_14.en: I think it's quite lovely, despite the cracks left by age...
trinket_14.trans: 我觉得它很可爱，虽然岁月给它留下了裂纹…

boomerang.trans: 它就是一个扁平的翼片。

trinket_13.en: What a positively, delightfully odd little lady.
trinket_13.trans: 乐观快乐但又古里古怪的女士。

rose.en: Ah, a Rosa Macdub... what's it doing out here?
rose.trans: 啊，是玫瑰…它在这里做什么？

generic.en: It's a wildflower. I'm unfamiliar with the species.
generic.trans: 是一种野花。我不太熟悉这个物种。

quagmire_garlic.en: Allium sativum, a close relative of Allium cepa.
quagmire_garlic.trans: 百合科葱属植物，洋葱葱属植物的近亲。

ghostlyelixir_retaliation.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_retaliation.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

fishmeat.en: An odorous slab of fish meat.

trinket_19.en: A good illustration of gyroscopic precession.
trinket_19.trans: 一副不错的陀螺旋进插图。

young.en: It'd surely snap under the weight of ornaments.
young.trans: 在装饰品的重量下它当然会断掉。

candecorate.en: Lovely job on the tree, dears.
candecorate.trans: 树上的一份可爱的工作，亲爱的们。

burnt.en: Not to worry. We can still celebrate.
burnt.trans: 不要担心。我们仍然可以庆祝。

lavaarena_heavyblade.en: Goodness. I could never lift that!

support_pillar_complete.en: That should stabilize the cave's ceiling for now.
support_pillar_complete.trans: 这样应该可以暂时稳定洞穴的顶部。

firestarter.en: Do you want to singe your leaves off, %s?
firestarter.trans: 你想把叶子烧掉吗，%s？

ghost.en: Tsk, well that's no good. No good at all.
ghost.trans: 哎，一点都不好。

murderer.en: %s is a deadly nightshade! Attack!
murderer.trans: %s是一种致命的茄属植物！消灭它！

attacker.en: %s is of the Urtica family, I suspect.

reviver.en: You're a very good friend, %s.

generic.en: Ah, greetings, dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊，你好，亲爱的%s！

slingshot_band_tentacle.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_band_tentacle.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

bananajuice.en: Ah, I was in need of some refreshment.
bananajuice.trans: 啊，我正需要一些提神的东西。

petals_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

yotc_seedpacket.en: I used to be quite an avid gardener.
yotc_seedpacket.trans: 我曾经是一名热忱的园丁。

deadlyfeast.en: I'm not sure that's good to eat.
deadlyfeast.trans: 我不确定那东西吃了好不好。

bluemooneye.en: An excellent marker for group coordination.

deerclops_eyeball.en: I feel a vague sense of accomplishment.
deerclops_eyeball.trans: 我有一种难以名状的成就感。

occupied.en: If you're going to sit, you might as well read.
occupied.trans: 如果你要坐着它，你不妨找本书读一读。

generic.en: Reminds me of the chair in my reading nook.
generic.trans: 让我想起了我阅读角里的椅子。

burnt.en: Can't we have any nice things?
burnt.trans: 难道我们就不能拥有一些精致的物品吗？

scrapbook_page.en: What a hideous sight! A page torn from its book!
scrapbook_page.trans: 多么可怕的场景！从书上撕下来的一页纸！

moonstorm_static.trans: 这种能量似乎很不稳定。

burnt.en: I can't read any measurements from that husk.
burnt.trans: 已经烧得只剩外壳了，再也不能测量了。

generic.en: Measure before you act.
generic.trans: 行动前先测量一下。

burning.en: Hmm, now it reminds me of a very different famous book.
burning.trans: 唔，现在它让我想起了另一本很不同的名著。

burnt.en: It used to be a wardrobe.

generic.en: This reminds me of a famous book.
generic.trans: 这个让我想起了一本名著。

antchovies.en: Ah, I see! A brand new oceanic species!
antchovies.trans: 哦，我知道了！这是一种全新的海洋生物！

wagboss_robot_possessed.en: The entity does not enjoy being trapped and enslaved.
wagboss_robot_possessed.trans: 囚禁奴役对该实体来说并非享受。

carrot_oversized.en: The result of proper research, planning and care.
carrot_oversized.trans: 适当研究、规划和照顾的结果。

turf_desertdirt.en: The ground. You step on it.

moon_tree_blossom_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

mask_princesshat.en: She descends from a royal breed.

burnt.en: Somehow most of our things get reduced to carbon.
burnt.trans: 不知为何，我们的大部分东西总是变成碳。

generic.en: The appropriate offering was made.
generic.trans: 合适的供品已奉上。

empty.en: It requires a meat sacrifice of the monster variety.
empty.trans: 它需要一种怪物肉作祭献。

1.en: I was always more of a cat person, but she is very sweet.
1.trans: 我一直比较喜欢猫，但她很可爱。

2.en: I was always more of a cat person, but she is very sweet.
2.trans: 我一直比较喜欢猫，但她很可爱。

horseshoe.en: This trinket confers a favorable advantage, yet its effect cannot be quantified.
horseshoe.trans: 此小饰物能带来有利优势，然其效果难以量化。

archive_centipede_husk.en: These parts appear to be inoperative.
archive_centipede_husk.trans: 这些零件看起来出故障了。

crumbs.en: I believe this came from the walking confectionery.
crumbs.trans: 我认为它来自行走的糖果。

tentacle_garden.trans: 它们究竟是如何繁殖的？

carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.en: It appears simple enough to construct.

watertree_root.en: I suggest we avoid hitting those with our boat.
watertree_root.trans: 我建议不要让小船撞到这些。

plantmeat.en: The plant produced a meaty substance.
plantmeat.trans: 这种植物会产生一种口感像肉的物质。

cave_entrance.en: The placement of that rock looks intentional.
cave_entrance.trans: 似乎是有人故意把这块岩石放在这里的。

oceanfishingbobber_ball.en: The use of a fishing float was first documented in 1496.
oceanfishingbobber_ball.trans: 人类有记载的首次使用钓鱼浮漂是在1496年。

quagmire_hoe.en: It can be used to till fertile soil.
quagmire_hoe.trans: 可以用它来翻耕肥沃的土壤。

cooldown.en: Oh, these sorts of things always make such a mess...
cooldown.trans: 哦，这些东西总是弄得一团糟……

generic.en: Thankfully idle, for now.
generic.trans: 值得庆幸啊，现在是闲置状态。

burning.en: This is, in fact, saving it.

reviving.en: The little bird is on a different path now... terrible one.
reviving.trans: 小鸟现在走上了另一条道路……一条可怕的道路。

generic.en: If only this were the end for the little bird.
generic.trans: 要是这就是小鸟的尾声该多好。

meatballs.en: A pile of processed meat. Who knows what went into this.
meatballs.trans: 一堆经过加工的肉。天晓得里面放了什么东西。

yotb.en: The judge might be able to give me some insight regarding its sense of style.
yotb.trans: 评委也许能给我一些关于它风格方面的启示。

generic.en: How very charming!
generic.trans: 真是太有魅力了！

crabking_icewall.en: A solid but not impenetrable layer of defense.
crabking_icewall.trans: 坚实但并非坚不可摧的防御层。

picked.en: I believe they shall grow back.
picked.trans: 我相信它们会重新长出来的。

generic.en: A group of juncaceae graminoids.
generic.trans: 一簇灯芯草科禾草。

goldenaxe.en: The most malleable of metals, but let's see how this chops.
goldenaxe.trans: 黄金是最具可塑性的金属，不过我们还是先看看它砍树的效果吧。

livingtree_root.en: The root cutting of a beastly tree.

monsterlasagna.en: Lasagna or no, it would be hazardous to consume it.
monsterlasagna.trans: 无论是不是千层饼，吃它都是有害处的。

generic.en: It's a research station. I can learn new things with it.
generic.trans: 是个研究站。我可以用它来学习新东西。

burnt.en: I can't learn anything from a carbonized research station.
burnt.trans: 我没法用已经碳化了的研究站来学习东西。

reviving.en: The creature is reanimating in the most unnatural way.
reviving.trans: 这生物正以最不自然的方式复活。

generic.en: This piscean biped has met its demise.
generic.trans: 这个鱼形双足生物已经死亡。

generic.en: It's good to see her doing something constructive.
generic.trans: 我很欣慰她在做建设性的工作。

burnt.en: Oh dear...

mosquitosack.en: The stomach of a Culicidae, brimming with blood.
mosquitosack.trans: 蚊子的胃，里面装满了血。

turf_ruinstrim_glow.en: The ground. You step on it.

golden_farm_hoe.en: The most malleable of metals, but let's see how it does in the garden.
golden_farm_hoe.trans: 它是最具可塑性的金属，不过我们还是先看看它耕田的效果吧。

lunar_forge.en: It utilizes crystallized energy to reshape and reinforce organic material.
lunar_forge.trans: 它利用结晶的能量来重塑和加强有机材料。

rabbitkingspear.en: Not the most menacing weapon but it will ward off unwelcome bunnymen.
rabbitkingspear.trans: 不是最具威胁性的武器，但它可以抵御不受欢迎的兔人。

gargoyle_hound.en: Completely petrified as a result of lunar exposure.
gargoyle_hound.trans: 由于月亮的暴露而完全哑口无言。

shimmer.en: That light is refracting rather unnaturally.
shimmer.trans: 那道光的折射相当不自然。

generic.en: I wonder how it came to be here.
generic.trans: 我想知道它是如何来到这里的。

burnt.en: Oh dear...

raised.en: We must clear the surrounding boulders first.
raised.trans: 我们必须首先清理周围的岩石。

generic.en: It looks as though it can be moved.
generic.trans: 它看起来好像可以移动。

molebathill.en: The burrow appears to be mainly comprised of phlegm and mud.
molebathill.trans: 这个小山丘似乎主要由脓鼻涕和泥组成。

forgetmelots_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

wall_dreadstone_item.en: The stone's density makes for an incredibly strong building material.
wall_dreadstone_item.trans: 石头的密度使其成为一种非常坚固的建筑材料。

pinecone.en: Conifer seeds encased in a mature strobilus.
pinecone.trans: 包裹在成熟球果中的针叶树种子。

turnip.trans: 根部可食用的芸薹属植物。

firestarter.en: Was that fire intentional, %s?
firestarter.trans: %s，那火是故意点起的吗？

ghost.en: %s acts tough, but he needs my help. A heart should do it.
ghost.trans: %s表现得很强硬，但是他需要我的帮助。一颗心就可以帮到。

murderer.en: That's it, %s! I'm taking my glasses off!
murderer.trans: %s，就这样。我正摘下眼镜！

attacker.en: I will not tolerate such behavior, %s.

reviver.en: Excellent work, %s. You're a fast learner.

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

boat_bumper_yotd.en: The effect is admittedly quite striking.
boat_bumper_yotd.trans: 诚然，视觉效果极具侵略性。

mossling.en: I suppose that's approximately what I expected.
mossling.trans: 我想那应该和我预期的差不多。

ghostlyelixir_lunar.en: Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!
ghostlyelixir_lunar.trans: 按颜色分了类，标识清晰。干得漂亮！

battlesong_instant_revive.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_instant_revive.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

opalpreciousgem.trans: 衍射准矿物的珍贵的亮光。

picked.en: It requires hydration before it can fruit again.
picked.trans: 它需要补充水分才能再次结果。

inground.en: It is dormant this time of day.
inground.trans: 每天这个时候它会休眠。

generic.en: It is a fungus.
generic.trans: 它是一种菌类植物。

playing.en: This looks like a good bit of exercise.
playing.trans: 这看起来是一个很好的运动。

generic.en: I believe it requires a form of currency to start.
generic.trans: 我相信它需要用某种货币来启动。

armordragonfly.trans: 真是令人眼花缭乱的护甲！

has_spirit.trans: 内含一个被肢解的灵魂。

generic.en: The vessel is empty.
generic.trans: 该容器是空的。

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe.en: I miss a nice fresh avocado.

playing.en: I believe it was this one here.

generic.en: Part of the mechanism for the game, I'd imagine.
generic.trans: 我想这是游戏机制的一部分。

little_walrus.en: The juvenile is not as aggressive.
little_walrus.trans: 小家伙没有那么强的攻击性。

teleportato_ring.en: A torus of alloys and wiring.
teleportato_ring.trans: 由合金和电线构成的圆环。

fig_cooked.en: Cooking it brings out more of the flavor.
fig_cooked.trans: 烹饪之后激发了更多的风味。

lavaarena_elemental.en: It is bound to our service.

armor_carrotlure.en: This will be a big hit with the bunnymen.
armor_carrotlure.trans: 将在兔人里形成某种潮流。

wereitem_goose.en: An... artistic representation of the Branta canadensis.
wereitem_goose.trans: 一种对加拿大鹅的艺术呈现。

mermhat.en: I'm not eager to test out its effectiveness.
mermhat.trans: 我急切的想要验证它的有效性。

burning.en: It is an act of mercy.

generic.en: The arachnid matriarch lies expired.
generic.trans: 蛛形纲的女族长就这么倒下了。

mutatedbird.en: It has mutated in form and nature.
mutatedbird.trans: 它的外型和本性都发生了变异。

quagmire_park_urn.en: I wonder who's ashes those are.
quagmire_park_urn.trans: 我想知道那是谁的骨灰。

moonstorm_spark.en: I assumed it was a form of electricity, but it seems to be something else entirely...
moonstorm_spark.trans: 我本以为它是某种电力，可是似乎完全是另一种东西……

kitcoon_savanna.en: The resemblance to a Panthera tigris is incredible.
kitcoon_savanna.trans: 与老虎的相似性令人难以置信。

trunkvest_winter.trans: 在寒冷环境中提供足够保护。

chesspiece_daywalker.en: An accurate stone model of that ill-behaved creature.
chesspiece_daywalker.trans: 那个行为不端的生物的精确石制模型。

support_pillar_dreadstone_broken.en: Broken? Perhaps this material is not as indestructible as I surmised.
support_pillar_dreadstone_broken.trans: 坏了？或许这种材料并不像我想象的那么坚不可摧。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.en: Its effect appears to be stronger at night.
oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.trans: 它在夜晚能更好的发挥效用。

generic.en: An unsubtle reminder of one's own mortality.
generic.trans: 毫不避讳地提醒每个人都会死亡。

quagmire_pot_hanger.en: Traditionally one hangs a pot from it.
quagmire_pot_hanger.trans: 习惯上，这是用来挂锅子的。

charlie_stage_post.en: The builder must have been inspired by the Greek dramas of antiquity.
charlie_stage_post.trans: 建造者一定是受了古希腊戏剧的启发。

bibingka.en: Traditionally, bibingka is baked in a specialized clay oven.
bibingka.trans: 传统上，比宾卡米糕是在专用的陶土炉中烘烤而成。

battlesong_sanityaura.en: Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken.
battlesong_sanityaura.trans: 如果我没记错的话，这是音乐记谱符号。

twiggy_nut.en: Seeds encased in a mature strobilus.
twiggy_nut.trans: 包裹在成熟球果中的种子。

chesspiece_butterfly.en: Carved in the lunar moth's likeness.
chesspiece_butterfly.trans: 参照月蛾的形象雕琢而成。

soil_amender_fermented.en: Oh, the garden will enjoy this immensely!
soil_amender_fermented.trans: 哦，花园会非常喜欢这个!

chesspiece_stalker.en: The artist faithfully replicated its skeletal structure.
chesspiece_stalker.trans: 雕塑家忠实还原了它的骨架结构。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.en: This one is most definitely unique.
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.trans: 这个个体无疑是独一无二的。

tomato_cooked.trans: 烤茄科茄属植物西红柿。

ghost.en: It must be fake. I don't believe it.
ghost.trans: 肯定是假的。我才不相信呢。

mast_yotd.en: I don't believe those are in fact the wings of a Diptera.
mast_yotd.trans: 我不相信那真的是双翅目昆虫的翅膀。

yellowamulet.en: This amulet is glowing at the mid 530 nanometer wavelength.
yellowamulet.trans: 这个护符的发光波长为530纳米左右。

beeswax.en: Naturally antibacterial. Could slow food decay if we use it properly.
beeswax.trans: 天然抗菌。如果使用合理，就能减缓食品变质。

shroom_skin.en: Frog skin must remain damp, or they will suffocate. Not that this one minds.
shroom_skin.trans: 青蛙的皮肤必须保持潮湿，否则它们会窒息。这只在意的不是那事。

lost_toy_1.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_1.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

lost_toy_2.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_2.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

pigelite3.en: Has an earthy musk to him.

pigelite4.en: I wonder what those green markings signify.
pigelite4.trans: 我想知道那些绿色的标记是什么意思。

oar_driftwood.en: A much more efficient, lighter design.

lost_toy_7.en: How odd... perhaps it's merely a mirage.
lost_toy_7.trans: 好奇怪……也许只是海市蜃楼。

hermitcrab_lightpost_item.en: Pearl dear, where would you like this?
hermitcrab_lightpost_item.trans: 亲爱的珍珠，你希望把它安装在哪里？

piggyback.en: A face only necessity could love.
piggyback.trans: 只有在需要它时才会爱上的一张脸。

fruitmedley.en: What a nice selection of fruit!

carrat_good.en: The specimen seems to have responded well to the training!
carrat_good.trans: 标本对训练的反应十分积极！

carrat.en: Hm, it seems that more training might be in order.
carrat.trans: 嗯，看来还得再训练训练。

burnt.en: Oh my, that won't do at all.

generic.en: Fascinating! I never realized skill could be measured by weight.
generic.trans: 令人着迷！我从未意识到技能可以通过重量测量。

critter_eyeofterror.en: Now, I wonder if your nerves are functional, or merely decorative...
critter_eyeofterror.trans: 我想知道你的神经系统是纯装饰性的，还是具备一定的功能……

carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.en: It appears simple enough to construct.

lunar_forge_kit.en: It should be a simple matter to construct it.

slingshot_handle_voidcloth.en: What is that Walter up to now?
slingshot_handle_voidcloth.trans: 沃尔特那个小伙子现在尽折腾这个？

support_pillar_broken.en: It would be prudent to attempt some repairs.
support_pillar_broken.trans: 尝试进行一些修复是谨慎的做法。

tillweed_dried.en: The drying process enhances the aroma.

1.en: There must be a mutagen in monster meat that triggers her growth.
1.trans: 一定是怪物肉里有诱变剂，引发了她的成长。

2.en: There must be a mutagen in monster meat that triggers her growth.
2.trans: 一定是怪物肉里有诱变剂，引发了她的成长。

book_web.en: Arachnids are crucial parts of a healthy ecosystem, after all.
book_web.trans: 毕竟蛛形纲动物是健康的生态系统的重要组成部分。

generic.en: We must destroy that towering Agaricus.
generic.trans: 我们必须摧毁那棵高耸的落叶松蕈。

burnt.en: A towering, burnt Agaricus.
burnt.trans: 一棵高耸的烧焦的落叶松蕈。

atrium_statue.en: It refuses to comply with this world's laws.
atrium_statue.trans: 它拒绝遵守这个世界的规则。

burnt.en: I'd suggest looking elsewhere for a place to exercise.
burnt.trans: 我建议换个地方锻炼吧。

generic.en: Do be careful not to overexert yourself, dear.
generic.trans: 请注意不要过度劳累，亲爱的。

crabking_mob.en: The crabs are protecting their king.
crabking_mob.trans: 螃蟹们在保护它们的国王。

critter_dragonling.trans: 多么惹人喜爱的双翅目少年啊！

turf_ruinsbrick.en: The ground. You step on it.

onion.trans: 可食用的球茎状洋葱葱属植物。

corn.en: Zea mays, a great staple food.

hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.en: This brew renders lunar entities indifferent to us.
hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.trans: 此茶可使月能实体对我们保持冷漠。

grotto_pool_big.en: How interesting, it seems to be forming moon glass stalagmites.
grotto_pool_big.trans: 真有意思，好像是在形成月光玻璃石笋。

yotr_fightring_kit.en: Let's build this far away from my reading area, shall we?
yotr_fightring_kit.trans: 咱们把它建在离我的阅读区远一点的地方，可以吗？

1.trans: 哪些生物在这里住过呢？

2.en: There's nothing left of the inhabitants.
