2.trans: 丝毫没留下居民们的痕迹。

3.en: What caused this city to crumble?
3.trans: 是什么导致了这村子的瓦解？

ready.en: Enough salt has crystallized to harvest.
ready.trans: 结晶盐够多了，可以采收了。

generic.en: Salt deposits should form on the rack soon.
generic.trans: 盐沉积物应该很快就会积聚在架子上了。

palmconetree.en: It appears to be from the family Arecaceae, yet possesses some coniferous characteristics.
palmconetree.trans: 它似乎属于槭树科，但拥有一些针叶树的特征。

robot.en: %s's skeleton is a permanent reminder to be mindful around %s.
robot.trans: %s的骨骼始终提醒着在%s周围要注意。

default.en: %s's skeleton is a permanent reminder to be mindful around %s.
default.trans: %s的骨骼始终提醒着在%s周围要注意。

female.en: %s's skeleton is a permanent reminder to be mindful around %s.
female.trans: %s的骨骼始终提醒着在%s周围要注意。

male.en: %s's skeleton is a permanent reminder to be mindful around %s.
male.trans: %s的骨骼始终提醒着在%s周围要注意。

noammo.en: There's still the small matter of ammunition, dear...
noammo.trans: 还有弹药这个小问题，亲爱的……

generic.en: A highly effective weapon in nautical combat, when properly loaded.
generic.trans: 海战中一种非常有效的武器，前提是要正确装弹。

lavae.en: I believe it is a larval dragonfly.
lavae.trans: 我相信它是一只龙蝇幼虫。

winter_food9.en: I've always harbored a weakness for good 'nog.

high.en: That fire is burning at an alarming rate.
high.trans: 营火正在以惊人的速度燃烧。

low.en: The fire could use some more fuel.

generic.en: A camp fire.
generic.trans: 一处营火。

halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.en: Not as potent as I would have liked.

winter_food8.en: A small enchantment keeps it a pleasant temperature.
winter_food8.trans: 一个小小的魔法让它保持着舒适的温度。

winter_food5.trans: 这样熟练准备的树莓馅！

moonglass_charged.en: The energy seems unstable, I'll have to be quick to put it to any use.
moonglass_charged.trans: 能量似乎不稳定，我得尽快利用它。

winter_food4.en: An object with negligible temporal drag.
winter_food4.trans: 一个带有微不足道的暂时阻力的物体。

winter_food7.en: Pair it with a good book and you've a cure for the winter blues.
winter_food7.trans: 把它和一本好书配对，这样你就有了冬日哀伤的治疗方法。

winter_food6.en: "Plum" is a 17th century term for "fruit", dear.
winter_food6.trans: “李子”是十七世纪的“水果”的术语，亲爱的。

winter_food1.trans: 多么讨人喜欢的一个小个体啊。

winter_food3.en: The perfect stir stick for hot cup of tea.

winter_food2.en: Just like holidays at the library!
winter_food2.trans: 就像在图书馆度过的假日！

moon_altar_rock_seed.en: I think I had best mine it out.
moon_altar_rock_seed.trans: 我认为最好还是把它开采出来。

bishop_nightmare.trans: 好复杂的技术，太令人兴奋了。

record_dusk.en: The music was better back in my day.
record_dusk.trans: 我那个时代的音乐更好。

playbill_the_veil.en: Rather on-the-nose, if you ask me.
playbill_the_veil.trans: 你问我意见的话，我会说相当直白。

chesspiece_warg_mutated.en: There is much I still don't understand about this beast.
chesspiece_warg_mutated.trans: 关于这头野兽，我还有很多不明白的地方。

green_cap.en: Seems edible, though it may not be totally sane to consume it.
green_cap.trans: 看上去可以吃，尽管吃掉它可能不是很理智的做法。

icebox.en: It is a crude heat exchanger.

rare.en: Such a rare and detailed drawing!
rare.trans: 这么稀罕且精细的图画！

lava_pond.en: Molten rock. Best not to get too close.
lava_pond.trans: 熔化的石头。最好不要靠得太近。

quagmire_grill.en: Perhaps some barbeque is in order.

damaged.en: I deem it repairable, or harvestable for parts.
damaged.trans: 我认为它可修复，也可拆解零件。

generic.en: Self-propelling automatons with coordinated attacks. An invention of no small ingenuity.
generic.trans: 具有协同攻击能力的自走式机器人。这项发明展现了不小的创造力。

chesspiece_yoth.en: This mechanical knight demonstrates loyalty to whomever dons the garb of its charge.
chesspiece_yoth.trans: 这名机械骑士会效忠于任何穿上其守护对象的衣服的人。

onemanband.en: An impressive improvement to the traditional pipe and tabor.
onemanband.trans: 对传统管乐器和小鼓的很好改进。

wagstaff_npc_mutations.en: Rather convenient of him to show up now that the hard work is done.
wagstaff_npc_mutations.trans: 辛苦活干完了，他才安逸地出现。

chesspiece_yotd.en: A curious combination; the fire-breathing Diptera and seafaring.
chesspiece_yotd.trans: 喷火双翅目与航海的奇妙结合。

nightmarelight.en: The ancients seem to have used nightmare fuel to power everything.
nightmarelight.trans: 古人似乎曾用噩梦燃料来为一切事物提供能量。

book_horticulture.en: Only my best tricks for bringing a garden to fruition.
book_horticulture.trans: 这就是我让农作物开花结果的绝学。

gingerbreadpig.en: If it would sit still long enough, I could classify it.
gingerbreadpig.trans: 如果它能静坐一会儿，我就可以把它归类。

slingshotammo_honey.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_honey.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

catcoonhat.en: Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do.
catcoonhat.trans: 虽然不太像大卫·克洛科特的浣熊皮帽，但也不错了。

generic.en: What is this "Gnaw", I wonder?
generic.trans: 我想知道，这个“饕餮”是什么？

full.en: That should tide it over while I prepare our next dish.
full.trans: 在我烹制下一道菜的同时，这些应该够充饥了。

kelphat.en: It understandably has an effect on one's emotional wellbeing.
kelphat.trans: 据说可以影响人的精神健康。

chesspiece_yots.en: One of the hungriest large invertebrates.
chesspiece_yots.trans: 这是最饥饿的大型无脊椎动物之一。

abysspillar_trial.en: A mechanical lever designed to actuate a mechanism.
abysspillar_trial.trans: 一条机械杠杆，用于启动一套装置。

beefalo_groomer_item.en: I'd best get it set up.

rabbitkingminion_bunnyman.trans: 一定是一个具有攻击性品种。

moon_cap.en: It seems to possess strong sleep inducing properties.
moon_cap.trans: 它似乎具有很强的诱导睡眠的特性。

glommerfuel.en: It appears to be quite volatile.

turf_badlands.en: The ground. You step on it.

dragonfly.en: It's some kind of mythical variant of a Diptera.
dragonfly.trans: 它是双翅目昆虫的某种神秘变异体。

held.en: This little fellow will be my friend.
held.trans: 这个小家伙将是我的朋友。

generic.en: Cardinalis! Beautiful plumage.
generic.trans: 北美红雀！好漂亮的羽毛。

turf_ruinsbrick_glow.en: The ground. You step on it.

beemine_maxwell.en: A dangerous mine filled with Culicidae.
beemine_maxwell.trans: 用蚊子填装的危险地雷。

melted.en: From dangerous solid to harmless liquid. Thank-you, heat.
melted.trans: 从危险的固体变成了无害的液体。谢谢你，热量。

generic.en: We ought to steer the ships clear of that.
generic.trans: 我们不能让船撞上冰山。

lifeinjector.en: The mold appears to have medicinal properties.

ghost.en: Poor dear. %s needs a heart to anchor them to this plane.
ghost.trans: 好可怜，%s需要一颗心将他们固定在这个位面上。

firestarter.en: %s, what have I told you about lighting fires?
firestarter.trans: %s，我是怎么告诉你生火的？

murderer.en: I'll erase you from the history books!
murderer.trans: 我要把你从历史书上抹掉！

attacker.en: That no good %s is up to no good.

reviver.en: I appreciate your commitment to group survival, %s.
reviver.trans: 我要谢谢你为了集体生存所做的贡献，%s！

generic.en: Ah, greetings dear %s!
generic.trans: 啊哈，你好，亲爱的%s！

playing.en: Curious. It seems that it's designed to be impossible to lose.
playing.trans: 着实有趣。这样设计谁都不会输。

generic.en: I believe it requires a form of currency to start.
generic.trans: 我相信它需要用某种货币来启动。

balloon.en: Could serve as a suitable diversion.
balloon.trans: 用它来转移注意力应该不错。

slingshotammo_purebrilliance.en: Remember to clean up after yourself, dear.
slingshotammo_purebrilliance.trans: 亲爱的，自己弄脏的记得要自己打扫。

costume_tree_body.en: It appears to be a theatrical costume.

chesspiece_wagboss_robot.en: A miniature of the homicidal automaton. Hm.
chesspiece_wagboss_robot.trans: 杀人机器人的微缩模型。嗯。

fertilizer.en: A bucket of animal feces. Pungent.

chesspiece_carrat.en: A delightfully rendered likeness of the Daucus carota rattus.
chesspiece_carrat.trans: 完美再现了胡萝卜鼠的神韵。

turf_cave.en: The ground. You step on it.

announce_dig_disease_warning.en: Caught it just in time. The roots were nearly rotten.
announce_dig_disease_warning.trans: 刚好及时抓住它。根部几乎都烂掉了。

describe_plantstressed.en: It seems to be suffering from two different stressors at once.
describe_plantstressed.trans: 它似乎同时承受着两种不同的压力。

announce_detach_buff_electricattack.en: Back to the the natural state of things.

announce_enter_light.en: It is bright enough to see.
announce_enter_light.trans: 这亮度足以看见东西了。

spider.en: I must read up on this!
spider.trans: 我必须仔细研究一下这个！

generic.en: Well, that's over.
generic.trans: 得，结束了。

announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.en: Buzzards drawn by carrion, naturally. However, these exhibit signs of mutation.
announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.trans: 秃鹫自然会被腐肉吸引。可是，这几只身上显然有变异的迹象。

2.en: It seems I've discovered a kitten.
2.trans: 我似乎发现了一只小猫。

3.en: I could see your tail from the distance, dear.
3.trans: 我老远就看到了你的尾巴，亲爱的。

4.en: Finding kittens is quite simple once you become accustomed to it.
4.trans: 一旦熟悉之后，寻找小猫就变得很简单。

announce_oceanfishing_linesnap.en: Oh dear, I must have put too much strain on my line.
announce_oceanfishing_linesnap.trans: 噢，天啊，一定是刚才太用力拉线。

announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.en: How strange, I do in fact feel a bit tired...
announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 真奇怪，我确实觉得有点累……

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: I found all of the missing kittens.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 我找到了所有不见的小猫。

wintersfeastfuel.en: I feel as though I've been wrapped in a cozy blanket.
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 好像裹了一条舒服的毯子一样。

announce_freedom.en: Freedom! I'll find a good book and tuck in.
announce_freedom.trans: 自由！我要找一本好书，然后在书里尽情地徜徉。

announce_hunt_wrong_fork.en: Oh dear... I have the most peculiar sensation that I'm being observed.
announce_hunt_wrong_fork.trans: 哦，亲爱的……我有一种奇特的感觉，我被监视了。

announce_ticoon_abandoned.en: It appears I will have to continue the search alone.
announce_ticoon_abandoned.trans: 看来我将不得不继续独自寻找。

1.en: Oh dear... I seem to be afflicted by the plant's toxin.
1.trans: 哦，天啊……我好像在被植物的毒素折磨。

2.en: The toxin from those nettles carries a rather unpleasant burning sensation.
2.trans: 那些荨麻的毒素带着相当难受的烧灼感。

announce_nodangersiesta.en: I can't lie down when I'm in danger!
announce_nodangersiesta.trans: 身处危险的时候，我不敢躺下来！

2.en: Goodness...
2.trans: 天啊……

5.en: I'm more spry than I look!
5.trans: 我比我看上去要精神得多！

6.en: You just need to know how to lift!

7.en: No sweat off my back! Ho ho!

announce_pocketwatch_portal.en: Oof! Might I suggest realigning the exit point closer to the ground next time, dear?
announce_pocketwatch_portal.trans: 呜呜! 我是否可以建议下次将出口点重新调整到离地面更近的地方，亲爱的？

announce_yoth_oncooldown.en: It seems the mechanical knights are indisposed at the moment.
announce_yoth_oncooldown.trans: 看来那些机械骑士此刻暂时无法响应。

2.en: Oh my, I'll have to make a note of this.
2.trans: 哎呀，我要注意点。

announce_float_swim_tired.en: I just need to catch my breath.

announce_shelter.trans: 啊，终于可以喘息一下了。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.en: One more kitten has been encountered.

announce_charlie.en: A noise! And a distinctly floral scent?

announce_quake.en: A tremor! At least magnitude seven on the Richter scale.
announce_quake.trans: 是地震！震级至少达到了里氏七级。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.en: I am distancing myself from where the game is happening.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.trans: 我正与游戏场地拉开距离。

announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.en: Those poor birds never stood a chance in the hail storm.
announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.trans: 那些可怜的鸟儿在冰雹里毫无生存的机会。

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: I believe my immunity from acidic rainfall has concluded.
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 我断言我的酸雨免疫能力已经消失了。

announce_canfix.en: I do believe I can repair this.

announce_hermitcrab_shell_badteleportpoi.en: It's not responding for some reason.

announce_wormhole.trans: 一堂内容详实的生物课！

announce_book_moon_daytime.en: We won't be able to view the effects until this evening.
announce_book_moon_daytime.trans: 我们要到今天晚上才能看到效果。

generic.en: Combat!
generic.trans: 战斗！

announce_fan_out.trans: 这个脆弱的装置烂掉了。

announce_weight_heavy.en:
Weight: {weight}
This specimen is decidedly larger than average.
announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量: {weight}
这个标本的大小远远超过了平均值。

announce_unimplemented.en: Tut tut, I don't think it's quite ready.
announce_unimplemented.trans: 啧啧，我觉得它应该还没有完全弄好。

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: This platform's construction will not withstand deeper waters.
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 该平台的结构无法承受更深的水域。

describe_plantstressornutrients.trans: 它需要营养更丰富的土壤。

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: No need to turn the light off dear, I won't be able to sleep either way.
announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.trans: 不需要关灯，亲爱的，反正我也睡不着的。

announce_hunt_lost_trail.en: The trail is no longer distinguishable.
announce_hunt_lost_trail.trans: 踪迹已经变得难以识别。

announce_mount_lowhealth.en: My mount requires attention of the medical variety.
announce_mount_lowhealth.trans: 我的坐骑需要各种医疗照顾。

announce_hunt_beast_nearby.en: The appearance of this track indicates recent activity.
announce_hunt_beast_nearby.trans: 出现这个踪迹表明动物最近出来活动过。

announce_boat_leak.en: The boat has fallen into dangerous disrepair.
announce_boat_leak.trans: 船已经陷入十分危险的状态。

announce_highresearch.en: My my, that was extremely interesting!
announce_highresearch.trans: 天啊，这真是太有意思了！

announce_shadow_rift_max.en: As nonsensical as it sounds, there is something dark about that "light"...
announce_shadow_rift_max.trans: 听起来可能很荒谬，但那个“光”有点黑暗……

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.en: The game has commenced, I should start seeking.
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.trans: 游戏已经启动，我应该开始搜索了。

announce_boomerang.en: I misjudged the timing of its return.
announce_boomerang.trans: 我错估了它飞回来的时间。

1.en: The ground will soon give way.

2.en: Not the work of tectonic plates.
2.trans: 这不是板块构造的结果。

3.en: A six on the Richter scale.

describe_planthappy.en: This crop appears to be in good health.
describe_planthappy.trans: 农作物看起来健康状况良好。

announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: I'll have everything done in a snap!
announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.trans: 我马上就能做好所有事！

announce_winch_claw_no_item.en: Oh dear... perhaps it's time to clean my glasses.
announce_winch_claw_no_item.trans: 哦亲爱的……也许我该擦擦眼镜了。

announce_tool_tooweak.en: This will require a more robust tool.
announce_tool_tooweak.trans: 需要一个更强大的工具。

describe_plantverystressed.en: It appears to be suffering from quite a variety of stressors.
describe_plantverystressed.trans: 它似乎正遭受着相当多的压力。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.en: The end of the game draws closer.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.trans: 游戏结束的时间越来越近了。

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: I just can't seem to put it down...
announce_cant_escape_curse.trans: 我似乎就是无法放下它……

announce_yotd_noboats.en: I must be in closer proximity to the starting point before we can begin.
announce_yotd_noboats.trans: 我必须在离起点更近的地方才能开始。

quagmire_announce_mealburnt.en: It was too long on the fire.

announce_nodaysleep.en: I can hardly get to sleep at night, never mind during the day.
announce_nodaysleep.trans: 即使是晚上我都很难入睡，更不用说在白天了。

announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.en: It appears my defense has weakened.
announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 我的防御力似乎降低了。

announce_archive_old_knowledge.en: I'm already familiar with this particular piece of knowledge.
announce_archive_old_knowledge.trans: 我对这种知识已经很熟悉了。

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: Did I just feel a raindrop?
announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 我刚刚被雨滴打湿了吗？

2.en: only_used_by_wolfgang
2.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: The kittens should be over here, yes.

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: I suspect whatever lies at the end of this trail will be formidable.
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 我怀疑这条踪迹尽头的是令人生畏的存在。

announce_archive_no_power.en: How very disappointing, I was curious to see what it would do.
announce_archive_no_power.trans: 真是非常失望，我很想知道它的作用。

announce_monkey_curse_change.en: Oh dear. This is an unfortunate development.
announce_monkey_curse_change.trans: 噢，天啊。这是一个不幸的变故。

announce_oceanfishing_badcast.en: Let's give that another go, shall we?

describe_toodark.en: I can't see in the dark.
describe_toodark.trans: 黑暗里我什么都看不见。

announce_nowardrobeonfire.en: As you can plainly see, it is ablaze.
announce_nowardrobeonfire.trans: 你可以清楚看到，它着火了。

announce_detach_buff_attack.en: Oh my, what came over me?

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.en: It appears we did not find them all in time.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.trans: 看来我们没能及时找齐所有小猫。

announce_moonpotion_failed.en: Oh dear, that didn't go as planned.
announce_moonpotion_failed.trans: 噢，天啊，偏离了我的计划。

announce_scrapbook_full.en: My scrapbook has already been completed.

announce_kitcoon_found_in_the_wild.trans: 可怜的宝贝，你迷路了吗？

announce_winch_claw_miss.en: This will require a bit more precision on my part.
announce_winch_claw_miss.trans: 我需要提高自己的精度。

2.en: only_used_by_wolfgang
2.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_nomountedgift.en: I do believe I should dismount first.
announce_nomountedgift.trans: 我认为我应该第一个下马。

announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.en: The matter of placing checkpoints seems to have been overlooked.
announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.trans: 设置检查站的事宜似乎被忽略了。

actionfail_generic.en: It seems I can't do that.

announce_hermitcrab_shell_arrive.en: Ah yes. I have now arrived at Pearl's home.

announce_petrifed_trees.en: The chemical reaction has been catalyzed...

announce_knockedout.en: Oof, that's one way to get some rest, I suppose.
announce_knockedout.trans: 这下好了，我想这也是获得休息的一种方法吧。

announce_weapon_tooweak.en: This calls for something more formidable.

announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.en: The megafauna have set their eyes on us.
announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.trans: 巨型动物已经盯上了我们。

announce_klaus_enrage.en: No sense throwing one's life away. Fall back!
announce_klaus_enrage.trans: 没必要把别人的生命扔掉。后退！

announce_archive_new_knowledge.en: What a peculiar sensation, it's transmitting a blueprint telepathically!
announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 多么奇特的感觉，它在用心灵感应传送蓝图！

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: I seem to have been rendered conductive!

announce_insufficientfertilizer.en: It needs just a touch more fecal assistance, I'd say.
announce_insufficientfertilizer.trans: 要我说，只需要再多施一点肥就可以了。

no_station.en: I'm afraid this will require a specialized workspace.
no_station.trans: 恐怕这需要一个特制的工作区。

no_ingredients.en: I should endeavor to collect the required ingredients.
no_ingredients.trans: 我应该努力收集所需的材料。

no_tech.en: This looks like an opportunity to conduct some research.
no_tech.trans: 不如抓住这个机会做一些研究。

describe_smoldering.en: Seems it's about to ignite from the heat.
describe_smoldering.trans: 看样子快要因为温度过高而着火了。

announce_pick_disease_warning.en: This plant is exhibiting concerning signs.
announce_pick_disease_warning.trans: 这棵植物正在展示相关的木牌。

describe_plantstressorfamily.en: These grow best when surrounded by others of its particular species.
describe_plantstressorfamily.trans: 这些植物周围有同伴时生长的最好。

2.en: Your "Grace".
2.trans: “陛下”

announce_winters_feast_buff.en: Intriguing! I appear to be filled with "cheer".
announce_winters_feast_buff.trans: 有意思! 我似乎满是 "欢愉"。

announce_sacredchest_no.en: Shoot. I thought I had it.
announce_sacredchest_no.trans: 可惜啊，我本来很有把握的。

announce_lightning_damage_avoided.en: Thank goodness for this non-conductive clothing!
announce_lightning_damage_avoided.trans: 谢天谢地，这件衣服不导电！

announce_chair_on_fire.trans: 这种行为是不可接受的。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: We found all of the missing kittens.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 我们找到了所有不见的小猫。

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: There appears to be a clear lack of hiding evidence.
announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.trans: 似乎明显缺乏有猫隐藏的证据。

announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.en: I suppose there will be no fish dinner for me this time.

announce_inv_full.trans: 我拿不了更多的东西了。

announce_attach_buff_attack.en: My, I feel full of vim and vigor!

describe_plantstressorseason.en: I'm afraid this plant might not be in season.
describe_plantstressorseason.trans: 恐怕这株植物不适合在这个季节栽种。

announce_deerclops.trans: 听起来似乎来了个巨人！

announce_rabbitking_lucky.en: What a peculiar breed of rabbit!
announce_rabbitking_lucky.trans: 多么奇特的兔子品种啊！

announce_klaus_callforhelp.en: Careful! It has summoned lesser Krampii.
announce_klaus_callforhelp.trans: 小心！它召唤了小坎普斯。

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.en: This trail will likely yeild less dangerous results.
announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 这条踪迹可能会带来不那么危险的结果。

announce_exit_gelblob.en: I do not wish to experience that again.
announce_exit_gelblob.trans: 我不想再经历那样的事了。

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: I believe he has caught the kitten's scent.
announce_ticoon_start_tracking.trans: 它已经闻到了小猫的气味。

announce_wet.en: I wonder what my body's saturation point is...
announce_wet.trans: 我很好奇我身体的极限点是什么...

describe_generic.en: A rare occurrence. I don't know what that is.
describe_generic.trans: 稀罕的事物。我不知道那是什么。

announce_toadescaping.en: It will need to burrow soon to rehydrate its skin.
announce_toadescaping.trans: 它将很快需要再次钻洞来让皮肤补充水分。

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: I should endeavor to make some space around the starting point.
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 我应该努力在起点周围腾出一些空间。

announce_adventurefail.en: We must learn from our failures.
announce_adventurefail.trans: 我们必须从失败中总结教训。

announce_klaus_unchained.en: Whatever enchantment restrained it has been undone.
announce_klaus_unchained.trans: 不管是什么魔法抑制了它，都没有用了。

announce_washed_ashore.en: I hope my books weren't ruined.
announce_washed_ashore.trans: 希望不要弄坏了我的书。

announce_rabbitking_passive.en: I hear the burrowing of a small creature.
announce_rabbitking_passive.trans: 我听到小动物挖洞的声音。

1.en: I do believe it's time to go.

2.en: It's dangerous to be here.
2.trans: 待在这里太危险了。

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Excuse me, I will join the feline search.
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.trans: 打扰了，我愿意加入猫科动物的搜索。

announce_townportalteleport.en: Goodness! That's one way to travel.
announce_townportalteleport.trans: 天哪！这是旅行的一种方式。

announce_ticoon_dead.en: Oh, how terrible! I suppose I'm on my own now.
announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 哦，真糟糕！我想我现在只能靠自己了。

stale.en: That was not at optimal freshness.
stale.trans: 那已经不是最新鲜的状态了。

painful.en: I should not have ingested that.

generic.en: Yum!
generic.trans: 好吃！

announce_pirates_arrive.en: Oh dear, it's those troublemakers playing their loud music again...
announce_pirates_arrive.trans: 哦，天啊。那些捣蛋鬼又在放他们的喧哗的音乐了……

announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.en: I daresay I'm tougher than I may appear!
announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 我敢说我比外表看起来强壮！

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: Someone arrived before us and found our kitten.
announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.trans: 有人比我们先到，找到了我们的小猫。

announce_eyeofterror_flyback.en: This ocular creature seems rather persistent.
announce_eyeofterror_flyback.trans: 这种眼球生物似乎相当执着。

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: Let's try to look a bit more lively, dear.
announce_carrat_error_walking.trans: 拿出点生龙活虎的样子，亲爱的。

announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.en: I suppose the daylight gives it a migraine.
announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.trans: 我想日光会让它偏头痛。

announce_off_script.en: Perhaps a review of the script is in order, dear?
announce_off_script.trans: 要不要再过一下剧本，亲爱的？

announce_acidbats.en: What a dreadful noise they make.
announce_acidbats.trans: 它们发出的噪音真可怕。

announce_nohungersiesta.en: My hunger won't make relaxing any easier!
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 好饿啊，这下更放松不了了！

1.en: Talking to my little garden always seemed to help it grow.
1.trans: 和我的小花园说话，似乎总能帮助它成长。

2.en: My, those leaves are coming in quite nicely, dear!
2.trans: 天的，这些叶子长的真好！

3.en: All one needs to thrive is a bit of love and care, isn't that right?
3.trans: 一个人要想茁壮成长，只需要一点爱和关怀，不是吗？

4.en: No need to rush dear, you just take your time.
4.trans: 不用着急，亲爱的，你慢慢来就好了。

5.en: How are you doing today? Do you have enough water?
5.trans: 你今天过得怎么样？水够吗？

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.en: The trail's been washed away by the precipitation.
announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 踪迹已经被降水冲淡了。

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: I couldn't possibly eat this all myself!
announce_eating_not_feasting.trans: 我一个人吃不了这么多！

announce_snowball_no_snow.en: There's no snow here to roll it in.
announce_snowball_no_snow.trans: 这里没有雪可以滚雪球。

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: It seems the den was more crucial to this platform's structural integrity than I surmised.
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 看来那个窝对平台结构完整性的重要性比我想象的还要大。

announce_nodangergift.en: Presents are not a top survival priority at this moment.
announce_nodangergift.trans: 现在不是顾着礼物的时候，生存最重要。

announce_nodangersleep.en: I can barely sleep even when I'm not in danger!
announce_nodangersleep.trans: 即使周围没有危险，我也几乎睡不着觉！

announce_worms.en: Something nasty intends to rear its head.
announce_worms.trans: 某种阴险的生物要出现了。

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: It could use a little hydration.
